Sequential ignorabilities phrased as `CondIndepCFBundle` against the corresponding history bundle. Three primitive-process exclusions: `exclusion` is `Y(D, S)` (Y under encTreatRegime = Y under treatmentRegime); `exclusion_D1` is `DвӮҒ(ZвӮҒ, SвӮҖ)` (DвӮҒ under encouragementRegime z = DвӮҒ under `Regime.single ZвӮҒ`); `exclusion_Z1` is `ZвӮҒ(SвӮҖ)` (P.eval ZвӮҒ under encZ2Regime zвӮӮ = P.eval ZвӮҒ under Regime.empty), needed by the stage-1 composition consistency rewrite to satisfy `IntermediateAgrees`. | **Defined** |

### `DynamicLATE/Consistency.lean` вҖ” pointwise consistency-on-event rewrites

Structural pointwise identities used by the bridge proofs.  Each lemma is a direct consequence of PO consistency (def:po-consistency) вҖ” single-event `cf_eq_factual_on_event` for stage-2 rewrites and `Consistency.composition` for stage-1 (mirroring the existing `YofDofZ_eq_YofD_on_DofZEq` proof in `WhenToTreat.lean`).

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `YofZ2_eq_factualY_on_z2Event` | `(hПү : factualZ2 Пү = zвӮӮ) вҶ’ YofZ2 zвӮӮ Пү = factualY Пү` | On `{ZвӮӮ = zвӮӮ}`, `Y(DвӮҒ,DвӮӮ(ZвӮҒ,zвӮӮ)) = Y` вҖ” single-event consistency at `ZвӮӮ` for the outcome `Y`. | **Proved** |
| `D2ofZ2_eq_factualD2_on_z2Event` | `(hПү : factualZ2 Пү = zвӮӮ) вҶ’ D2ofZ2 zвӮӮ Пү = factualD2 Пү` | On `{ZвӮӮ = zвӮӮ}`, `DвӮӮ(ZвӮҒ,zвӮӮ) = DвӮӮ` вҖ” single-event consistency at `ZвӮӮ` for `DвӮӮ`. | **Proved** |
| `eval_encouragement_eq_eval_encZ2_on_z1Event` (private) | `(hПү : factualZ1 Пү = z 0) вҶ’ v вү  ZвӮҒ вҶ’ v вү  ZвӮӮ вҶ’ P.eval (encouragementRegime z) Пү v = P.eval (encZ2Regime (z 1)) Пү v` | Shared helper: composition consistency at any `v вҲү {ZвӮҒ, ZвӮӮ}`, combining `Consistency.composition` + `Regime.ext` (encouragementRegime вҶ” sqcup of two singletons) + `As.exclusion_Z1` (for the `IntermediateAgrees` premise at ZвӮҒ). | **Proved** |
| `YofDofZ_eq_YofZ2_on_z1Event` | `(hПү : factualZ1 Пү = z 0) вҶ’ YofDofZ z Пү = YofZ2 (z 1) Пү` | On `{ZвӮҒ = z 0}`, `Y` under `encouragementRegime z` agrees with `Y` under `encZ2Regime (z 1)` вҖ” instance of the helper at `v := S.Y`. | **Proved** |
| `D2ofZ_eq_D2ofZ2_on_z1Event` | `(hПү : factualZ1 Пү = z 0) вҶ’ D2ofZ z Пү = D2ofZ2 (z 1) Пү` | Instance of the helper at `v := S.D2`. | **Proved** |
| `D1ofZ_eq_factualD1_on_z1Event` | `(hПү : factualZ1 Пү = z 0) вҶ’ D1ofZ z Пү = factualD1 Пү` | On `{ZвӮҒ = z 0}`, `DвӮҒ(z) = DвӮҒ` вҖ” combines `As.exclusion_D1` (reduces to `Regime.single ZвӮҒ (z 0)`) with `cf_eq_factual_on_event` at `ZвӮҒ`. | **Proved** |

### `DynamicLATE/Bridges.lean` вҖ” counterfactual / observable bridges

The four bridge identities of `rem:po-dynamic-late-bridge`, plus the one-sided-noncompliance corollary and two stage-2 inner-ratio sub-bridges used by the conditional bridge proofs.  Conditional bridges (`cOutcome_bridge`, `cCompliance_bridge`) are the workhorses; unconditional bridges (`outcome_bridge`, `compliance_bridge`) are short integration corollaries.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `probDofZ_eq_zero_of_not_preceq` | `(h : В¬ Preceq d z) вҶ’ P.Ој (DofZEq z d) = 0` | Under one-sided noncompliance, `D(z) вҲҲ {d \| d вүј z}` a.s.; the complement has measure zero. | **Proved** |
| `innerCondY_mul_z1_indicator` | `innerCondY z В· 1_{ZвӮҒ=z 0} =бөҗ 1_{ZвӮҒ=z 0} В· historyBundle2.condExpGiven (YofZ2 (z 1))` | Stage-2 outcome ratio bridge multiplied by `1_{ZвӮҒ=zвӮҒ}`. Single application of `condExpRatio_of_consistency_CondIndepCFBundle` with `a := z2Var`, `B := cfBundle2 (z 1)`, `C := historyBundle2`, plus `historyBundle2`-pullout of the `1_{ZвӮҒ=z 0}` factor. | **Proved** |
| `innerCondD_mul_z1_indicator` | `innerCondD z d В· 1_{ZвӮҒ=z 0} =бөҗ 1_{ZвӮҒ=z 0} В· 1_{DвӮҒ=d 0} В· historyBundle2.condExpGiven 1_{DвӮӮ(ZвӮҒ,z 1)=d 1}` | Stage-2 compliance ratio bridge multiplied by `1_{ZвӮҒ=zвӮҒ}`.  Same shape as above for the compliance event, factoring out the bundle2-measurable `1_{DвӮҒ=d 0}`. | **Proved** |
| `cOutcome_bridge` | `(hd : Preceq d z) вҶ’ historyBundle1.condExpGiven (YofDofZ z) =бөҗ cObsMean z` | `SвӮҖ`-conditional outcome bridge.  Two-stage: stage-2 via `innerCondY_mul_z1_indicator`, stage-1 via `condExpGiven_mul_of_consistency_CondIndepCFBundle` + tower + consistency rewrite at `ZвӮҒ`. | **Proved** |
| `cCompliance_bridge` | `(hd : Preceq d z) вҶ’ historyBundle1.condExpGiven (1_{DofZEq z d}) =бөҗ cObsProb z d` | `SвӮҖ`-conditional compliance bridge.  Same shape as `cOutcome_bridge`; the consistency rewrite uses `D2ofZ_eq_D2ofZ2_on_z1Event` and `D1ofZ_eq_factualD1_on_z1Event` (the latter via `As.exclusion_D1`). | **Proved** |
| `outcome_bridge` | `(hd : Preceq d z) вҶ’ вҲ« YofDofZ z = obsMean z` | Unconditional outcome bridge, derived by integrating `cOutcome_bridge` and using `вҲ« B.condExpGiven f = вҲ« f`. | **Proved** |
| `compliance_bridge` | `(hd : Preceq d z) вҶ’ (P.Ој (DofZEq z d)).toReal = obsProb z d` | Unconditional compliance bridge, derived analogously from `cCompliance_bridge` via `integral_indicator_const`. | **Proved** |

### `DynamicLATE/WhenToTreat.lean` вҖ” ratio identifications (algebraic from the bridges)

The when-to-treat / mixture Wald identifications of `prop:po-dynamic-late-when-to-treat`. Helper lemmas factor the structural composition-consistency content; the main `whenToTreat_wald` is then assembled algebraically from the bridges plus helpers.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `YofDofZ_eq_YofD_on_DofZEq` | `вҲҖбөҗ Пү, DofZ z Пү = d вҶ’ YofDofZ z Пү = YofD d Пү` | Composition consistency on the encouragement event (uses `As.consistency.composition` + `As.exclusion`) | **Proved** |
| `DofZ_zero_eq_zero` | `вҲҖбөҗ Пү, DofZ ![false,false] Пү = ![false,false]` | Under one-sided noncompliance, `D(0) = 0` a.s. | **Proved** |
| `YofDofZ_zero_ae_eq_YofD_zero` | `YofDofZ ![false,false] =бөҗ YofD ![false,false]` | A.s. `Y(D(0)) = Y(0)` | **Proved** |
| `DofZ_in_two_values` | `(hd : d вҲҲ {(1,0),(0,1)}) вҶ’ вҲҖбөҗ Пү, DofZ d Пү = d вҲЁ DofZ d Пү = 0` | Under one-sided + single-period encouragement, `D(d) вҲҲ {d, 0}` a.s. | **Proved** |
| `YofDofZ_decomposition` | `YofDofZ d =бөҗ YofD d В· 1_{D(d)=d} + YofD 0 В· 1_{D(d)=0}` | Two-piece pointwise decomposition combining `YofDofZ_eq_YofD_on_DofZEq` + `DofZ_in_two_values` | **Proved** |
| `int_outcome_difference_identity` | `вҲ« YofDofZ d - вҲ« YofDofZ 0 = вҲ«_{D(d)=d} (Y(d) - Y(0)) dОј` | Numerator rewrite from the decomposition + `YofDofZ_zero_ae_eq_YofD_zero` | **Proved** |
| `whenToTreat_wald` | `(hd : d вҲҲ {(1,0),(0,1)}) вҶ’ П„_d = (obsMean d - obsMean 0) / obsProb d d` | **Main when-to-treat identification (prop:po-dynamic-late-when-to-treat).** Combines the outcome / compliance bridges with `int_outcome_difference_identity`. | **Proved** |
| `mixtureLATE_wald` | `ОІ_z = (obsMean z - obsMean 0) / (1 - obsProb z 0)` | **Main mixture identification, totalized at `z = 0` by Lean division.** | **Proved** |
| `cWhenToTreat_wald` | `(hd : d вҲҲ {(1,0),(0,1)}) вҶ’ cП„_d =бөҗ (cObsMean d - cObsMean 0) / cObsProb d d` | `SвӮҖ`-conditional when-to-treat ratio | **Proved** |
| `cMixtureLATE_wald` | `cОІ_z =бөҗ (cObsMean z - cObsMean 0) / (1 - cObsProb z 0)` | `SвӮҖ`-conditional mixture ratio, totalized at `z = 0` by Lean division | **Proved** |

**Status as of 2026-04-27 redesign.** The bridges are refactored around a per-stage workhorse (in `PO/Conditioning/EventCondExpBundle.lean`) and a layer of structural pointwise consistency rewrites (in `DynamicLATE/Consistency.lean`).  The Dynamic LATE files in this section typecheck with their local bridge and ratio proofs filled; remaining proof debt, if any, is inherited only from broader project-wide Mathlib/measure-theory stubs already documented elsewhere.

**Setup.lean** also gained:
* `exclusion` field on `Assumptions` (primitive-process clause `Y(D, S)`).
* `exclusion_D1` field on `Assumptions` (primitive-process clause `DвӮҒ(ZвӮҒ, SвӮҖ)`: `DвӮҒ` does not depend on `ZвӮӮ`); needed to identify `DвӮҒ(z)` with the factual `DвӮҒ` on the event `{ZвӮҒ = z 0}` in the conditional compliance bridge.
* Helpers `encouragementRegime_disjoint_treatmentRegime` and `encTreatRegime`.

---

## 9g. `PO/ID/Exact/ATE.lean` вҖ” Backdoor ATE Identification Theorem (PO framework)

Formalizes the standard backdoor-adjustment identification of the average treatment effect at the potential-outcome level. Mirrors the structure of `LATE.lean` but uses Пғ-algebra conditional expectations (instead of event-based `eventCondExp`) because the adjustment variable `X` is continuous. The covariate type `Оі` is an arbitrary measurable space, so the file simultaneously handles discrete/continuous/vector-valued `X` (e.g. `Оі := в„қвҒҝ`).

Core identity (CATE level):

    Ој[Y(d) | Пғ(X)]  =бөҗ[Ој]  Ој[Y В· 1_{D=d} | Пғ(X)] / P[D=d | Пғ(X)].

Integrated corollary: `ATE = adjustedATE`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POBackdoorSystem P Оі` | `structure { D, Y, Xvar, hDbool, hYreal, distinct }` | Backdoor subsystem: binary treatment `D`, real outcome `Y`, covariate `POVar P Оі` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.{dVar, yVar, xVar}` | `POVar P Bool` / `POVar P в„қ` / `POVar P Оі` | `POVar` wrappers around `D`, `Y`, `X` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.YofD S d` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Counterfactual outcome `Y(d) := yVar.cfUnder dVar d` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.{factualD, factualY, factualX}` | `P.О© вҶ’ Bool` / `в„қ` / `Оі` | Factual treatment / outcome / covariate | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.measurable_{YofD, factualD, factualY, factualX}` | `Measurable вҖҰ` | Measurability of the counterfactual/factual variables (one-line delegations) | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.sigmaX` | `MeasurableSpace P.О©` | Пғ-algebra generated by `factualX` (`MeasurableSpace.comap factualX _`) | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.sigmaX_le` | `sigmaX вүӨ P.measО©` | Пғ(X) is a sub-Пғ-algebra of the ambient one | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.yUnderD S d` | `RegimedVar P в„қ` | Regimed form of `Y(d)` used to populate `cfBundle` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.cfBundle` | `POCFBundle P` | Bundle `(Y(1), Y(0))` built via `POCFBundle.cons`; target of the unconfoundedness hypothesis | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.propScore S d` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Propensity score `P[D=d | Пғ(X)] := Ој[dVar.indicator d | sigmaX]` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.CATE S d` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Conditional ATE `Ој[Y(d) | Пғ(X)]` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.ATE` | `в„қ` | `вҲ« (Y(1) - Y(0)) вҲӮОј` вҖ” average treatment effect | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.adjustedCE S d` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Observable adjusted-outcome functional `Ој[Y В· 1_{D=d} | Пғ(X)] / propScore d` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.adjustedATE` | `в„қ` | `вҲ« (adjustedCE 1 - adjustedCE 0) вҲӮОј` вҖ” identified side of ATE | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.Assumptions S` | `structure { consistency, unconfoundedness, overlap, integrable_{Y1,Y0,factualY} }` | Backdoor assumptions (PO level); `unconfoundedness : P.CondIndepCF (ofFactual dVar) cfBundle (ofFactual xVar) P.Ој`; **pointwise** overlap `вҲҖбөҗ Пү, 0 < propScore 1 Пү вҲ§ propScore 1 Пү < 1` (relaxed from the uniform-`c` strong-overlap form to bare positivity, mirroring DTR) | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.cate_backdoor` | `S.CATE d =бөҗ[P.Ој] S.adjustedCE d` | CATE-level backdoor adjustment identity; reduces to (a) projecting `hA.unconfoundedness` onto the `d`-th bundle coord via `CondIndepCF.project` and (b) applying `Mathlib.CondIndep.condExp_mul_of_condIndep`; `hne` (nonzero propScore at both `d=true/false`) closed via pointwise overlap вҖ” `d=true` directly, `d=false` via `propScore false = 1 - propScore true` from the indicator sum identity. Uses `POVar.indicator` / `POVar.factual_mul_indicator_eq_cfUnder_mul_indicator_fn` throughout | **Proved** (conditional on `condExp_mul_of_condIndep` and `condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep` Mathlib stubs) |
| `POBackdoorSystem.ate_backdoor` | `S.ATE = S.adjustedATE` | Integrated ATE identification; one-line call to `POVar.integral_sub_eq_integral_sub_of_condExpGiven_ae_eq` fed by `cate_backdoor` at `d = true, false` | **Proved** (conditional on `cate_backdoor`) |
| `POBackdoorSystem.propScore_ne_of_overlap` | `(hov : вҲҖбөҗ Пү, 0 < propScore true Пү вҲ§ propScore true Пү < 1) (d) вҶ’ вҲҖбөҗ Пү, propScore d Пү вү  0` | Per-arm non-vanishing of the propensity from the (two-sided) **overlap predicate alone** (no full `Assumptions`); reusable by the estimation-layer constructors | **Proved** |

### Regression-adjustment: the adjustment functional is an observable regression

Third beat of the identification story (after `cate_backdoor`, `ate_backdoor`): `adjustedCE d` вҖ” the Пғ(X)-stratified adjustment functional вҖ” equals the **observable outcome regression** `E[Y | D=d, X]`, a functional of the observed law of `(X,D,Y)` only (overlap, NO unconfoundedness). Certifies that the back-door nuisance `Ој` is a genuine regression problem (the one `ML/Causal/RegressionBridge.lean` solves). Heavy step factored into the reusable Mathlib kernel `condExp_setIndicator_condExp_of_le` (В§10k').

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POBackdoorSystem.factualDX` / `measurable_factualDX` | `P.О© вҶ’ Bool Г— Оі` | Factual `(D, X)` pair `Пү вҶҰ (factualD Пү, factualX Пү)` and its measurability | **Defined**/**Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.sigmaDX` / `sigmaDX_le` / `sigmaX_le_sigmaDX` | `MeasurableSpace P.О©` | Пғ(D,X) `:= comap factualDX`; sub-Пғ-algebra of ambient; and `Пғ(X) вүӨ Пғ(D,X)` (tower) | **Defined**/**Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.outcomeReg` / `stronglyMeasurable_outcomeReg` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Outcome regression `E[Y | D,X] := Ој[factualY | Пғ(D,X)]` (observable) + its Пғ(D,X)-strong-measurability | **Defined**/**Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.exists_regFn` / `regFn` / `measurable_regFn` / `outcomeReg_eq_regFn` | `Bool Г— Оі вҶ’ в„қ` | DoobвҖ“Dynkin lift (`Measurable.exists_eq_measurable_comp`) of `outcomeReg` to the value-space regression function `regFn (d,x) = E[Y|D=d,X=x]`, with `outcomeReg = regFn вҲҳ factualDX` | **Defined**/**Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.exists_propScoreLift` / `eLift` / `measurable_eLift` / `propScore_true_eq_eLift` | `Оі вҶ’ в„қ` | DoobвҖ“Dynkin lift of `propScore true` to the value-space propensity `eLift x` (`E[D|X=x]`), with `propScore true = eLift вҲҳ factualX` | **Defined**/**Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.regression_adjustment` | `(d) (hY : Integrable factualY) (h_ne : вҲҖбөҗ Пү, propScore d Пү вү  0) вҶ’ adjustedCE d =бөҗ (fun Пү => regFn (d, factualX Пү))` | **Regression-adjustment identification (observable).** `adjustedCE d =бөҗ E[Y|D=d,X]`; overlap-only, no unconfoundedness. Proof: `condExpRatio_eq_of_mul` вҶ’ Mathlib kernel `condExp_setIndicator_condExp_of_le` (Пғ(X)вҶ’Пғ(D,X) tower) вҶ’ arm collapse on `{D=d}` вҶ’ Пғ(X) pull-out | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.regression_adjustment_of_assumptions` | `(hA : Assumptions) (d) вҶ’ adjustedCE d =бөҗ (fun Пү => regFn (d, factualX Пү))` | Packaged wrapper: discharges `Integrable factualY` (via `Assumptions.integrable_factualY`) and overlap (via `propScore_ne_of_overlap`) from `hA` | **Proved** |

## 9g'. `PO/ID/Exact/ATT.lean` вҖ” Backdoor ATT Identification Theorem (PO framework)

Mirrors `PO/ID/Exact/ATE.lean` but identifies the **average treatment effect on the treated** (ATT). Reuses `POBackdoorSystem` (and its `Assumptions`/`adjustedCE`/`propScore`/`CATE`) verbatim. Adds the population-treated-fraction `propTreated`, the PO-level `ATT = E[AВ·(Y(1)вҲ’Y(0))] / ПҖ_T`, the observable outcome-regression form `adjustedATT = E[AВ·(ОјвӮҒ(X)вҲ’ОјвӮҖ(X))] / ПҖ_T`, an extended assumption bundle `ATTAssumptions` (adds `0 < propTreated`), and the AIPW corollary at the Пғ(X) representative level. The two main theorems delegate the heavy lifting to private helpers:

* **Outcome-regression numerator equality** (per arm `d`): `вҲ« A В· Y(d) dОј = вҲ« A В· adjustedCE d dОј` вҖ” by tower over Пғ(X) and the unconfoundedness factorization `Ој[AВ·Y(d)|Пғ(X)] = Ој[A|Пғ(X)] В· Ој[Y(d)|Пғ(X)] = e(X)В·CATE d`, then `cate_backdoor` to swap `CATE d вҶҰ adjustedCE d`. The Пғ(X)-measurable side does the same tower step on the OR side.
* **AIPW IPW-correction vanishing**: `вҲ« (1вҲ’A) В· (e/(1вҲ’e)) В· (Y вҲ’ adjustedCE false) dОј = 0` вҖ” pull `e/(1вҲ’e)` (Пғ(X)-measurable) out of `Ој[В·|Пғ(X)]`, rewrite `(1вҲ’A)В·Y = (1вҲ’A)В·Y(false)` via consistency, factor by unconfoundedness, then collapse `(1вҲ’A)В·Y(false) вҲ’ (1вҲ’A)В·adjustedCE false` because `Ој[Y(false)|Пғ(X)] =бөҗ adjustedCE false`.
* **Treated-arm consistency rewrite**: `вҲ« AВ·(Y вҲ’ adjustedCE false) dОј = вҲ« AВ·(adjustedCE true вҲ’ adjustedCE false) dОј` вҖ” apply the OR numerator equality at `d = true` to the `AВ·Y` piece (using `Y = AВ·Y(1) + (1вҲ’A)В·Y(0)` consistency-collapsed to `AВ·Y = AВ·Y(1)` on the treated set).

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POBackdoorSystem.propTreated S` | `в„қ` | Marginal treatment probability `ПҖ_T = E[1_{D=1}] = вҲ« dVar.indicator true dОј` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.ATT S` | `в„қ` | PO-level ATT `(вҲ« A В· (Y(true) вҲ’ Y(false)) dОј) / ПҖ_T` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.adjustedATT S` | `в„қ` | Observable outcome-regression form `(вҲ« A В· (adjustedCE true вҲ’ adjustedCE false) dОј) / ПҖ_T` | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.ATTAssumptions S` | `structure extends Assumptions S { propTreated_pos }` | Extended bundle: `Assumptions` + `0 < propTreated`. The `< 1` half of overlap (already in `Assumptions.overlap`) suffices for the AIPW corollary | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.propScore_false_ae` | `S.propScore false =бөҗ[Ој] (1 - S.propScore true)` | Indicator-pair sum identity transported through `Ој[В·|Пғ(X)]` (private) | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.{stronglyMeasurable_adjustedCE_comap, measurable_adjustedCE, integrable_adjustedCE}` | various | Пғ(X)-strong-measurability, ambient measurability, and a.e. integrability of `adjustedCE d` (private; integrability via `cate_backdoor` transport from `CATE d = condExpGiven Y(d)`) | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.att_numerator_arm` | `(hA : Assumptions S) (d) вҶ’ вҲ« A В· Y(d) dОј = вҲ« A В· adjustedCE d dОј` | Per-arm OR numerator equality (private); fed by tower + `condExp_mul_of_condIndep` + `cate_backdoor` | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.propScore_ne_zero` | `(hA : Assumptions) (d) вҶ’ вҲҖбөҗ Пү, propScore d Пү вү  0` | Both-arm non-vanishing of propensity from `Assumptions.overlap` (mirrors the ATE helper) (private) | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.condExp_indicator_residual_adjusted_zero` | `Ој[(1вҲ’A) В· (Y вҲ’ adjustedCE false) | Пғ(X)] =бөҗ 0` | Residual zero-conditional-mean for the `A=0` arm using `adjustedCE false` (private) | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.weighted_false_residual_integral_zero` | `вҲ« (1вҲ’A) В· (e/(1вҲ’e)) В· (Y вҲ’ adjustedCE false) dОј = 0` (under `hIPW` integrability + `Assumptions`) | IPW-correction vanishing (private) | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.treated_factual_residual_integral_eq_adjusted` | `вҲ« AВ·(Y вҲ’ adjustedCE false) dОј = вҲ« AВ·(adjustedCE true вҲ’ adjustedCE false) dОј` | Treated-arm consistency rewrite (private) | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.ATT_eq_adjustedATT` | `(hA : ATTAssumptions S) вҶ’ S.ATT = S.adjustedATT` | **Main ATT identification.** Reduces to numerator equality via `congr 1` (denominator `propTreated > 0`) and applies `att_numerator_arm` at `d = true, false` | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.adjustedATT_eq_aipwForm` | `(hA : ATTAssumptions S) (hIPW : Integrable IPW-correction) вҶ’ S.adjustedATT = AIPW-form numerator / propTreated` | **AIPW corollary.** AIPW form uses the Пғ(X)-measurable representatives `adjustedCE false` (for `ОјвӮҖ(X)`) and `propScore true` (for `e(X)`). The extra `hIPW` integrability hypothesis is honest about the fact that `e/(1вҲ’e)` is unbounded under bare-positivity overlap; this is the standard registered hypothesis for the Hahn (1998) ATT IF | **Proved** |

---

## 9g''. `PO/ID/Exact/QTE/QuantileEffect.lean` вҖ” Backdoor Quantile Treatment Effect (Firpo 2007)

Marginal quantile treatment effect `QTE(П„) = F_{Y(1)}вҒ»В№(П„) вҲ’ F_{Y(0)}вҒ»В№(П„)`
under Firpo (2007) ignorability: unconfoundedness + common support (`0 < e_d < 1`,
in `Assumptions`; strict overlap is *not* an identification assumption). Reuses
`POBackdoorSystem` (binary `D`, real `Y`, covariate `X`) and its `Assumptions`
from В§9g; covariates enter only in identification, not the estimand (standard
marginal QTE). The quantile layer makes QTE a *functional of the two
potential-outcome laws*: once those laws are identified by observable measures,
QTE is the difference of their quantiles.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
The distributional engine (`ipwDensity`, `ipwLaw`, `cfUnderLaw_eq_ipwLaw`) lives
in `DistributionalBackdoor.lean` (В§9g''b) and is imported here; this file is the quantile
layer on top.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POBackdoorSystem.qtdQuantile S d Ој П„` | `в„қ` | `П„`-quantile of `Y(d)` (`yVar.cfUnderQuantile dVar d`). | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.qte S Ој П„` | `в„қ` | QTE estimand `F_{Y(1)}вҒ»В№(П„) вҲ’ F_{Y(0)}вҒ»В№(П„)`. | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.qtdQuantile_eq_quantile_cfUnderLaw` | `= Stat.quantile (cfUnderLaw вҖҰ) П„` | Quantile of `Y(d)` = quantile of its law. | `rfl` |
| `POBackdoorSystem.qte_eq_of_law_eq` | `cfUnderLaw вҖҰ true = ОҪвӮҒ вҶ’ cfUnderLaw вҖҰ false = ОҪвӮҖ вҶ’ qte = quantile ОҪвӮҒ П„ вҲ’ quantile ОҪвӮҖ П„` | **QTE as a functional of the identified laws** вҖ” the payoff of the quantile layer; reduces QTE identification to distributional identification. | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.qte_backdoor` | `qte P.Ој П„ = quantile (ipwLaw 1) П„ вҲ’ quantile (ipwLaw 0) П„` | Backdoor QTE identification; chains `qte_eq_of_law_eq` with the proven `cfUnderLaw_eq_ipwLaw`. | **Proved** |

## 9g''b. `PO/ID/Exact/QTE/DistributionalBackdoor.lean` вҖ” Distributional backdoor (Firpo 2007)

Lifts the mean-level backdoor (`ate_backdoor`/`cate_backdoor`, В§9g) to the whole
law of `Y(d)`: under Firpo ignorability (unconfoundedness + bare common support
`0 < e_d`), `Law(Y(d))` equals the observable inverse-probability-weighting law.
This is the engine behind В§9g'' QTE identification.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POBackdoorSystem.ipwDensity S d` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | IPW density `1_{D=d} / e_d(X)`. | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.ipwLaw S d Ој` | `Measure в„қ` | Observable IPW law: `factualY` pushed through `(1_{D=d}/e_d)В·Ој`. | **Defined** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.propScore_pos` | `Assumptions вҶ’ вҲҖбөҗ Пү, 0 < propScore d Пү` | Both arms have a.e.-positive propensity score (bare overlap; false arm via `e_true + e_false = 1`). | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.integral_mul_indicator_eq_integral_mul_propScore` | `вҲ« hВ·1_{D=d} = вҲ« hВ·e_d` (ПғX-meas `h`) | Conditional-expectation pull-out of the indicator against a Пғ(X)-measurable factor. | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.ipwDensity_integrable` | `Assumptions вҶ’ Integrable (ipwDensity d)` | IPW weight integrable under bare overlap, via a truncation / monotone-convergence argument (`вҲ« 1_{D=d}/e_d = 1`, no uniform lower bound on `e_d`). | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.integral_comp_YofD_eq` | `вҲ« g(Y(d)) = вҲ« g(Y)В·1_{D=d}/e_d` (bounded meas `g`) | **Core distributional identity** вҖ” the `g`-transform of `cate_backdoor`: consistency on `{D=d}`, `Y(d) вҹӮ DвҲЈПғX` via `condExp_mul_of_condIndep`, then pull `1/e_d` out and cancel. | **Proved** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.cfUnderLaw_eq_ipwLaw` | `cfUnderLaw вҖҰ d P.Ој = ipwLaw d P.Ој` | **Distributional backdoor** (Firpo): law of `Y(d)` = observable IPW law. Assembled via `Measure.ext` from `integral_comp_YofD_eq` at `g = 1_s`, bridging `Measure.map`/`withDensity` to the set lintegral. | **Proved** |

## 9g'''. `PO/ID/Exact/PartialLinear/{Setup,Identification}.lean` вҖ” Partially Linear Model (continuous treatment, PO framework)

The partially linear regression (PLR) model `Y = g(X) + ОёВ·D + noise` as a causal
model under the **standard backdoor PO framework with a real-valued (continuous)
treatment** `D вҲҲ в„қ`. `Setup.lean` builds the continuous-treatment substrate and the
homogeneous structural model; `Identification.lean` identifies the structural slope
`Оё` as the Robinson partialling-out estimand (the causal bridge). All declarations
**proved** (sorry-free).

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `POPartialLinearSystem` | structure | Continuous-treatment backdoor subsystem: real treatment node `D`, real outcome `Y`, covariate `X`, value-space equivs, node distinctness. Mirrors `POBackdoorSystem` with `D : в„қ`. |
| `POPartialLinearSystem.YofD d` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | The potential outcome `Y(d)` under dose `d : в„қ` (`yVar.cfUnder dVar d`). |
| `POPartialLinearSystem.sigmaX` / `sigmaXD` | `MeasurableSpace P.О©` | Пғ-algebra generated by the covariate, resp. by the covariate and treatment jointly; `sigmaX_le_sigmaXD` records the inclusion. |
| `POPartialLinearModel` | structure (extends system) | Adds the homogeneous linear dose-response `Y(d) = b(X)+ОёВ·d+U`, the backdoor mean-independence `E[UвҲЈПғ(X,D)]=0`, and consistency. |
| `POPartialLinearModel.factualY_eq` | `Y =бөҗ b(X)+ОёВ·D+U` | Observed-data form of the structural model, from consistency + the dose-response restriction. |
| `POPartialLinearModel.causal_homogeneity` | `Y(d)вҲ’Y(d') =бөҗ ОёВ·(dвҲ’d')` | The causal reading: `Оё` is the constant per-unit treatment effect. |
| `POPartialLinearModel.mReg` / `lReg` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Treatment / outcome regressions on the covariate, `E[DвҲЈПғX]` and `E[YвҲЈПғX]`. |
| `POPartialLinearModel.condExp_U_sigmaX` | `E[UвҲЈПғX] =бөҗ 0` | The structural error has zero mean given the covariate (backdoor + tower). |
| `POPartialLinearModel.condExp_resid_sigmaX` | `E[DвҲ’mвӮҖ(X)вҲЈПғX] =бөҗ 0` | The treatment residual is conditionally mean-zero. |
| `POPartialLinearModel.integral_U_resid` | `E[UВ·(DвҲ’mвӮҖ(X))] = 0` | Orthogonality of the structural error to the treatment residual (needs `Integrable U`). |
| `POPartialLinearModel.lReg_eq` | `в„“вӮҖ(X) =бөҗ b(X)+ОёВ·mвӮҖ(X)` | Decomposition of the outcome regression. |
| `POPartialLinearModel.robinson_estimand_eq_theta` | `E[(YвҲ’в„“вӮҖ)(DвҲ’mвӮҖ)] / E[(DвҲ’mвӮҖ)ВІ] = Оё` | **The causal bridge**: the Robinson partialling-out estimand equals the structural slope, given residual treatment variation `E[(DвҲ’mвӮҖ)ВІ]вү 0`. |

## 9h. `PO/ID/Exact/DTR/` вҖ” Sequential Backdoor Identification (Dynamic Treatment Regime, general `n`)

Formalizes `prop:po-dynamic-backdoor` from `Basic Concepts.tex` (subsection
`subsec:po-dynamic-regime`) for arbitrary horizon `n вүҘ 1`, in the bare
potential-outcome framework.  Reuses the bundle-conditioned conditional
expectation machinery from `PO/Conditioning/Bundle.lean`.

The identification target is the **iterated-conditional-expectation form**

    (historyBundle 0).condExpGiven (Y_of dbar)  =бөҗ[Ој]  innerReg dbar (n - 1)

where `innerReg dbar j` is a recursively-defined CE-ratio chain over `n`
stages (innermost level `j = 0` conditions on the full history
`historyBundle (n - 1) = (S 0, D 0, вҖҰ, S (n - 1))`; outermost level
`j = n - 1` conditions on `historyBundle 0 = (S 0,)`).  Integrated form:
`E[Y(dbar)] = вҲ« innerReg dbar (n - 1) вҲӮОј`.

**Treatment-space and state-space conventions.**  One homogeneous
treatment space `Оҙ : Type` (with `[MeasurableSpace Оҙ] [MeasurableSingletonClass Оҙ]`)
shared by all stages, and per-stage state types `Оі : Fin n вҶ’ Type`.  A
treatment sequence is `dbar : Fin n вҶ’ Оҙ`.  The `n = 2, Оҙ = Bool`
specialization recovers the legacy two-stage statement (with
`dbar 0 = dвӮҒ` and `dbar 1 = dвӮӮ`).

**Per-sequence sequential exchangeability.**  Sequential exchangeability is
quantified per `dbar` (mirroring `def:po-dynamic-assumptions` literally),
avoiding the `Fin (|Оҙ|^n)`-wide counterfactual bundle that the n=2
prototype used.  The conditioning Пғ-algebra at stage `k` is the full
Пғ-algebra of `historyBundle k` (the `{DМ„_{k-1} = dМ„_{k-1}}` qualifier from
the tex is dropped per the agreed simplification).

The code is split into five files: Setup / Helpers / Induction /
StrongCancellation / Main.  The dedicated `StrongCancellation.lean` file
houses the unified inductive predicate that merges the cancellation
identity with integrability of `innerReg`, needed under the (relaxed)
*pointwise* overlap hypothesis.

### `DTR/Setup.lean` вҖ” Data layer (structure, regimes, bundles, assumptions, observable functionals)

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `PODTRSystem P n Оҙ Оі` | `structure { S, D, Y, hDmeas, hYreal, distinctSS, distinctDD, distinctSD, distinctSY, distinctDY }` | General-`n` DTR subsystem: state covariates `S : вҲҖ k : Fin n, POVar P (Оі k)`, treatments `D : Fin n вҶ’ P.V` with `hDmeas k : P.X (D k) вүғбөҗ Оҙ`, real outcome `Y` with `hYreal : P.X Y вүғбөҗ в„қ`, and five distinctness fields covering the `2n + 1` declared variables (state-state injectivity, treatment-treatment injectivity, S-D, S-Y, D-Y disjointness) | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.dVar S k` | `POVar P Оҙ` | `POVar` wrapper around `S.D k`: `вҹЁS.D k, S.hDmeas kвҹ©` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.yVar S` | `POVar P в„қ` | `POVar` wrapper around `S.Y`: `вҹЁS.Y, S.hYrealвҹ©` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.regimeTarget S k` | `Finset P.V` | The set `{D 0, вҖҰ, D (k-1)}` (clamped if `k > n`); the `target` of `regimeUpTo dbar k` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.regimeTarget_mem_iff` | вҖ” | `v вҲҲ regimeTarget k вҶ” вҲғ i : Fin n, i.val < k вҲ§ v = S.D i` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.regimeUpToAux S dbar k h` | `{ r : Regime P.V P.X // r.target = S.regimeTarget k }` | Subtype-bundled regime carrying its target proof; recursion on `k` builds via `Regime.sqcup` of one fresh `Regime.single (S.D вҹЁk, _вҹ©) _` and the smaller regime, with disjointness discharged from `S.distinctDD` and the carried target equation | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.regimeUpTo S dbar k h` | `Regime P.V P.X` | The regime `{D 0 вҶҗ dbar 0, вҖҰ, D (k-1) вҶҗ dbar (k-1)}`; thin `.1` projection of `regimeUpToAux` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.regimeUpTo_target_eq` | `(S.regimeUpTo dbar k h).target = S.regimeTarget k` | `.2` projection from the subtype bundle | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.regime S dbar` | `Regime P.V P.X` | The full-stage regime `regimeUpTo dbar n (le_refl n)` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.Y_of S dbar` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Counterfactual outcome `Y(dbar) := S.yVar.cf (S.regime dbar)` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.S_of S dbar k` | `P.О© вҶ’ Оі k` | Counterfactual stage-`k` state under the first `k.val` interventions: `(S.S k).cf (S.regimeUpTo dbar k.val _)` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.{factualD k, factualY, factualS k}` | `P.О© вҶ’ Оҙ` / `в„қ` / `Оі k` | Factual treatments / outcome / states (each variable's `.factual`) | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.measurable_*` | вҖ” | One-liner measurability of the counterfactual / factual maps above | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.indD S dbar k` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Recursive joint indicator `1_{D 0 = dbar 0 вҲ§ вҖҰ вҲ§ D (k-1) = dbar (k-1)}`: `indD 0 = 1`, `indD (k+1) = indD k В· (S.dVar вҹЁk, _вҹ©).indicator (dbar вҹЁk, _вҹ©)` (when `k < n`) | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.measurable_indD` | `Measurable (S.indD dbar k)` | Measurability of the joint indicator (induction on `k`) | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.historyBundle S k h` | `POCFBundle P` (requires `k < n`) | History conditioning bundle at stage `k`: cons-list `(S k, D (k-1), S (k-1), D (k-2), вҖҰ, S 0)`.  At `k = 0` it is `(S 0,)`; at general `k` it conses `S k` and `D (k-1)` on top of `historyBundle (k - 1)`.  Matches the legacy two-stage convention (`historyBundle 0 = old historyBundleвӮҒ`, `historyBundle 1 = old historyBundleвӮӮ`). | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.cfYBundle S dbar` | `POCFBundle P` | Singleton CF bundle `[Y(dbar)]` used as the subject of per-sequence sequential exchangeability | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.Assumptions S` | `structure { consistency, exch, overlap, integrable_Y, integrable_factualY }` | Sequential backdoor assumptions (PO level, general `n`): consistency, **per-sequence** sequential exchangeability `вҲҖ dbar, вҲҖ k : Fin n, P.CondIndepCFBundle (RegimedVar.ofFactual (S.dVar k)) (S.cfYBundle dbar) (S.historyBundle k.val k.isLt) P.Ој`, **pointwise** overlap `вҲҖ dbar, вҲҖ k, вҲҖбөҗ Пү, 0 < (S.historyBundle k.val k.isLt).condExpGiven ((S.dVar k).indicator (dbar k)) P.Ој Пү` (relaxed from `вҲғ c > 0, c < condExpGiven ...` to pointwise positivity), integrability of every `Y(dbar)` and `factualY` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.innerReg S dbar j` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Recursive iterated-CE-ratio chain.  `j = 0` is the innermost: `(historyBundle (n-1)).condExpGiven (factualY В· indD n) / condExpGiven (indD n)`.  `j + 1` adds one outer CE-ratio at `historyBundle (n - j - 2)` with extra factor `(S.dVar вҹЁn - j - 2, _вҹ©).indicator (dbar вҹЁn - j - 2, _вҹ©)`.  For `n = 0`, returns `0`. | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.dtrEffect S dbar` | `в„қ` | Mean potential outcome `E[Y(dbar)] := вҲ« Y_of dbar вҲӮP.Ој` | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.adjustedDtr S dbar` | `в„қ` | Integrated adjusted DTR functional `вҲ« innerReg dbar (n - 1) вҲӮP.Ој` (observable side); `0` when `n = 0` | **Defined** |

### `DTR/Helpers.lean` вҖ” Auxiliary measurability, integrability, Пғ-algebra-comparison lemmas

These helpers are not exposed publicly beyond the proofs in
`DTR/Induction.lean` and `DTR/Main.lean`, but cannot be `private` since
they are split across files.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `PODTRSystem.hb_step_proj S k h` | `(вҲҖ i, (historyBundle (k+1) h).type i) вҶ’ вҲҖ j, (historyBundle k _).type j` | One-step projection from the stage-`(k+1)` joint value to the stage-`k` joint value (forgets the freshly-consed `(S (k+1), D k)` coordinates) | **Defined** |
| `PODTRSystem.measurable_hb_step_proj` | `Measurable (S.hb_step_proj k h)` | Measurability of the projection | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.hb_jointValue_step_eq` | `(historyBundle k _).jointValue = hb_step_proj k h вҲҳ (historyBundle (k+1) h).jointValue` | Factorisation of the smaller history's joint value through the projection | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.historyBundle_sigma_mono_step` | `(historyBundle k _).sigma вүӨ (historyBundle (k+1) h).sigma` | One-step Пғ-algebra inclusion; needed for the `Пғ_k вҶ’ Пғ_{k+1}` tower in `cdtr_step` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.historyBundle_sigma_mono` | `(historyBundle j (lt_of_le_of_lt hjk hk)).sigma вүӨ (historyBundle k hk).sigma` for `j вүӨ k` | Iterated Пғ-algebra monotonicity | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.indD_eq_zero_or_one` | `вҲҖ k Пү, S.indD dbar k Пү = 0 вҲЁ S.indD dbar k Пү = 1` | Pointwise: the joint indicator is 0/1-valued; recursion on `k` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.indD_integrable` | `Integrable (S.indD dbar k) P.Ој` | `1_{D 0 = dbar 0 вҲ§ вҖҰ}` integrable on a finite measure (bounded by 1) | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.indD_eq_indicator_event` | `S.indD dbar k = ({Пү \| вҲҖ i : Fin n, i.val < k вҶ’ S.factualD i Пү = dbar i}).indicator (fun _ вҶҰ 1)` | Bridge from the recursive `if`-form to the set-indicator form on the agreement event; required to apply `factual_mul_indicator_eq_cf_mul_indicator` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.indD_factor_split` | `S.indD dbar (k+1) = fun Пү => S.indD dbar k Пү * (S.dVar вҹЁk, hkвҹ©).indicator (dbar вҹЁk, hkвҹ©) Пү` | Pointwise factorisation `indD (k+1) = indD k В· (single-stage indicator)` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.measurable_factualS_sigma_history` | `Measurable[(S.historyBundle m hm).sigma] (S.factualS k')` for `k'.val вүӨ m` | `S k'` lives in the stage-`m` history bundle when `k' вүӨ m`; coordinate-projection witness | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.measurable_factualD_sigma_history` | `Measurable[(S.historyBundle m hm).sigma] (S.factualD k')` for `k'.val < m` | `D k'` lives in the stage-`m` history bundle when `k' < m` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.stronglyMeasurable_indicator_dVar_sigma_history` | `StronglyMeasurable[(S.historyBundle m hm).sigma] ((S.dVar k').indicator x)` for `k'.val < m` | Real-valued indicator pull-out hypothesis used in `cdtr_step` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.stronglyMeasurable_indD_sigma_history` | `StronglyMeasurable[(S.historyBundle m hm).sigma] (S.indD dbar m')` for `m' вүӨ m` | The joint indicator at depth `m'` is strongly measurable w.r.t. the stage-`m` history when `m' вүӨ m` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.factualAgrees_regimeUpTo` | `(вҲҖ i : Fin n, i.val < k вҶ’ S.factualD i Пү = dbar i) вҶ’ P.FactualAgrees (S.regimeUpTo dbar k h) Пү` | Inductive consistency: Пү agrees with the partial regime when the first `k` factual treatments match `dbar`; recursion mirrors `regimeUpTo` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.factualAgrees_regime` | `вҲҖ Пү вҲҲ {Пү \| вҲҖ i : Fin n, S.factualD i Пү = dbar i}, P.FactualAgrees (S.regime dbar) Пү` | Multi-target consistency hypothesis; corollary of `factualAgrees_regimeUpTo` at `k = n` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.indD_mul_Y_integrable` | `Integrable (fun Пү => S.indD dbar k Пү * S.Y_of dbar Пү) P.Ој` (given `Integrable (S.Y_of dbar)`) | Bound by `\|Y_of dbar\|`; needed by step_3-style pull-outs | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.measurable_innerReg` | `Measurable (S.innerReg dbar j)` | Measurability of `innerReg` at every depth (recursion on `j`) | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.yVar_notMem_regime` | `S.yVar.v вҲү (S.regime dbar).target` | `Y` is not a target of the full regime (which only names the `D` variables); discharged via `regimeUpTo_target_eq` and `distinctDY` | **Proved** |

(Integrability of `innerReg dbar j` is now in `DTR/StrongCancellation.lean`,
derived from the strengthened cancellation identity rather than from a
direct uniform-`c` bound.)

### `DTR/Induction.lean` вҖ” Base case and inductive step

The backward-induction identity (вҳ… at depth `j`) is

    innerReg dbar j В· indD dbar (n-1-j)
      =бөҗ[Ој]
    indD dbar (n-1-j) В· (historyBundle (n-1-j)).condExpGiven (Y_of dbar)

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `PODTRSystem.cdtr_base` | `[StandardBorelSpace P.О©] [IsFiniteMeasure P.Ој]`, `S.Assumptions`, `(dbar : Fin n вҶ’ Оҙ)`, `0 < n` вҶ’ (вҳ… at `j = 0`) | **Innermost-stage cancellation** (`j = 0`).  Generalizes `step_1` of the legacy n=2 proof.  Chain: consistency rewrite `factualY В· indD n =бөҗ Y_of В· indD n` (via `indD_eq_indicator_event` + `factualAgrees_regime` + `POVar.factual_mul_indicator_eq_cf_mul_indicator` + `yVar_notMem_regime`); factorisation `indD n = indD (n-1) В· (dVar вҹЁn-1вҹ©).indicator` via `indD_factor_split`; pull-out of `indD (n-1)` from the numerator condExp (Пғ-strongly-measurable via `stronglyMeasurable_indD_sigma_history`); stage-`(n-1)` exchangeability via `CondIndepCFBundle.project` + `condExp_mul_of_condIndep`; pointwise cancellation case-splitting on `indD_eq_zero_or_one`, with overlap_{n-1} discharging the nonzero branch | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.cdtr_step` | `[StandardBorelSpace P.О©] [IsFiniteMeasure P.Ој]`, `S.Assumptions`, `(dbar : Fin n вҶ’ Оҙ)`, `(j : в„•)`, `j + 1 < n`, `n - j - 2 < n`, `Integrable (S.innerReg dbar j) P.Ој`, IH (вҳ… at `j`) вҶ’ (вҳ… at `j + 1`) | **Inductive step** (`j вҶ’ j + 1`).  Generalizes `step_2`вҖ“`step_4` of the legacy n=2 proof.  Let `k := n - j - 2`.  Via `condExpRatio_eq_of_mul`: (A) numerator-denominator product identity using IH + `indD_factor_split` + reverse pull-out of `(dVar вҹЁkвҹ©).indicator` inside `Пғ(historyBundle (k+1))` via `stronglyMeasurable_indicator_dVar_sigma_history` + tower down to `Пғ(historyBundle k)` via `historyBundle_sigma_mono_step` and `condExpGiven_tower_of_le` + stage-`k` exchangeability via `condExp_mul_of_condIndep`.  (B) Denominator nonvanishing via `overlap_k`.  Multiplied back by `indD k` on both sides.  The extra `Integrable (innerReg j)` hypothesis (added 2026-04-26 along with the pointwise-overlap relaxation) supplies the LHS pull-out integrability previously taken from `innerReg_integrable`. | **Proved** |

### `DTR/StrongCancellation.lean` вҖ” Strengthened cancellation identity (a.e. equality)

Under the **pointwise** overlap hypothesis, the proof of integrability of
`innerReg dbar j` is interlocked with the cancellation identity.  This
file proves a single unified inductive predicate

    P j вҶ” (innerReg dbar j =бөҗ[Ој] indD dbar (n-1-j) В· Ој[Y_of dbar | Пғ_{n-1-j}])
          вҲ§ Integrable (innerReg dbar j) Ој

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `PODTRSystem.cdtr_strong` | `[StandardBorelSpace P.О©] [IsFiniteMeasure P.Ој]`, `S.Assumptions`, `(dbar : Fin n вҶ’ Оҙ)`, `0 < n`, `вҲҖ j < n` вҶ’ `(strong identity at j) вҲ§ Integrable (innerReg j)` | **Strengthened cancellation identity (joint with integrability).**  By induction on `j`: base case `j = 0` reuses `cdtr_base` for the weak form and case-splits on `indD m вҲҲ {0,1}` to upgrade to the strong form (vanishing on `{indD m = 0}` from numerator/denominator both factoring through `indD m`).  Step case `j вҶ’ j+1` calls `cdtr_step` with the integrability part of the IH, then upgrades via `indD_factor_split` and the strong IH to show `Ој[innerReg j В· ind_k | Пғ_k]` factors through `indD k`, hence `innerReg(j+1) =бөҗ 0` on `{indD k = 0}`. | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.innerReg_integrable` | `[StandardBorelSpace P.О©] [IsFiniteMeasure P.Ој]`, `S.Assumptions`, `j < n` вҶ’ `Integrable (S.innerReg dbar j) P.Ој` | Integrability of every iterated CE-ratio.  Re-derived from `cdtr_strong`'s second conjunct (replacing the previously sorry'd direct-bound proof in `Helpers.lean`). | **Proved** |

### `DTR/Main.lean` вҖ” Final theorems

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `PODTRSystem.cdtr_iter` | `[StandardBorelSpace P.О©] [IsFiniteMeasure P.Ој]`, `S.Assumptions`, `0 < n`, `вҲҖ j < n` вҶ’ (вҳ… at `j`) | Backward-induction iterate combining `cdtr_base` (`j = 0`) and `cdtr_step` (`j вҶ’ j + 1`); proved by `Nat.rec` on `j`, with index-bridging via `omega`.  Threads the integrability hypothesis required by `cdtr_step` from `cdtr_strong`. | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.cdtr_backdoor` | `[StandardBorelSpace P.О©] [IsFiniteMeasure P.Ој]`, `S.Assumptions`, `(dbar : Fin n вҶ’ Оҙ)`, `0 < n` вҶ’ `(S.historyBundle 0 _).condExpGiven (S.Y_of dbar) P.Ој =бөҗ[P.Ој] S.innerReg dbar (n - 1)` | **General-`n` CDTR backdoor identification.**  Specialise `cdtr_iter` at `j = n - 1`; the partial indicator `S.indD dbar 0 = fun _ => 1` collapses both `В· indD 0` factors via `mul_one`/`one_mul` | **Proved** |
| `PODTRSystem.dtr_backdoor` | `[StandardBorelSpace P.О©] [IsFiniteMeasure P.Ој]`, `S.Assumptions`, `(dbar : Fin n вҶ’ Оҙ)`, `0 < n` вҶ’ `S.dtrEffect dbar = S.adjustedDtr dbar` | **General-`n` integrated DTR identification.**  `E[Y(dbar)] = вҲ« innerReg dbar (n - 1)`.  Two-line corollary of `cdtr_backdoor` via `MeasureTheory.integral_condExp` and `integral_congr_ae` | **Proved** |

**Status / known gaps.**
- Both `cdtr_backdoor` and `dtr_backdoor` are unconditional **for arbitrary `n вүҘ 1`**, modulo the standing project-wide `Mathlib.CondIndep` stubs (`condExp_mul_of_condIndep`) shared with ATE.lean and DID.lean.  No `sorry` in any of the four DTR files.
- The **nested-integral form** that matches `prop:po-dynamic-backdoor` literally in the `.tex` (`вҲ« вӢҜ вҲ« Ој[Y \| SМ„_n, DМ„_n=dМ„_n] dP(S_n \| SМ„_{n-1}, DМ„_{n-1}=dМ„_{n-1}) вӢҜ dP(S_1)`) is *deferred*: it requires the not-yet-available `condDistrib`-as-kernel infrastructure (cf. `Causalean/Mathlib/CondDistrib.lean`, the *condDistrib вҶ’ Kernel.condKernel migration*).
- The remark in the tex about **history-dependent regimes** `d_k : (SМ„_k, DМ„_{k-1}) вҶ’ Оҙ` is not formalized here; the same induction pattern would carry over once the corresponding regime-builder is available.

---

## 9i. `PO/ID/Exact/DID.lean` вҖ” Two-Period DID Identification of the ATT (PO framework)

Formalizes `def:po-did-system`, `def:po-did-assumptions`, and `prop:po-did-att`
from `Basic Concepts.tex` (lines 1693вҖ“1809): the two-period difference-in-differences
identification of the ATT in the bare potential-outcome framework.  Mirrors
`LATE.lean` / `ATE.lean` in style but is strictly simpler вҖ” no Пғ-algebra
conditional expectations, no independence assumption, no Wald ratio, no
monotonicity.  The whole file lives on the event-level `eventCondExp` layer
plus `POVar` consistency.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `PODIDSystem P` | `structure { D, YвӮҖ, YвӮҒ, hDbool, hY0real, hY1real, hDY0, hDY1 }` | Two-period DID subsystem: binary treatment `D`, real pre/post outcomes `YвӮҖ, YвӮҒ`; `D` distinct from each outcome | **Defined** |
| `PODIDSystem.dVar`, `y0Var`, `y1Var` | `POVar P Bool` / `POVar P в„қ` / `POVar P в„қ` | `POVar` wrappers around `D`, `YвӮҖ`, `YвӮҒ` using the `hDbool` / `hY0real` / `hY1real` equivalences | **Defined** |
| `PODIDSystem.Y0ofD S d`, `Y1ofD S d` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Counterfactual outcomes `YвӮҖ(d) := y0Var.cfUnder dVar d`, `YвӮҒ(d) := y1Var.cfUnder dVar d` | **Defined** |
| `PODIDSystem.factualD`, `factualYвӮҖ`, `factualYвӮҒ` | `P.О© вҶ’ Bool` / `в„қ` / `в„қ` | Factual treatment and outcomes | **Defined** |
| `PODIDSystem.dEvent S d` | `Set P.О©` | Factual event `{D = d}`, defined as `S.dVar.event d` | **Defined** |
| `PODIDSystem.measurable_{Y0ofD, Y1ofD, factualD, factualYвӮҖ, factualYвӮҒ}` | `Measurable вҖҰ` | One-line delegations to `POVar.measurable_cfUnder` / `POVar.measurable_factual` | **Proved** |
| `PODIDSystem.measurableSet_dEvent` | `MeasurableSet (S.dEvent d)` | Measurability of the treatment event | **Proved** |
| `PODIDSystem.ATT` | `в„қ` | `eventCondExp P.Ој (dEvent true) (Y1ofD true - Y1ofD false)` вҖ” def:po-did-system | **Defined** |
| `PODIDSystem.Assumptions S` | `structure { consistency, noAnticipation, parallelTrends, posTrue_{ne_zero,ne_top}, posFalse_{ne_zero,ne_top}, intY0ofD_false, intY1ofD_false, intY1ofD_true }` | def:po-did-assumptions; positivity split into four fields, parallel-trends stated directly on `eventCondExp` of `YвӮҒ(0) вҲ’ YвӮҖ(0)`, integrability required only for the three counterfactuals that actually appear | **Defined** |
| `PODIDSystem.factualDiff_eq_cfDiff_on_dEvent` (private) | `P.Consistency вҶ’ вҲҖ Пү вҲҲ dEvent d, factualYвӮҒ Пү - factualYвӮҖ Пү = Y1ofD d Пү - Y0ofD d Пү` | Pointwise consistency on `{D = d}`: combines `POVar.cf_eq_factual_on_event` on `y1Var` and `y0Var` | **Proved** |
| `PODIDSystem.att_did` | `S.ATT = eventCondExp (dEvent true) (factualYвӮҒ - factualYвӮҖ) - eventCondExp (dEvent false) (factualYвӮҒ - factualYвӮҖ)` | DID identification of the ATT, prop:po-did-att; proof is a five-step `calc` on the event-level conditional expectation (no-anticipation split + additivity + two consistency rewrites + parallel-trends bridge) | **Proved** |

---

## 9i*. `PO/ID/Exact/CSDID.lean` вҖ” Callaway--Sant'Anna group-time DID identification

Formalizes `def:po-cs-did-system`, `def:po-cs-did-assumptions`, and
`prop:po-cs-did-att` from `Basic Concepts.tex` (lines 2439вҖ“2565): the
no-covariate Callaway--Sant'Anna staggered-adoption DID identification of the
group-time ATT(g, t) under irreversibility, no anticipation, and never-treated
parallel trends. Extends two-period `DID.lean` from one cohort + one
post-period to a finite horizon `T` with cohorts `G_g = {D_{gвҲ’1}=0, D_g=1}` and
never-treated event `C = вӢӮ_s {D_s = 0}`. Periods are 0-indexed in Lean
(`Fin T` with `2 вүӨ T`), so the .tex bound `2 вүӨ g вүӨ t вүӨ T` becomes
`1 вүӨ g.val вүӨ t.val < T`. Proof structure mirrors `PODIDSystem.att_did` line by
line; the only genuinely new ingredients are (i) recursive construction of the
treatment-path regimes `regOf g`, `regNT` via iterated `Regime.sqcup`, and
(ii) reduction of `cohortEvent` plus irreversibility to `FactualAgrees (regOf g)`
almost surely.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POCSDIDSystem P` | `structure { T, hT : 2 вүӨ T, D Y : Fin T вҶ’ P.V, hDbool, hYreal, hDinj, hYinj, hDY }` | Staggered-adoption DID subsystem: real-valued outcomes `Y s` and binary treatments `D s` for `s : Fin T`; `D`/`Y` injective and disjoint as node families | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.dVar`, `yVar` | `Fin S.T вҶ’ POVar P Bool` / `Fin S.T вҶ’ POVar P в„қ` | Per-period `POVar` wrappers around `D s`, `Y s` | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.factualD`, `factualY`, `dEvent` | `Fin S.T вҶ’ P.О© вҶ’ Bool` / `Fin S.T вҶ’ P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` / `Fin S.T вҶ’ Bool вҶ’ Set P.О©` | Factual treatment / outcome at period `s`; factual event `{D s = b}` | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.measurable_factualD`, `measurable_factualY`, `measurableSet_dEvent` | `Measurable вҖҰ` / `MeasurableSet вҖҰ` | One-line delegations to the `POVar` API | **Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.dTargetUpTo` | `POCSDIDSystem P вҶ’ в„• вҶ’ Finset P.V` | Recursive standalone target: image of `S.D` on indices `< k`; lets us prove disjointness for the next `Regime.sqcup` step | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.dTargetUpTo_mem_iff` | `v вҲҲ S.dTargetUpTo k вҶ” вҲғ i : Fin S.T, i.val < k вҲ§ v = S.D i` | Membership characterisation of `dTargetUpTo`, used to drive injectivity arguments | **Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.regUpToAux` | `(b : Fin S.T вҶ’ Bool) вҶ’ (k вүӨ S.T) вҶ’ { r : Regime // r.target = S.dTargetUpTo k }` | Subtype-valued recursive auxiliary that builds a regime over the first `k` periods together with its target equality (mirrors `PODTRSystem.regimeUpToAux`) | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.regimeBy`, `regimeBy_target_eq` | `(Fin S.T вҶ’ Bool) вҶ’ Regime P.V P.X` / `(S.regimeBy b).target = S.dTargetUpTo S.T` | Full-horizon regime parameterised by a Bool assignment, with target equality | **Defined / Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.regOf`, `regNT` | `Fin S.T вҶ’ Regime P.V P.X` / `Regime P.V P.X` | Cohort regime (`D s = 1` for `g.val вүӨ s.val`, else `0`) and never-treated regime (`D s = 0` always) | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.Y_notin_dTargetUpTo`, `Y_notin_regimeBy`, `yVar_v_notin_regOf_target`, `yVar_v_notin_regNT_target` | `S.Y t вҲү вҖҰ` / `(S.yVar t).v вҲү вҖҰ` | The outcome node `Y t` lies outside any `regimeBy`/`regOf`/`regNT` target вҖ” required precondition for `cf_eq_factual_of_factualAgrees` | **Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.YofCohort`, `YofNT` | `Fin S.T вҶ’ Fin S.T вҶ’ P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` / `Fin S.T вҶ’ P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Counterfactual outcomes `Y_t(g)` and `Y_t(вҲһ)` as `cf` under the corresponding regimes | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.measurable_YofCohort`, `measurable_YofNT` | `Measurable вҖҰ` | Measurability of the counterfactuals | **Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.predFin` | `(g : Fin S.T) вҶ’ 1 вүӨ g.val вҶ’ Fin S.T` | Predecessor index `g вҲ’ 1` as `Fin S.T`; hypothesis is a precondition marker (body uses truncating в„• subtraction) | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.cohortEvent`, `measurableSet_cohortEvent` | `(g : Fin S.T) вҶ’ 1 вүӨ g.val вҶ’ Set P.О©` / `MeasurableSet вҖҰ` | Cohort event `G_g = {D_{gвҲ’1}=0} вҲ© {D_g=1}`; measurability | **Defined / Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.neverTreatedEvent`, `measurableSet_neverTreatedEvent` | `Set P.О©` / `MeasurableSet вҖҰ` | Never-treated event `C = вӢӮ_s {D_s = 0}`; measurability | **Defined / Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.ATT` | `(g t : Fin S.T) вҶ’ 1 вүӨ g.val вҶ’ в„қ` | `eventCondExp P.Ој (cohortEvent g hg) (Y_t(g) вҲ’ Y_t(вҲһ))` вҖ” def:po-cs-did-system | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.Assumptions S` | `structure { consistency, irreversibilityBase, irreversibilityStep, noAnticipation, parallelTrends, posCohort, posNT, intYofCohort, intYofNT }` | def:po-cs-did-assumptions; irreversibility split into base case (`D_0 = 0` a.s.) and absorbing step (`D_s = 1 вҹ№ D_{s+1} = 1` a.s.); parallel-trends stated as a long difference on `Y_t(вҲһ) вҲ’ Y_{gвҲ’1}(вҲһ)`; positivity and integrability required for all admissible cohort-period pairs | **Defined** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.factualY_eq_YofCohort_on_cohortEvent` (private) | `S.Assumptions вҶ’ вҲҖ g t hg, вҲҖбөҗ Пү вҲӮP.Ој, Пү вҲҲ cohortEvent g hg вҶ’ YofCohort t g Пү = factualY t Пү` | A.e. cohort consistency: on `cohortEvent g`, irreversibility forces the factual D-path to agree with `regOf g`, and consistency then gives `Y_t(g) = factual Y_t`. Filled by Codex (gpt-5.5 high) using the `regUpToAux` induction template plus forward/backward irreversibility chains | **Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.factualY_eq_YofNT_on_NT` (private) | `S.Assumptions вҶ’ вҲҖ t, вҲҖбөҗ Пү вҲӮP.Ој, Пү вҲҲ neverTreatedEvent вҶ’ YofNT t Пү = factualY t Пү` | Pointwise NT consistency: on `neverTreatedEvent`, the D-path matches `regNT` directly (no irreversibility needed); apply consistency. Filled by Codex | **Proved** |
| `POCSDIDSystem.att_csdid` | `S.Assumptions вҶ’ вҲҖ g t hg hgt, S.ATT g t hg = eventCondExp (cohortEvent g hg) (factualY t вҲ’ factualY (predFin g hg)) вҲ’ eventCondExp neverTreatedEvent (factualY t вҲ’ factualY (predFin g hg))` | Callaway--Sant'Anna group-time DID identification of `ATT(g, t)`, prop:po-cs-did-att. Five-step proof mirroring `PODIDSystem.att_did` (no-anticipation split, additivity, cohort consistency, parallel-trends bridge, NT consistency). Filled by Codex | **Proved** |

## 9i0. `PO/Analysis/Regression.lean` вҖ” Regression-Function Representatives

Shared predicate `IsRegressionFunction` and derived lemmas, extracted from the RDD
files so SharpRDD and FuzzyRDD can both use the same interface without duplication.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `IsRegressionFunction Ој X g f` | `Measure О© вҶ’ (О© вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (О© вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (в„қ вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Prop` | `f : в„қ вҶ’ в„қ` is a regression-function representative of `g` over `X`: measurability of `f`, integrability of `g` and of `f вҲҳ X`, and the integral identity `вҲ«_{XвҒ»В№A} g = вҲ«_{XвҒ»В№A} f вҲҳ X` for all measurable `A` | **Defined** |
| `IsRegressionFunction.integrable_pushforward` | `IsRegressionFunction Ој X g f вҶ’ AEMeasurable X Ој вҶ’ Integrable f (Ој.map X)` | `f` is integrable under the pushforward of `X` whenever `X` is AE-measurable | **Proved** |
| `IsRegressionFunction.sub` | `IsRegressionFunction Ој X gвӮҒ fвӮҒ вҶ’ IsRegressionFunction Ој X gвӮӮ fвӮӮ вҶ’ IsRegressionFunction Ој X (gвӮҒ - gвӮӮ) (fвӮҒ - fвӮӮ)` | Linearity: difference of representatives is the representative of the difference | **Proved** |
| `IsRegressionFunction.aeEq_of_aeEq_response` | `gвӮҒ =бөҗ[Ој] gвӮӮ вҶ’ IsRegressionFunction Ој X gвӮҒ fвӮҒ вҶ’ IsRegressionFunction Ој X gвӮӮ fвӮӮ вҶ’ fвӮҒ =бөҗ[Ој.map X] fвӮӮ` | If two response variables are ae-equal, their regression representatives agree ae on the pushforward | **Proved** |

## 9i0a. `Panel/Analysis/Residualization.lean` вҖ” Population Residualization Core (FWL framework)

Framework primitives for the **population estimand-characterization layer**: a linear `LВІ` nuisance class, a residualization witness `(V_H, б№ј)` decomposing a square-integrable variable against the class, the residualized population coefficient `ОІ_H(Y, D) = E[DМғВ·б»ё] / E[DМғВІ]`, and the **population FrischвҖ“WaughвҖ“Lovell theorem**. Pure measure-theoretic; no `POSystem`/`CausalModel`/`SWIGGraph` dependence. Downstream paper-specific files (SЕӮoczyЕ„ski saturated OLS, TWFE decompositions, event-study, 2SLS, вҖҰ) instantiate `ResidualizationWitness` for their nuisance class (controls, unit + time fixed effects, cohort effects, вҖҰ) and reduce to the FWL ratio via this theorem. Specifies `def:po-estimand-residualization-witness`, `def:po-estimand-residualized-coefficient`, and `prop:po-estimand-fwl` from `doc/basic_concepts/po/estimand_characterization/residualization_core.md`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `LinearL2Class Ој` | `structure { mem : (О© вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Prop, memLp, zero_mem, add_mem, smul_mem }` | A linear class of `MemLp 2 Ој` real-valued functions on `О©`, predicate-style: `mem` carves out the underlying set, with closure under scalar multiplication and addition, and every member required to be square-integrable | **Defined** |
| `ResidualizationWitness Ој H V` | `structure { VH, Vtilde : О© вҶ’ в„қ, VH_mem, Vtilde_memLp, decomp : V =бөҗ[Ој] VH + Vtilde, orthogonal }` | Population residualization witness for `V` against `H`: bundles the in-class projection `V_H вҲҲ H`, the LВІ-residual `б№ј`, the a.e. decomposition `V = V_H + б№ј`, and population orthogonality `вҲҖ h вҲҲ H, вҲ« б№јВ·h dОј = 0` | **Defined** |
| `residualizedCoefficient Ој H wY wD` | `noncomputable def : в„қ` | Residualized population coefficient `ОІ_H(Y, D) := (вҲ« DМғВ·б»ё dОј) / (вҲ« DМғВ·DМғ dОј)`, the population FrischвҖ“WaughвҖ“Lovell representation of the coefficient on `D` in a linear projection that also includes the nuisance terms `H`. Positivity of the denominator is supplied at theorem-use time | **Defined** |
| `residualizedCoefficient_eq_of_normalEqs` | `(Y_memLp) (D_memLp) (wY) (wD) (hDtilde_pos : 0 < вҲ« DМғВІ) (ОІ) (HОІ) (HОІ_mem) (h_normal_D) (h_normal_H) вҶ’ ОІ = residualizedCoefficient Ој H wY wD` | **Population FrischвҖ“WaughвҖ“Lovell theorem** (`prop:po-estimand-fwl`): if `ОІ` and `HОІ вҲҲ H` jointly satisfy the population normal equations for projecting `Y` on `D` and `H` (`вҲ« (Y вҲ’ ОІD вҲ’ HОІ)В·D = 0` and `вҲҖ h вҲҲ H, вҲ« (Y вҲ’ ОІD вҲ’ HОІ)В·h = 0`), and `E[DМғВІ] > 0`, then `ОІ` equals the residualized coefficient. Proof: build `h* = wY.VH вҲ’ ОІВ·wD.VH вҲ’ HОІ вҲҲ H`, derive `вҲ« eВ·DМғ = 0` from the two normal equations and `wD.decomp`, expand `e = h* + (б»ё вҲ’ ОІВ·DМғ)` a.e., use `wD.orthogonal h*` to kill `h*`, divide by `hDtilde_pos.ne'` | **Proved** |

---

## 9i0a-CellBridge. `Panel/CellBridge.lean` вҖ” Generic Finite Indicator-Span Bridges

Reusable probability-space infrastructure for finite cell partitions in the estimand-characterization layer. The module hoists the one-axis saturated indicator class used by SЕӮoczyЕ„ski and the two-axis cohort+period class used by Goodman-Bacon, plus shared cell-mass, cell-mean, finite-partition integral, and indicator-span orthogonality lemmas.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `CellBridge.cellIndicator` | `(X : О© вҶ’ О№) вҶ’ О№ вҶ’ О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Real-valued singleton-cell indicator `рқҹҷ{X = i}` | **Defined** |
| `CellBridge.indicatorSpan` | `Measure О© вҶ’ (X : О© вҶ’ О№) вҶ’ Measurable X вҶ’ LinearL2Class Ој` | One-axis finite linear `LВІ` span of singleton indicators `рқҹҷ{X = i}` | **Defined** |
| `CellBridge.twoAxisIndicatorSpan` | `Measure О© вҶ’ (X : О© вҶ’ О№) вҶ’ (Z : О© вҶ’ Оә) вҶ’ Measurable X вҶ’ Measurable Z вҶ’ LinearL2Class Ој` | Two-axis finite linear `LВІ` span of `X`-cell and `Z`-cell indicators, used for cohort+period nuisance classes | **Defined** |
| `CellBridge.cellMass` / `jointCellMass` / `cellMean` | `(Ој, X, i)` / `(Ој, X, Z, i, k)` / `(Ој, F, X, i) вҶ’ в„қ` | Generic finite cell mass, joint cell mass, and totalized cell mean helpers | **Defined** |
| `CellBridge.indicator_cell_memLp` | `IsProbabilityMeasure Ој вҶ’ Measurable X вҶ’ MemLp (cell indicator) 2 Ој` | Cell indicators are square-integrable under a probability measure | **Proved** |
| `CellBridge.integral_cell_indicator_one_eq_cellMass` | `вҲ« рқҹҷ{X=i} dОј = cellMass Ој X i` | Integral of a singleton-cell indicator equals its real cell mass | **Proved** |
| `CellBridge.cell_integral_div_mul_cellMass` / `cellMean_mul_cellMass` | `((вҲ« FВ·рқҹҷ{X=i}) / cellMass) * cellMass = вҲ« FВ·рқҹҷ{X=i}` | Dividing by cell mass and multiplying back recovers the raw indicator-weighted integral, including zero-mass cells by totalized division | **Proved** |
| `CellBridge.integral_mul_indicatorSpan_eq_zero_of_cell` | `вҲҖ i, вҲ« VВ·рқҹҷ{X=i}=0 вҶ’ вҲ« VВ·(ОЈ c_iрқҹҷ{X=i})=0` | Cell-wise orthogonality implies orthogonality to the whole one-axis indicator span | **Proved** |
| `CellBridge.integral_mul_twoAxisIndicatorSpan_eq_zero_of_axes` | `вҲҖ i, вҲ« VВ·рқҹҷ{X=i}=0 вҶ’ вҲҖ k, вҲ« VВ·рқҹҷ{Z=k}=0 вҶ’ вҲ« VВ·h=0` | Per-axis orthogonality implies orthogonality to a two-axis indicator-span representative | **Proved** |
| `CellBridge.integral_eq_sum_cell` | `Integrable F Ој вҶ’ вҲ« F dОј = ОЈ_i вҲ« FВ·рқҹҷ{X=i} dОј` | Integrates an integrable function by summing over finite cells | **Proved** |

## 9i0a-AdoptionPath. `Panel/AdoptionPath.lean` вҖ” Shared Staggered-Adoption Path Helpers

Paper-agnostic helpers for adoption paths encoded as `WithTop (Fin T)`, with `вҠӨ` representing never-treated. Sun-Abraham's path helpers are compatibility wrappers around these declarations; Goodman-Bacon's `AdoptionDate` namespace uses the same raw `WithTop` encoding for proof stability.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `AdoptionPath.finite` | `Fin T вҶ’ WithTop (Fin T)` | Embeds a finite adoption period into the shared adoption-path type | **Defined** |
| `AdoptionPath.le` / `lt` | `WithTop (Fin T) вҶ’ Fin T вҶ’ Prop` | Treated-by-period and untreated-before-adoption predicates for finite periods | **Defined** |
| `AdoptionPath.isFinite` / `isInfinite` | `WithTop (Fin T) вҶ’ Prop` | Eventually-treated and never-treated path predicates | **Defined** |
| `AdoptionPath.isNeverTreated` / `isEventuallyTreated` | `WithTop (Fin T) вҶ’ Prop` | Sun-Abraham-compatible names for infinite and finite adoption paths | **Defined** |
| `AdoptionPath.absorbingTreatment` | `WithTop (Fin T) вҶ’ Fin T вҶ’ в„қ` | Absorbing treatment path `1{A вүӨ t}`, totalized so `вҠӨ` is untreated in every finite period | **Defined** |
| `AdoptionPath.not_le_of_lt` / `lt_of_isInfinite` | order helpers | `t < A` rules out `A вүӨ t`, and never-treated paths are untreated in every finite period | **Proved** |

## 9i0a-VariableIntensityIV. `PO/ID/Exact/VariableIntensityIV/{OrderedTreatment,VariableIntensity}.lean` вҖ” Variable-Intensity IV ACR (Angrist-Imbens)

Specific-paper scaffold for Angrist-Imbens (1995) variable treatment intensity and average causal response, formulated **inside the potential-outcome framework** (`POSystem`): the instrument, treatment intensity, and outcome are system variables; potential intensities `D(z)` and treatment-indexed potential outcomes `Y(d)` are genuine `POVar.cfUnder` counterfactuals; consistency (`D=D(Z)`, `Y=Y(D)`) is the canonical `POSystem.Consistency` and instrument independence is `POSystem.IndepCF` over a counterfactual bundle (not ad-hoc structure fields). `OrderedTreatment.lean` holds the finite ordered-intensity algebra (adjacent margins, crossing indicators, telescoping identities) directly вҖ” its sole consumer is `VariableIntensity.lean` in this folder, so it lives here rather than under `Panel` вҖ” and re-exports the shared generic `NormalizedWeights` normalized-weight helpers. `VariableIntensity.lean` packages a directed instrument-cell contrast, crossing events, indicator-weighted ACR, conditional-margin ACR, Wald/2SLS interface definitions, and the headline ACR characterization statements. Companion NL doc: `doc/basic_concepts/po/estimand_characterization/angrist_imbens_variable_intensity.md`.

### `VariableIntensityIV/OrderedTreatment.lean`

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `OrderedTreatment.lowerLevel` / `upperLevel` | `Fin J вҶ’ Fin (J+1)` | Lower and upper treatment levels for the margin `j вҶ’ j+1` | **Defined** |
| `OrderedTreatment.intensityValue` | `Fin (J+1) вҶ’ в„қ` | Real-valued numeric representation of an ordered treatment level | **Defined** |
| `OrderedTreatment.marginIncrement` | `(Fin (J+1) вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Fin J вҶ’ в„қ` | Finite-difference increment `f(j+1)-f(j)` on a treatment margin | **Defined** |
| `OrderedTreatment.Crossing` | `Fin (J+1) вҶ’ Fin (J+1) вҶ’ Fin J вҶ’ Prop` | Predicate that a movement from level `a` to level `b` crosses margin `j вҶ’ j+1` | **Defined** |
| `OrderedTreatment.crossingIndicator` | `Fin (J+1) вҶ’ Fin (J+1) вҶ’ Fin J вҶ’ в„қ` | Real-valued indicator of the crossed-margin predicate | **Defined** |
| `OrderedTreatment.normalizedWeight` | `(О№ вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ О№ вҶ’ в„қ` | Generic finite normalized weight `a_i / ОЈ_k a_k` | **Defined** |
| `OrderedTreatment.ordered_telescope_indicator` | `a вүӨ b вҶ’ f b - f a = ОЈ_j marginIncrement f j * crossingIndicator a b j` | Ordered finite telescoping identity over crossed margins, proved by reindexing to the half-open Nat interval `[a.val,b.val)` and applying `Finset.sum_Ico_sub` | **Proved** |
| `OrderedTreatment.ordered_telescope_identity` | `a вүӨ b вҶ’ intensityValue b - intensityValue a = ОЈ_j crossingIndicator a b j` | Identity-function version of the ordered telescoping lemma, equating intensity movement with crossed-margin count | **Proved** |
| `OrderedTreatment.normalizedWeight_nonneg` | `(вҲҖ i, 0 вүӨ a i) вҶ’ 0 < ОЈ_i a_i вҶ’ 0 вүӨ normalizedWeight a i` | Nonnegativity of normalized finite weights from nonnegative raw weights and positive total mass | **Proved** |
| `OrderedTreatment.sum_normalizedWeight_eq_one` | `0 < ОЈ_i a_i вҶ’ ОЈ_i normalizedWeight a i = 1` | Normalized finite weights sum to one when the normalizing total is positive | **Proved** |

### `VariableIntensityIV/VariableIntensity.lean`

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem P рқ’ө J` | `(P : POSystem) вҶ’ [Fintype рқ’ө] [MeasurableSingletonClass рқ’ө] вҶ’ structure { hJ_pos, Z D Y : P.V, hZрқ’ө/hDintensity/hYreal measurable-equivs, distinctness }` | Variable-intensity IV system over a PO system: instrument/treatment/outcome are system variables with value spaces identified with `рқ’ө`/`Fin (J+1)`/`в„қ`; potential intensities `DofZ` and outcomes `YofD` are `cfUnder` counterfactuals; exclusion is structural (`YofD` fixes only the treatment) | **Defined** |

| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.zEvent` | `рқ’ө вҶ’ Set P.О©` | Instrument cell event `{Пү | Z(Пү)=z}`, defined via `POVar.event` | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.cfContrastBundle` | `рқ’ө вҶ’ рқ’ө вҶ’ POCFBundle P` | Contrast-relevant counterfactual bundle `(D(z0), D(z1), Y(0),...,Y(J))` (`D`s at indices `0,1`, `Y(d)` at index `d+2`) carrying the `IndepCF` independence hypothesis | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.marginResponse` | `Fin J вҶ’ P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Unit causal response `Y(j+1)-Y(j)` on a treatment margin | **Defined** |

| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.crossingProb` / `totalCrossingProb` | `... вҶ’ в„қ` | Crossing-event mass and total crossing mass over all margins | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.crossingWeight` | `рқ’ө вҶ’ рқ’ө вҶ’ Fin J вҶ’ в„қ` | Angrist-Imbens normalized margin-crossing weight | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.indicatorWeightedEffect` | `рқ’ө вҶ’ рқ’ө вҶ’ Fin J вҶ’ в„қ` | Set integral of the margin response over a crossing event, the unnormalized crossing-effect contribution | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.indicatorWeightedACR` / `averageCausalResponse` | `рқ’ө вҶ’ рқ’ө вҶ’ в„қ` | Indicator-weighted ACR ratio and conditional-margin weighted ACR for a directed contrast | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.firstStageContrast` / `reducedFormContrast` | `рқ’ө вҶ’ рқ’ө вҶ’ в„қ` | Potential first-stage and reduced-form contrasts after consistency, exclusion, and independence reduce the Wald components | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.condExpDZ` / `condExpYZ` / `wald` | `рқ’ө вҶ’ в„қ` / `рқ’ө вҶ’ рқ’ө вҶ’ в„қ` | Event-conditional factual treatment/outcome means and the directed Wald estimand | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.ValidContrastAssumptions` | `рқ’ө вҶ’ рқ’ө вҶ’ Prop` | Assumption bundle for IV validity: `POSystem.Consistency`, `POSystem.IndepCF` instrument independence, directed monotonicity, positive first stage, and outcome integrability (exclusion is structural, not a field) | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.integrable_marginResponse` | `ValidContrastAssumptions z0 z1 вҶ’ Integrable (marginResponse j) Ој` | Margin-response integrability derived from treatment-indexed outcome integrability | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.firstStage_eq_sum_crossingProb` | `firstStageContrast z0 z1 = ОЈ_j crossingProb z0 z1 j` | First-stage denominator equals total crossed-margin probability, using monotonicity, ordered-treatment telescoping, and indicator integrals over crossing events | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.crossingWeight_nonneg` | `ValidContrastAssumptions z0 z1 вҶ’ 0 вүӨ crossingWeight z0 z1 j` | Nonnegativity of ACR crossing weights using normalized-weight algebra and positive first stage | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.sum_crossingWeight_eq_one` | `ValidContrastAssumptions z0 z1 вҶ’ ОЈ_j crossingWeight z0 z1 j = 1` | ACR crossing weights sum to one under positive first stage | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.reducedForm_eq_sum_crossingEffects` | `reducedFormContrast z0 z1 = ОЈ_j indicatorWeightedEffect z0 z1 j` | Reduced-form contrast decomposes into indicator-weighted crossed-margin causal responses via pointwise ordered telescoping and finite integral exchange | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.indicatorWeightedACR_eq_averageCausalResponse` | `indicatorWeightedACR z0 z1 = averageCausalResponse z0 z1` | Indicator-weighted ACR ratio agrees with the conditional-margin weighted ACR expression; pure algebraic identity requiring no contrast-validity assumption | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.wald_eq_averageCausalResponse` | `wald z0 z1 = averageCausalResponse z0 z1` | Headline Angrist-Imbens ACR characterization for a valid directed contrast with positive instrument cells; reduces factual Wald cells to potential first-stage/reduced-form contrasts via `POSystem.eventCondExp_of_consistency_IndepCF` (consistency + `IndepCF` drop-of-conditioning over the counterfactual bundle), then applies the ordered-treatment algebra | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.SpecialCases.binaryMargin` | `J = 1 вҶ’ Fin J` | Canonical single treatment margin obtained by transporting `0 : Fin 1` under the binary-intensity equality | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.SpecialCases.wald_eq_late_of_binaryIntensity` | `J = 1 вҶ’ wald z0 z1 = eventCondExp Ој (crossingEvent z0 z1 (binaryMargin h)) (marginResponse (binaryMargin h))` | Binary-treatment single-margin specialization, corresponding to the LATE-style complier event on the unique crossing margin | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.SpecialCases.crossingEvent_eq_complianceEvent` | `J = 1 вҶ’ crossingEvent z0 z1 (binaryMargin h) = {Пү \| DofZ z1 Пү = Fin.last J вҲ§ DofZ z0 Пү = 0}` | Under `J=1` the unique crossing event equals the LATE complier event `{D(z1)=top вҲ§ D(z0)=0}` (Fin.last 1 = 1), making `wald_eq_late_of_binaryIntensity` explicitly the Imbens-Angrist (1994) binary LATE | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.SpecialCases.wald_eq_constantResponse` | `(вҲҖ j, marginResponse j =бөҗ fun _ => П„) вҶ’ wald z0 z1 = П„` | Constant marginal response specialization, reducing the indicator-weighted ACR numerator to `П„` times total crossing mass | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.SpecialCases.wald_eq_marginResponseAverage` | `(вҲҖ j, m j = conditionalMarginResponse z0 z1 j) вҶ’ wald z0 z1 = ОЈ_j crossingWeight z0 z1 j * m j` | Margin-specific response average restatement of the headline ACR characterization | **Proved** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.PopulationTwoSLSScore` | `structure { score, gammaD, centered, denom_nonzero }` | Interface-only finite-score population 2SLS setup for multivalued instruments | **Defined** |
| `PopulationTwoSLSScore.fittedTreatment` / `beta2SLS` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` / `в„қ` | First-stage fitted treatment from the score (over factual `Z`/`D`/`Y`) and the population 2SLS ratio | **Defined** |
| `VariableIntensityIVSystem.TwoSLSContrastDecomposition` | `structure { contrastWeight, pairFirstStage, pairReducedForm, ... }` | Deferred interface for expanding multivalued-instrument 2SLS into signed ordered cell contrasts | **Defined** |

## 9i0a-MultipleInstrumentIV. `PO/ID/Exact/MultipleInstrumentIV/{FiniteIndex,ResponseTypes,Population,Main,POBridge}.lean` вҖ” Multiple-Instrument IV (Mogstad-Torgovitsky-Walters)

Specific-paper finite-support algebra for the MTW multiple-IV characterization.  This layer works with an ordered saturated first-stage index, a finite matrix first-stage projection, support masses, tail coefficients, binary response types, response-type effects, a saturated finite-support population bridge, and an observed measure-backed population 2SLS bridge.  It proves the ordered-tail coefficient nonnegativity, the finite tail-sum interchange identity, the response-type ratio representation, the population-bridge equality from reduced-form/first-stage moments to the finite response-type ratio, the observed `E[h(Z)Y] / E[h(Z)D]` bridge to that ratio, and the positive-weight normalization result under MTW sign alignment.

`POBridge.lean` grounds this algebra in an explicit potential-outcome system (`POMultipleIVSystem`): the response type `G = (D(zвҒ°),вҖҰ,D(z^{K-1}))` is a genuine counterfactual, and under `Assumptions` (consistency + per-cell instrument independence `Z вҹӮ (D(zбөҸ),Y(1),Y(0))`) the two `ObservedBridge` conditional-mean fields are *derived*, not assumed вҖ” discharging Gap G5 of the faithfulness audit.  Its flagship `POMultipleIVSystem.observedBeta2SLS_eq_responseTypeWeightedSum` restates the observed 2SLS ratio as the response-type weighted sum `ОЈ_g Пү_g О”_g` with `О”_g = E[Y(1)-Y(0) | G=g]`, i.e. entirely in potential-outcome language, via the same drop-of-conditioning + total-law pattern as `PO/ID/Exact/LATE.lean`.  Companion NL doc: `doc/basic_concepts/po/estimand_characterization/mogstad_torgovitsky_walters_multiple_iv.md`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `MultipleInstrumentIV.Adj K` | `{j : Fin K // 0 < j.val}` | Adjacent ordered-support threshold, representing the source-paper movements `2, ..., K` in zero-based Lean indexing | **Defined** |

| `MultipleInstrumentIV.FiniteIndex K` | `structure { rho, dhat, rho_nonneg, rho_sum_one, dhat_mono }` | Ordered finite first-stage index: support masses `ПҒ_k`, ordered index values `dhat_k`, probability-vector constraints, and weak monotonicity in the displayed support order | **Defined** |
| `FiniteIndex.meanIndex` / `centeredIndex` | `FiniteIndex K вҶ’ в„қ` / `FiniteIndex K вҶ’ Fin K вҶ’ в„қ` | First-stage mean `ОЈ ПҒ_k dhat_k` and centered index `dhat_k вҲ’ meanIndex` | **Defined** |
| `FiniteIndex.upperTail` / `tailCoeff` | `FiniteIndex K вҶ’ Adj K вҶ’ Finset (Fin K)` / `FiniteIndex K вҶ’ Adj K вҶ’ в„қ` | Ordered upper tail `T_j` and MTW tail coefficient `B_j = ОЈ_{kвҲҲT_j} ПҒ_k (dhat_k вҲ’ meanIndex)` | **Defined** |
| `FiniteIndex.centered_weight_sum_zero` | `вҲ‘ k, I.rho k * I.centeredIndex k = 0` | Centering identity used to subtract the baseline term in the signed decomposition algebra | **Proved** |
| `FiniteIndex.tailCoeff_nonneg` | `0 вүӨ I.tailCoeff j` | Ordered-tail coefficient nonnegativity from nonnegative support masses and weakly increasing first-stage index values | **Proved** |
| `FiniteIndex.tail_sum_interchange` | `ОЈ_k ПҒ_k a_k (ОЈ_j 1{jвүӨk} x_j) = ОЈ_j B_j x_j` | Finite upper-tail sum interchange identity used by the MTW signed decomposition | **Proved** |
| `MultipleInstrumentIV.firstStageGram` | `(rho : Fin K вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (score : Fin K вҶ’ Fin L вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Matrix (Fin L) (Fin L) в„қ` | Finite second-moment matrix `E[q(Z)q(Z)бөҖ]` for the displayed finite support | **Defined** |

| `MatrixFirstStage.gram` / `projectionCoeff` / `fittedValue` | `Matrix (Fin L) (Fin L) в„қ` / `Fin L вҶ’ в„қ` / `Fin K вҶ’ в„қ` | Matrix first-stage construction: Gram matrix, coefficient `(E[q qбөҖ])вҒ»В№ E[qD]`, and fitted index `q(zбөҸ)'О ` | **Defined** |
| `MatrixFirstStage.toFiniteIndex` | `MatrixFirstStage K L вҶ’ FiniteIndex K` | Converts the matrix-inverse first-stage construction into the ordered `FiniteIndex` consumed by the MTW algebra | **Defined** |

| `MultipleInstrumentIV.ResponseTypeStats K` | `structure { mass, effect, mass_nonneg, mass_sum_one }` | Response-type masses `ПҖ_g`, type-specific causal effects `О”_g`, and probability-vector constraints | **Defined** |
| `ResponseTypeStats.unnormTypeWeight` | `FiniteIndex K вҶ’ ResponseTypeStats K вҶ’ ResponseType K вҶ’ в„қ` | MTW unnormalized response-type weight `О»_g = ПҖ_g ОЈ_j B_j (d_j вҲ’ d_{jвҲ’1})` | **Defined** |
| `ResponseTypeStats.typeWeightDenom` / `normalizedTypeWeight` | `в„қ` / `ResponseType K вҶ’ в„қ` | First-stage denominator `ОЈ_g О»_g` and normalized response-type weight `Пү_g = О»_g / ОЈ_g О»_g`, implemented via `NormalizedWeights.normalizedWeight` | **Defined** |
| `ResponseTypeStats.responseTypeEstimand` / `beta2SLSFiniteAlgebra` | `в„қ` / `в„қ` | Finite response-type weighted estimand `ОЈ_g Пү_g О”_g` and finite-algebra ratio form `(ОЈ_g О»_g О”_g)/(ОЈ_g О»_g)` | **Defined** |
| `ResponseTypeStats.PopulationBridge K` | `structure { stats, baseOutcome }` | Saturated finite-support population bridge carrying response-type statistics and baseline outcome means for the centered-index identification step | **Defined** |

| `ResponseTypeStats.PopulationBridge.observedReducedFormMoment` / `observedFirstStageMoment` / `observedBeta2SLS` | `Measure О© вҶ’ (О© вҶ’ Fin K) вҶ’ ... вҶ’ в„қ` | Observed population moments `E[h(Z)Y]`, `E[h(Z)D]`, and their source population 2SLS ratio, with `h(zбөҸ)=dhat_kвҲ’ОЈПҒ_l dhat_l` | **Defined** |

NOTE: the `outcome_cell`/`treatment_cell` support-cell conditional-expectation fields are TRANSFERRED assumptions, not DERIVED from a PO system вҖ” the A2 algebraic bridge does not derive consistency/exogeneity/exclusion | **Defined** |

| `ObservedBridge.observedBeta2SLS_eq_beta2SLSPopulationBridge` / `observedBeta2SLS_eq_beta2SLSFiniteAlgebra` | observed population 2SLS ratio equals bridge / finite algebra ratio | End-to-end measure-backed population 2SLS bridge from `E[h(Z)Y]/E[h(Z)D]` to the MTW response-type finite algebra | **Proved** |
