## 9j2msm. `PO/ID/Partial/Sensitivity/MSM/Setup.lean` вҖ” Marginal Sensitivity Model for `E[Y(1)]` (Tan / ZhaoвҖ“SmallвҖ“Bhattacharya)

The **marginal sensitivity model** in the measure-theoretic backdoor PO framework (`POBackdoorSystem`): partial identification of `E[Y(1)]` when no-unmeasured-confounding is relaxed by a bounded odds ratio `Оӣ`. The complete propensity `eвӮҖ(X,Y(1)) = P[D=1 | Пғ(X,Y(1))]` (conditioning on the covariate *and* the treated potential outcome) is allowed to differ from the observed propensity `e(X)`, with the discrepancy controlled by `Оӣ`. Builds on `PO/ID/Exact/ATE.lean` (`propScore`, the condExp machinery); the IPW bridge is the genuine measure-theoretic content.

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `OR pвӮҒ pвӮӮ` | `в„қ := (pвӮҒ/(1вҲ’pвӮҒ))/(pвӮӮ/(1вҲ’pвӮӮ))` | The odds ratio of two probabilities | **Defined** |
| `completeProp` | `О© вҶ’ в„қ := Ој[1_{D=1} \| Пғ(X,Y(1))]` | The complete propensity `eвӮҖ(X,Y(1))` вҖ” conditions on covariate + treated potential outcome | **Defined** |
| `candMean бәҪ` | `в„қ := вҲ« 1_{D=1}В·Y/бәҪ` | Candidate IPW mean `E[AВ·Y/бәҪ]` for a candidate complete propensity `бәҪ` | **Defined** |
| `Y1mean` | `в„қ := вҲ« Y(1)` | The estimand `Ој = E[Y(1)]` | **Defined** |
| `MSMSet Оӣ` | `Set (О©вҶ’в„қ)` | The MSM ambiguity set: candidates a.e. in `(0,1)` with `1/Оӣ вүӨ OR(бәҪ, e(X)) вүӨ Оӣ` a.e. | **Defined** |
| `msmUpper Оӣ` / `msmLower Оӣ` | `в„қ := sSup/sInf (candMean '' MSMSet Оӣ)` | The MSM interval endpoints | **Defined** |
| `candMean_completeProp_eq_Y1mean` | `candMean eвӮҖ = E[Y(1)]` | **IPW / tower bridge** вҖ” the candidate mean at the *true* complete propensity recovers the estimand (condExp pull-out + cancellation; needs consistency, `eвӮҖ>0` a.e., IPW-integrability of `AВ·Y/eвӮҖ`) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `Y1mean_mem_Icc` | `E[Y(1)] вҲҲ Icc (msmLower Оӣ) (msmUpper Оӣ)` | **The bound** вҖ” the estimand lies in the MSM interval (truth is a feasible candidate) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `MSMSet_mono` | `1вүӨОӣ вҶ’ ОӣвүӨОӣ' вҶ’ MSMSet Оӣ вҠҶ MSMSet Оӣ'` | The ambiguity set grows with the sensitivity parameter | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `msmUpper_mono` / `msmLower_anti` | interval widens in `Оӣ` | **Budget monotonicity** of the MSM interval | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `MSMSet_one_eq` | `бәҪ вҲҲ MSMSet 1 вҶ’ бәҪ =бөҗ e(X)` | **Оӣ=1 collapse**: no slack forces `OR=1 вҮ’ бәҪ = e(X)` a.e. (point identification = the NUC/IPW value) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

Closed form (`Bounds.lean`), with `wMin = 1+(1вҲ’e)/(Оӣe)`, `wMax = 1+Оӣ(1вҲ’e)/e` the box endpoints:

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `wMin Оӣ` / `wMax Оӣ` | `О© вҶ’ в„қ` | The smallest/largest admissible inverse-propensity weight (`OR = 1/Оӣ` / `OR = Оӣ` endpoints) | **Defined** |
| `msmUpperForm Оӣ` / `msmLowerForm Оӣ` | `в„қ := вҲ« AВ·YВ·(wMax/wMin if YвүҘ0 else wMin/wMax)` | The closed-form upper/lower integrals | **Defined** |
| `msmUpper_eq` / `msmLower_eq` | `msmUpper Оӣ = msmUpperForm Оӣ` / `msmLower Оӣ = msmLowerForm Оӣ` | **Closed form of the MSM bounds** вҖ” the box optimization is pointwise-separable (worst-case weight `wMax` where `YвүҘ0`, `wMin` where `Y<0`), attained by a feasible boundary `бәҪ*`. Needs `1вүӨОӣ`, overlap, envelope-integrability, and a.e.-measurability of candidates | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

Sharp (calibrated) set (`Sharp.lean`) вҖ” the DornвҖ“Guo refinement: data-compatibility adds the calibration constraint `E[Z/бәҪ | Пғ(X)] = 1`:

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Calibrated бәҪ` / `MSMSetCalib Оӣ` | `Prop` / `Set (О©вҶ’в„қ)` | calibration `E[Z/бәҪ\|Пғ(X)] =бөҗ 1`; the box members that are calibrated (data-compatible) | **Defined** |
| `msmUpperCalib Оӣ` / `msmLowerCalib Оӣ` | `в„қ := sSup/sInf (candMean '' MSMSetCalib Оӣ)` | the **sharp** interval endpoints | **Defined** |
| `completeProp_calibrated` | `Calibrated eвӮҖ` | **the truth is calibrated** вҖ” `E[Z/eвӮҖ\|Пғ(X)]=1` by the tower property (`eвӮҖ` conditions on `Y(1)`); same condExp pull-out as the IPW bridge | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `Y1mean_mem_Icc_calib` | `E[Y(1)] вҲҲ Icc (msmLowerCalib Оӣ) (msmUpperCalib Оӣ)` | **the sharp interval is valid** (contains the truth) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `msmUpperCalib_le_msmUpper` / `msmLower_le_msmLowerCalib` | `msmUpperCalib Оӣ вүӨ msmUpper Оӣ`, `msmLower Оӣ вүӨ msmLowerCalib Оӣ` | **the sharp interval is tighter than the ZSB interval** (`MSMSetCalib вҠҶ MSMSet`) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

Quantile balancing (`QuantileBalance.lean`) вҖ” the DornвҖ“Guo sharp closed form, via the NeymanвҖ“Pearson exchange argument:

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `cutoffProp Оӣ c` | `О© вҶ’ в„қ := 1/(wMax if Y > c(X) else wMin)` | the quantile-cutoff complete propensity at `Пғ(X)`-measurable cutoff `c` | **Defined** |
| `cutoff_optimal` | `бәҪ вҲҲ MSMSetCalib Оӣ вҶ’ candMean бәҪ вүӨ candMean (cutoffProp Оӣ c)` | **optimality of the cutoff weight** вҖ” NeymanвҖ“Pearson/DantzigвҖ“Wald exchange: `candMean бәҪ вҲ’ candMean(1/w_c) = вҲ«AВ·(YвҲ’c)В·(w_бәҪвҲ’w_c) вүӨ 0` (the `c`-term cancels by calibration, the rest is `вүӨ0` pointwise) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `msmUpperCalib_eq_cutoff` | `msmUpperCalib Оӣ = candMean (cutoffProp Оӣ c)` | **the sharp upper bound has the quantile-balancing closed form** (given a calibrating cutoff `c`) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

Cutoff existence вҖ” calibration brackets (`CutoffExists.lean`): `wMin_mul_propScore_le_one` (`wMinВ·e = e+(1вҲ’e)/Оӣ вүӨ 1`), `one_le_wMax_mul_propScore` (`1 вүӨ e+Оӣ(1вҲ’e) = wMaxВ·e`), and the condExp pull-outs `condExp_treat_wMin_eq` / `condExp_treat_wMax_eq` (`E[ZВ·wMin\|Пғ(X)] = wMinВ·e`, resp. `wMax`). Together: the conditional calibration value at the extreme cutoffs is `E[ZВ·wMin\|Пғ(X)] = wMinВ·e вүӨ 1 вүӨ wMaxВ·e = E[ZВ·wMax\|Пғ(X)]`, so `1` is bracketed and a calibrating cutoff exists. **Proved, axiom-clean.**

Cutoff calibration вҶ’ survival equation (`CutoffSelection.lean`): `cutoff_calibValue_eq` decomposes `E[Z/cutoffProp Оӣ c\|Пғ(X)] = wMinВ·e + (wMaxвҲ’wMin)В·G(c)` (`G(c) = E[ZВ·1{Y>c}\|Пғ(X)]` the conditional treated-survival); `cutoffProp_calibrated_of_survival` вҮ’ the cutoff is calibrated iff `G(c) = survTarget := (1вҲ’wMinВ·e)/(wMaxвҲ’wMin)`; `cutoffProp_mem_MSMSet` (the cutoff is always in the box); and `cutoffProp_mem_MSMSetCalib_of_survival` вҖ” **the Phase-4 `hcut_mem` holds as soon as `c` solves `G(c) = survTarget`**. **Proved, axiom-clean.**

Cutoff construction вҖ” the sharp bound closed unconditionally (`CutoffConstruct.lean`): constructs the calibrating cutoff and discharges `hcut_mem`. `treatedXYLaw` (treated push-forward of `(X,Y)`), `treatedCondCDF` (its Mathlib-`condCDF`), `calibLevel Оӣ = 1 вҲ’ survTarget/e`:

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `treatedSurv_const_eq` | `E[ZВ·1{Y>t}\|Пғ(X)] =бөҗ e(X)В·(1 вҲ’ F(t\|X))` | **the core bridge** вҖ” the weighted conditional survival equals the treated conditional CDF scaled by the propensity (condExp-uniqueness on Пғ(X)-sets: both sides `= Ој(sвҲ©{D=1}вҲ©{YвүӨt})`; `setLIntegral_condCDF` + `e=E[Z\|ПғX]` pull-out + Пғ(X)-factorization) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `treatedSurv_eq` | `E[ZВ·1{Y>c(X)}\|Пғ(X)] =бөҗ e(X)В·(1 вҲ’ F(c(X)\|X))` | the variable-cutoff bridge (frozen Пғ(X)-measurable `c`; variable-cutoff `condCDF` set-integral via the `condKernel` disintegration) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `exists_calibrating_cutoff` | `вҲғ c, Measurable[ПғX] c вҲ§ treatedSurv c =бөҗ survTarget Оӣ` | **the calibrating cutoff exists** вҖ” the conditional quantile `Q_{calibLevel}(X)` (via `measurable_condQuantile_and_attains`); needs overlap, `1<Оӣ`, atomless treated outcome law, interior level | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `msmUpperCalib_eq_cutoff_unconditional` | `вҲғ c, вҖҰ вҲ§ msmUpperCalib Оӣ = candMean (cutoffProp Оӣ c)` | **the DornвҖ“Guo sharp upper bound, UNCONDITIONALLY** вҖ” the quantile-balancing closed form with `hcut_mem` discharged (only overlap / `1<Оӣ` / atomless / interior-level / envelope-integrability regularity) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

Lower bound (`LowerBound.lean`) вҖ” the `sInf` mirror: the lower cutoff `lowerCutoffProp Оӣ c = 1/(wMin if Y>c else wMax)` (opposite weights) *minimizes* the candidate mean; `survTargetLower = (wMaxВ·eвҲ’1)/(wMaxвҲ’wMin) = e вҲ’ survTarget`:

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `lowerCutoffProp` / `survTargetLower` / `calibLevelLower` | defs | the minimizing cutoff weight, its calibration target, and quantile level | **Defined** |
| `cutoff_optimal_lower` | `candMean (lowerCutoffProp Оӣ c) вүӨ candMean бәҪ` for calibrated `бәҪ` | the lower cutoff is the NeymanвҖ“Pearson minimizer | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `msmLowerCalib_eq_cutoff` / `lowerCutoffProp_mem_MSMSetCalib_of_survival` | closed form given a calibrating cutoff; calibration вҹә `treatedSurv c = survTargetLower` | mirror of the upper reductions | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `exists_calibrating_cutoff_lower` | `вҲғ c, вҖҰ вҲ§ treatedSurv c =бөҗ survTargetLower Оӣ` | the lower calibrating cutoff exists (`Q_{calibLevelLower}(X)`) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `msmLowerCalib_eq_cutoff_unconditional` | `вҲғ c, вҖҰ вҲ§ msmLowerCalib Оӣ = candMean (lowerCutoffProp Оӣ c)` | **the DornвҖ“Guo sharp LOWER bound, unconditionally** | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

Control-arm cutoff stack (`ControlCutoff.lean`, `ControlQuantileBalance.lean`, `ControlCutoffConstruct.lean`, `ControlLowerBound.lean`) вҖ” the exact `D=0` mirror of the treated cutoff development (`wMin0`/`wMax0`/`cutoffProp0`/`lowerCutoffProp0`/`controlSurv`/`survTarget0`/`controlXYLaw`, the control condExpвҶ”condCDF bridge `controlSurv_const_eq`/`controlSurv_eq`, optimality, calibrationвҶ’survival reduction, construction). Capstones: `msmUpperCalib0_eq_cutoff_unconditional` and `msmLowerCalib0_eq_cutoff_unconditional` вҖ” the control sharp bounds in unconditional closed form. **Proved, axiom-clean.**

ATE closed form (`ATEClosedForm.lean`) вҖ” combines the four arm closed forms into the sharp ATE interval:

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ate_endpoints_eq_cutoff` | `ateUpperCalib = candMean(cutoffProp cTU) вҲ’ candMean0(lowerCutoffProp0 cCL)`, `ateLowerCalib = candMean(lowerCutoffProp cTL) вҲ’ candMean0(cutoffProp0 cCU)` | **the sharp ATE endpoints in closed form** (treated upper вҲ’ control lower, treated lower вҲ’ control upper), each a conditional-quantile candidate mean | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `ate_mem_Icc_cutoff` | `ate вҲҲ Icc (вҖҰclosed lowerвҖҰ) (вҖҰclosed upperвҖҰ)` | **the true ATE lies in the sharp closed-form interval** (endpoints + `ate_mem_Icc_calib` validity) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

Gaussian special case (`Gaussian.lean`) вҖ” the DornвҖ“Guo corollary under a conditional-Gaussian treated outcome law:

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `calibLevel_eq` | `calibLevel Оӣ =бөҗ Оӣ/(Оӣ+1)` | **the cutoff quantile level is exactly `Оӣ/(Оӣ+1)`**, independent of the propensity (since `survTarget = e/(Оӣ+1)`) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `GaussianTreatedModel m Пғ` | structure | the treated conditional law of `Y` given `X` is `N(m(X), Пғ(X)ВІ)` (`condCDF treatedXYLaw a = ОҰ((В·вҲ’m a)/Пғ a)`) | **Defined** |
| `gaussianCutoff` / `gaussianCutoff_calibrates` | `c(X)=m(X)+Пғ(X)В·ОҰвҒ»В№(Оӣ/(Оӣ+1))`; it solves `treatedSurv c =бөҗ survTarget Оӣ` | **the explicit Gaussian quantile cutoff** calibrates вҖ” no measurable-selection needed | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `msmUpperCalib_gaussian` | `msmUpperCalib Оӣ = candMean (cutoffProp Оӣ (m(X)+Пғ(X)В·ОҰвҒ»В№(Оӣ/(Оӣ+1))))` | **the sharp upper bound at the explicit Gaussian cutoff** | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

| `GaussianOutcomeModel` / `msmUpperCalib_gaussian_halfWidth` (`GaussianHalfWidth.lean`) | `msmUpperCalib Оӣ = вҲ« m(X) + (ОӣВІвҲ’1)/ОӣВ·ПҶ(ОҰвҒ»В№(Оӣ/(Оӣ+1)))В·вҲ« (1вҲ’e(X))В·Пғ(X)` | **the DornвҖ“Guo Gaussian closed-form half-width** вҖ” point-identified mean plus the half-width (`gaussianMSMHalfWidthFactor`); via the conditional Gaussian mean/truncated-mean moments + the per-stratum collapse `wMinВ·e+(wMaxвҲ’wMin)e/(Оӣ+1)=1` | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

(The reusable standard-normal substrate `ОҰ`, `probit = ОҰвҒ»В№`, the truncated first moment `вҲ«_c^вҲһ tПҶ = ПҶ(c)`, and the general Gaussian truncated moment `вҲ«_c^вҲһ y dN(m,v) = m(1вҲ’ОҰ)+вҲҡvВ·ПҶ` are in `Mathlib/Probability/StdNormalCDF.lean`, `StdNormalMoments.lean`, `GaussianMoments.lean`, В§10a'''.)

Scope: Phases 1вҖ“7 complete for BOTH arms (`E[Y(1)]`, `E[Y(0)]`) and the **ATE** вҖ” the sharp interval has unconditional quantile-balancing closed forms at every endpoint вҖ” plus the **Gaussian special case in full closed form** (explicit quantile cutoff + the half-width number). The MSM sharp-bound program is complete. The atomless (continuous-outcome) hypothesis is the DornвҖ“Guo caveat, faithfully carried; the covariate space `Оі` stays a general measurable space. See `doc/msm_sensitivity_plan.md`.

Control arm (`ControlSetup.lean`, `ControlSharp.lean`) вҖ” the `D=0` reflection of `Setup.lean`/`Sharp.lean`, bounding `E[Y(0)]` by IPW-weighting `1_{D=0}` against the complete control propensity `P[D=0 | Пғ(X,Y(0))]` (vs. observed `P[D=0 | Пғ(X)] = propScore false`). Every declaration mirrors the treated arm with a `0` suffix: `sigmaXY0`, `completeProp0`, `candMean0`, `Y0mean`, `MSMSet0`, `msmUpper0`/`msmLower0`, `Calibrated0`, `MSMSetCalib0`, `msmUpperCalib0`/`msmLowerCalib0`.

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `candMean0_completeProp0_eq_Y0mean` | `candMean0 eвӮҖ = E[Y(0)]` | **IPW/tower bridge (control)** вҖ” the `D=0` mirror of the treated bridge | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `Y0mean_mem_Icc` / `Y0mean_mem_Icc_calib` | `E[Y(0)] вҲҲ Icc (msmLower0 Оӣ) (msmUpper0 Оӣ)` / `вҖҰ Icc (msmLowerCalib0 Оӣ) (msmUpperCalib0 Оӣ)` | **the control ZSB / sharp interval is valid** | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `completeProp0_calibrated` | `Calibrated0 eвӮҖ` | the true complete control propensity is calibrated (`E[(1вҲ’Z)/eвӮҖ\|Пғ(X)]=1`) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `MSMSet0_mono` / `msmUpper0_mono` / `msmLower0_anti` / `MSMSet0_one_eq` | budget monotonicity + `Оӣ=1` collapse (control) | mirrors the treated structural lemmas | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `msmUpperCalib0_le_msmUpper0` / `msmLower0_le_msmLowerCalib0` | sharp control interval tighter than ZSB | mirrors the treated tightness lemmas | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

ATE interval (`ATE.lean`) вҖ” combines the two arms into a partial-ID interval for `П„ = E[Y(1)] вҲ’ E[Y(0)]` by *opposing* the arm bounds (`П„вҒә = ПҲ_TвҒә вҲ’ ПҲ_CвҒ»`, `П„вҒ» = ПҲ_TвҒ» вҲ’ ПҲ_CвҒә`):

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ate` | `в„қ := Y1mean вҲ’ Y0mean` | the average treatment effect `П„` | **Defined** |
| `ateUpperCalib Оӣ` / `ateLowerCalib Оӣ` | `в„қ := msmUpperCalib Оӣ вҲ’ msmLowerCalib0 Оӣ` / `msmLowerCalib Оӣ вҲ’ msmUpperCalib0 Оӣ` | the **sharp** ATE interval endpoints (treated upper paired with control lower, and vice versa) | **Defined** |
| `ateUpper Оӣ` / `ateLower Оӣ` | `в„қ := msmUpper Оӣ вҲ’ msmLower0 Оӣ` / `msmLower Оӣ вҲ’ msmUpper0 Оӣ` | the ZSB ATE interval endpoints | **Defined** |
| `sub_mem_Icc_of_mem_Icc` | `aвҲҲ[aвӮ—,aбөӨ] вҶ’ bвҲҲ[bвӮ—,bбөӨ] вҶ’ aвҲ’bвҲҲ[aвӮ—вҲ’bбөӨ, aбөӨвҲ’bвӮ—]` | interval-subtraction arithmetic core | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `ate_mem_Icc_calib` / `ate_mem_Icc` | `П„ вҲҲ Icc (ateLowerCalib Оӣ) (ateUpperCalib Оӣ)` / `вҖҰ (ateLower Оӣ) (ateUpper Оӣ)` | **the sharp / ZSB ATE interval is valid** (contains the true `П„`), from the two arm-wise validity statements | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `ateCalib_subset` | `Icc (ateLowerCalib Оӣ) (ateUpperCalib Оӣ) вҠҶ Icc (ateLower Оӣ) (ateUpper Оӣ)` | the sharp ATE interval nests inside the ZSB ATE interval | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

---

## 9j3. `PO/ID/Partial/BalkePearl/` вҖ” Balke-Pearl Sharp ATE Bounds (Binary IV, PO framework)

Formalizes sharp LP bounds on ATE from Balke & Pearl (1994) for a binary IV system.
All three variables Z, D, Y are binary (`Bool`). Split into four files:

- `BalkePearl/Setup.lean` вҖ” `POBalkePearlSystem` data layer, `ATE`, `cellProb`, `boolToReal`.
- `BalkePearl/Assumptions.lean` вҖ” `BaseAssumptions`, `cfBundle`.
- `BalkePearl/LatentTable.lean` вҖ” `latentProb` (16-cell table), partition lemmas, `ATE_eq_sum_latent`, `cellProb_eq_sum_latent`.
- `BalkePearl/Main.lean` вҖ” `BPFeasible`, `BPObjective`, `BPIdentifiedInterval`, necessity theorem.
- `BalkePearl/Sharp.lean` вҖ” canonical model construction, sharpness theorem.
- `BalkePearl/IntervalForm.lean` вҖ” necessity in closed-interval (`Set.Icc`) form via the SandwichInterval engine bridge.

### Setup (`BalkePearl/Setup.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POBalkePearlSystem P` | `structure { Z, D, Y, hZbool, hDbool, hYbool, hZD, hZY, hDY }` | Binary-IV subsystem: three distinct variables with Bool codomains | **Defined** |
| `boolToReal` | `Bool вҶ’ в„қ` | `false вҶҰ 0`, `true вҶҰ 1` | **Defined** |
| `ATE` | `в„қ := вҲ« (YofD_real true - YofD_real false) вҲӮP.Ој` | Target parameter, average treatment effect | **Defined** |
| `cellProb y d z` | `в„қ` | Observed joint probability `P(Y=y, D=d \| Z=z)` (as a real) | **Defined** |

### Assumptions (`BalkePearl/Assumptions.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `BaseAssumptions S` | `structure { consistency, exogeneity, ... }` | Structural assumptions: consistency of D and Y, exogeneity of Z | **Defined** |
| `cfBundle S` | auxiliary | Bundle of counterfactual random variables for the latent type partition | **Defined** |

### LatentTable (`BalkePearl/LatentTable.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `dArm z d0 d1` | `Bool` | Treatment arm selector: `d0` if `z=false`, `d1` if `z=true` | **Defined** |
| `yArm d y0 y1` | `Bool` | Outcome arm selector: `y0` if `d=false`, `y1` if `d=true` | **Defined** |
| `latentSet d0 d1 y0 y1` | `Set P.О©` | Event that unit has latent type `(D(0),D(1),Y(0),Y(1)) = (d0,d1,y0,y1)` | **Defined** |
| `latentProb d0 d1 y0 y1` | `в„қ` | Probability of latent type `(d0,d1,y0,y1)` | **Defined** |
| `latentProb_nonneg` | `0 вүӨ latentProb d0 d1 y0 y1` | Nonnegativity of cell probabilities | **Proved** |
| `latentProb_sum_eq_one` | `вҲ‘ d0 d1 y0 y1, latentProb = 1` | The 16 latent cells partition О© | **Proved** |
| `ATE_eq_sum_latent` | `ATE = вҲ‘ d0 d1 y0 y1, (y1-y0) * latentProb` | ATE expressed as weighted sum over latent types | **Proved** |
| `cfCellEvent z d y` | `Set P.О©` | Cf-cell `{Пү | DofZ z Пү = d вҲ§ YofD d Пү = y}` вҖ” internal helper | **private** |
| `cfTuple` | `P.О© вҶ’ BoolвҒҙ` | Product map `(D(0), D(1), Y(0), Y(1))` вҖ” independent of `Z` under exogeneity | **private** |
| `indepFun_factualZ_cfTuple hA` | `IndepFun factualZ cfTuple P.Ој` | Factual `Z` independent of cf tuple (derived from `IndepCF.project`) | **private** |
| `cellProb_eq_sum_latent hA y d z` | `cellProb y d z = вҲ‘ compatible latentProb` | Observed cell probability = sum over compatible latent types | **Proved** |

### Main (`BalkePearl/Main.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `BPFeasible S hA ПҖ` | `structure { nonneg, sum_one, marginal }` | Feasibility predicate: ПҖ is nonneg, sums to 1, reproduces all observed cell probabilities | **Defined** |
| `BPObjective ПҖ` | `в„қ := вҲ‘ d0 d1 y0 y1, (y1-y0) * ПҖ d0 d1 y0 y1` | LP objective functional on a latent table | **Defined** |
| `BPIdentifiedInterval S hA` | `Set в„қ` | Sharp LP identified interval for ATE: `IdentifiedInterval BPObjective (BPFeasible S hA)` | **Defined** |
| `latentProb_feasible hA` | `BPFeasible S hA S.latentProb` | The realized latent table is feasible | **Proved** |
| `ATE_eq_BPObjective` | `S.ATE = BPObjective S.latentProb` | ATE equals the LP objective at the realized table | **Proved** |
| `ATE_mem_BPIdentifiedInterval hA` | `S.ATE вҲҲ S.BPIdentifiedInterval hA` | NECESSITY: true ATE lies in the identified interval | **Proved** |
| `balkePearl_sharp hA ПҖ hПҖ` (in `Sharp.lean`) | `вҲғ P' S' hA', (вҲҖ y d z, S'.cellProb y d z = S.cellProb y d z) вҲ§ S'.ATE = BPObjective ПҖ` | SHARPNESS: every feasible latent table is realised by a model that reproduces S's observed cell probabilities | **Proved** |
| `balkePearl_sharp_of_mem hA П„ hП„` (in `Sharp.lean`) | `вҲғ P' S' hA', (вҲҖ y d z, S'.cellProb y d z = S.cellProb y d z) вҲ§ S'.ATE = П„` | П„-form corollary of sharpness for `BPIdentifiedInterval` membership | **Proved** |

### IntervalForm (`BalkePearl/IntervalForm.lean`)

Restates necessity in the engine's closed-interval vocabulary. `BPObjective` is an
average of `Вұ1`/`0` contrasts against a probability vector, hence always in `[-1,1]`;
this boundedness feeds the bridge `Causalean.PartialID.mem_Icc_csInf_csSup`.

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `BPObjective_le_one hnn hsum` | `BPObjective ПҖ вүӨ 1` | The LP objective is at most 1 on any feasible (nonneg, sum-one) table | **Proved** |
| `neg_one_le_BPObjective hnn hsum` | `-1 вүӨ BPObjective ПҖ` | The LP objective is at least -1 on any feasible table | **Proved** |
| `bddBelow_BPIdentifiedInterval hA` | `BddBelow (S.BPIdentifiedInterval hA)` | The identified interval is bounded below (by -1) | **Proved** |
| `bddAbove_BPIdentifiedInterval hA` | `BddAbove (S.BPIdentifiedInterval hA)` | The identified interval is bounded above (by 1) | **Proved** |
| `ATE_mem_Icc_csInf_csSup hA` | `S.ATE вҲҲ Set.Icc (sInf (S.BPIdentifiedInterval hA)) (sSup (S.BPIdentifiedInterval hA))` | NECESSITY, closed-interval form: the true ATE lies between the LP minimum and maximum, via the SandwichInterval bridge | **Proved** |

### Sharp (`BalkePearl/Sharp.lean`)

Canonical-model construction (~750 lines) discharging the sharpness direction.
The model has `V' = Fin 3` (Z, D, Y), `X' v = Bool`, sample space
`О©' = Bool Г— (Bool Г— Bool Г— Bool Г— Bool)`, and product measure
`Ој' = Ој_Z вҠ— ПҖ_meas` where `Ој_Z` is `S`'s Z-marginal and `ПҖ_meas` weights BoolвҒҙ
by ПҖ. The eval cascades Z вҶ’ D вҶ’ Y, respecting interventions.

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POBalkePearlSharp.SOmega/SV/SX` | `Type`/`Type`/`SV вҶ’ Type` | Canonical sample space, variable-index, codomain assignment | **Defined** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.eval r Пү` | `вҲҖ v, SX v` | Cascade evaluator for the canonical model | **Defined** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.zMeasure S` | `Measure Bool` | S's Z-marginal as a discrete measure | **Defined** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.piMeasure ПҖ` | `Measure BoolвҒҙ` | Discrete measure with weights ПҖ | **Defined** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonicalMeasure S ПҖ` | `Measure SOmega` | Product `zMeasure вҠ— piMeasure` | **Defined** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonicalPOSystem S ПҖ hПҖ_nn hПҖ_sum` | `POSystem` | Canonical PO system | **Defined** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonicalBP S ПҖ hПҖ_nn hПҖ_sum` | `POBalkePearlSystem _` | Canonical BP system | **Defined** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonical_consistency` | `Consistency` | Factual + composition consistency on the canonical model | **Proved** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonical_exclusion` | `YofZD z d = YofD d` | Pointwise (and a.e.) equality | **Proved** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonical_exogeneity` | `IndepCF zVar cfBundle Ој'` | Z вҠҘ cf-bundle, by `indepFun_prod` on the product measure | **Proved** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonical_posZ hA` | `0 < Ој'(zEvent z)` | Inherited from `hA.posZ` via Z-marginal identity | **Proved** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonical_baseAssumptions hA` | `S'.BaseAssumptions` | Bundle of the four | **Proved** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonical_latentProb_eq` | `S'.latentProb = ПҖ` | Marginal identity | **Proved** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonical_cellProb_eq hA hПҖ` | `S'.cellProb y d z = S.cellProb y d z` | Reproduces observed cell probabilities | **Proved** |
| `POBalkePearlSharp.canonical_ATE_eq hA` | `S'.ATE = BPObjective ПҖ` | LP objective realisation | **Proved** |
| `balkePearl_sharp hA ПҖ hПҖ` | (see Main row above) | The packaged sharpness theorem | **Proved** |

**Outstanding sorrys:** None. Both necessity (`ATE_mem_BPIdentifiedInterval`) and sharpness (`balkePearl_sharp`, `balkePearl_sharp_of_mem`) are fully proved.

---

## 9j4. `PO/ID/Partial/Proxy/` вҖ” Proximal Partial-Identification Bounds (Ghassami-Shpitser-Tchetgen Tchetgen 2024, Sections 2-3)

Formalises the partial-identification bounds of arXiv 2304.04374 вҖ” partial bounds on
ATE / `E[Y(a) | A=В¬a]` using proxy variables of an unobserved confounder, **without
the completeness condition** required for exact identification. Reuses
`POProximalSystem` from `PO/ID/Exact/Proximal/Setup.lean` (six POVars X, A, Z, W, Y, U).
Nine files (Helpers and ZBased are split into subdirectories):

- `Proxy/Setup.lean` вҖ” additional Пғ-algebras, target parameters, envelope predicates.
- `Proxy/Assumptions.lean` вҖ” three weakened bundles (`WBased`, `ZBased`, `TwoProxy`).
- `Proxy/Helpers.lean` вҖ” facade; re-exports `Helpers/{Common,BridgeW,BridgeWZ,CondExpQ}`.
- `Proxy/Helpers/Common.lean` вҖ” `meanYofA_eq_strata` + `YofA_essbound_*` clamp lemmas.
- `Proxy/Helpers/BridgeW.lean` вҖ” W-only bridge identity `condIntYofA_eq_h_arm`.
- `Proxy/Helpers/BridgeWZ.lean` вҖ” two-proxy bridge identity `condIntYofA_eq_hq_armSwap_twoProxy` (paper Theorem 3, identity (вҳ…), same-arm form, prob-ratio q convention).
- `Proxy/Helpers/CondExpQ.lean` вҖ” q-collapse on `{A=a}` Пғ_AX (prob-ratio q): `condExp_q_eq_stratumOddsRatio_arm_AX`.
- `Proxy/WBased.lean` вҖ” Theorem 1 + Corollary 1 (outcome-confounding-proxy).
- `Proxy/ZBased.lean` вҖ” Theorem 2 + Corollary 2 (imports `ZBased/ArmChain`).
- `Proxy/ZBased/ArmChain.lean` вҖ” paired arm-chain lemmas (`condIntYofA_le_envelope_arm` / `envelope_le_condIntYofA_arm`), ~600 lines. Both arm chains are now sorry-free in their bodies: the `hStep67` factorisation step is extracted as a private helper `condIntYq_factor_arm` and shared between the upper and lower variants.
- `Proxy/TwoProxy.lean` вҖ” Theorem 3 (two conditionally independent invalid proxies).
- `Proxy/IntervalForm.lean` вҖ” `Set.Icc` interval restatements of all five sandwich bounds (via the `SandwichInterval` bridge `mem_Icc_of_sandwich`).

### Setup (`Proxy/Setup.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `S.AX`, `S.Пғ_AX`, `S.Пғ_X` | tuple maps + Пғ-algebras | Conditioning targets `(A,X)` and `X` for partial-ID proofs | **Defined** |
| `S.Пғ_X_le_Пғ_AX` | `S.Пғ_X вүӨ S.Пғ_AX` | Пғ_X is coarser than Пғ_AX since `X = snd вҲҳ (A,X)`. Used in `WBased.lean` to lift Пғ_X-measurable `stratumOddsRatio В· Uenv(a,X)` to Пғ_AX for the pull-out step | **Proved** |
| `S.Пғ_AX_le_Пғ_AUX` | `S.Пғ_AX вүӨ S.Пғ_AUX` | Пғ_AX is coarser than Пғ_AUX since `(A,X)` factors through `(A,U,X)` via projection. Used by the Пғ_AX-tower step in `condExp_Y_eq_condExp_h_arm_AX` | **Proved** |
| `S.Пғ_X_le_Пғ_AUX` | `S.Пғ_X вүӨ S.Пғ_AUX` | Composition `Пғ_X вүӨ Пғ_AX вүӨ Пғ_AUX`. Used by `ArmChain.hStep9` to lift `Uenv(a,X)` Пғ_X-meas to Пғ_AUX for L1 pull-out | **Proved** |
| `S.Пғ_X_le_Пғ_UX` | `S.Пғ_X вүӨ S.Пғ_UX` | `X = snd вҲҳ (U, X)`. Used by `ArmChain.hStep10` to lift `Uenv(a,X)` Пғ_X-meas to Пғ_UX for L2 arm-swap | **Proved** |
| `S.Пғ_AZX_le_Пғ_AZUX` | `S.Пғ_AZX вүӨ S.Пғ_AZUX` | `(A,Z,X) = proj вҲҳ (A,Z,U,X)`. Reserved for Пғ_AZX-pull-out steps | **Proved** |
| `S.Пғ_AUX_le_Пғ_AZUX` | `S.Пғ_AUX вүӨ S.Пғ_AZUX` | `(A,U,X) = proj вҲҳ (A,Z,U,X)`. Reserved for Пғ_AUX-tower steps | **Proved** |
| `S.meanYofA Ој a` | `в„қ := вҲ« Y(a) dОј` | Marginal potential outcome mean | **Defined** |
| `S.condMeanYofA Ој a` | `в„қ := (Ој {Aвү a}).toRealвҒ»В№ * вҲ«_{Aвү a} Y(a) dОј` | Conditional PO mean `E[Y(a) | A=В¬a]` | **Defined** |
| `S.ATE Ој` | `в„қ := meanYofA Ој true - meanYofA Ој false` | Average treatment effect | **Defined** |
| `S.stratumOddsRatio Ој a` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Пғ_X-measurable `p(A=В¬a|X)/p(A=a|X)` | **Defined** |
| `S.IsUpperEnvW Ој a Uenv` | `Prop` | Integrated upper-envelope predicate for the W-density ratio (Thm 1) | **Defined** |
| `S.IsLowerEnvW Ој a Lenv` | `Prop` | Integrated lower-envelope predicate, mirror of above | **Defined** |
| `S.IsUpperEnvZ Ој a Uenv` | `Prop` | Pointwise upper bound `(Ој[Y \| Пғ_AZX]) вүӨ Uenv(a,X)` on `{A=a}` (Thm 2) | **Defined** |
| `S.IsLowerEnvZ Ој a Lenv` | `Prop` | Mirror lower bound | **Defined** |
| `S.IsUpperEnvWZ Ој a Uenv` | `Prop` | Same-arm joint-vs-product W-Z envelope (Thm 3): for nonneg measurable `ПҶ_W(W,X)`, `ПҶ_Z(Z,X)`, Ој-a.e. on `{A=a}`, `Ој[ПҶ_WВ·ПҶ_Z\|Пғ_AX] вүӨ Uenv(a,X)В·Ој[ПҶ_W\|Пғ_AX]В·Ој[ПҶ_Z\|Пғ_AX]`. Operational form of `ПҒ(w,z,x)=p(w,z\|a,x)/(p(w\|a,x)В·p(z\|a,x)) вүӨ Uenv(a,x)`; canonical sharp choice `Uenv(a,x)=sup_{w,z} ПҒ(w,z,x)` | **Defined** |
| `S.IsLowerEnvWZ Ој a Lenv` | `Prop` | Mirror with inequality reversed; canonical sharp `Lenv(a,x)=inf_{w,z} ПҒ(w,z,x)` | **Defined** |

### Assumptions (`Proxy/Assumptions.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `WBasedAssumptions S Ој` | `structure { consistency, latent_exch, proxy_WA, h, h_nonneg, bridge, вҖҰ, Y_bdd_below/above }` | Theorem 1 bundle: drops `proxy_YZ`, `completeness`, Z-fields. `h_nonneg : вҲҖ x, 0 вүӨ h x` is bundled (paper Assumption 2: a non-negative bridge is *posited* to exist; not derived from `Y вҠҶ [0, вҲһ)`, which does not force a bridge to be non-negative) | **Defined** |
| `ZBasedAssumptions S Ој` | `structure { consistency, latent_exch, proxy_YZ, q, bridge_q, likelihoodRatio_swapA, integrable_likelihoodRatio_swapA, integrable_condExpYofA_mul_L, integrable_condExpY_mul_q, integrable_Y_mul_q, вҖҰ, overlap_strong }` | Theorem 2 bundle: drops `proxy_WAZ`, `completeness`. **Probability-ratio q convention**: `likelihoodRatio_swapA_spec` operationally encodes `E[рқҹҷ{A=a}\|Пғ_UX]В·L =бөҗ E[рқҹҷ{A=В¬a}\|Пғ_UX]`, i.e. `L = p(В¬a\|U,X)/p(a\|U,X)` on the support of `E[рқҹҷ{A=a}\|Пғ_UX]`. This avoids RN derivatives; differs from the paper's density-ratio q `p(U\|В¬a,X)/p(U\|a,X)` by a factor of stratumOddsRatio (both yield the same observable bound). `overlap_strong` encodes paper Assumption 3 positivity `p(A=a\|U,X) > 0`. Four explicit integrability fields cover finiteness gaps not implied by strict overlap (paper's "all integrals finite" convention; Remark 5 forbids a Y-clamp): `integrable_likelihoodRatio_swapA` (L вҲҲ LВ№), `integrable_condExpYofA_mul_L` (`Ој[Y(a)\|Пғ_UX]В·L` вҲҲ LВ№), `integrable_condExpY_mul_q` (`Ој[Y\|Пғ_AZX]В·q(Z,a,X)` вҲҲ LВ№, used inside the Пғ_AZX-conditional envelope step), and `integrable_Y_mul_q` (`YВ·q(Z,a,X)` вҲҲ LВ№, used inside the proxy_YZ factorisation step that materialises `Ој[Y\|Пғ_AZX]` from `Ој[Y\|Пғ_AUX]В·Ој[q\|Пғ_AUX]`) | **Defined** |
| `TwoProxyAssumptions S Ој` | `structure { consistency, latent_exch, proxy_WZ_indep, h, h_nonneg, q, bridge_h, bridge_q, likelihoodRatio_swapA, integrable_hq_arm, вҖҰ }` | Theorem 3 bundle: requires both bridges, `h_nonneg`, and `W вҹӮ Z \| (A,X,U)` (paper Assumption 6). No `W вҹӮ A \| (U,X)` requirement (does not bundle `proxy_WA`); also drops `proxy_YZ`. Same prob-ratio q convention as `ZBasedAssumptions`. Bundles `integrable_hq_arm : вҲҖ a, Integrable (h(a,W,X)В·q(Z,a,X)) Ој` (separate LВ№ does not imply product LВ№) | **Defined** |

### Helpers (`Proxy/Helpers.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `meanYofA_eq_strata` | `meanYofA = вҲ«_{Aвү a} Y(a) + вҲ«_{A=a} Y` | Marginalisation identity (consistency on the on-arm); used to derive Cor 1, 2 from Thm 1, 2 | **Proved** |
| `YofA_essbound_above` / `_below` | `Y(a)` inherits `Y`'s a.e. essential bound | Lifts essential bounds on `Y` to the counterfactual `Y(a)` via `latent_exch` + consistency-on-arm; consumed by the trivial-clamp steps in W-side and TwoProxy theorems | **Proved** |
| `condIntYofA_eq_h_arm` | `вҲ«_{A=В¬a} Y(a) dОј = вҲ«_{A=В¬a} h(a,W,X) dОј` | Bridge-substitution identity for the W-only bundle | **Proved** |
| `condIntYofA_eq_hq_armSwap_twoProxy` | `вҲ«_{Aвү a} Y(a) dОј = вҲ«_{A=a} h(a,W,X) В· q(Z,a,X) dОј` | Two-proxy bridge-substitution identity in **same-arm form** (paper Theorem 3, identity (вҳ…), prob-ratio q convention). No `stratumOddsRatio` weight: the off-arm-to-on-arm transport is absorbed into `q` itself via `likelihoodRatio_swapA_spec`. The RHS is a clean `{A=a}` integral that the Пғ_AX-conditional envelope `IsUpperEnvWZ`/`IsLowerEnvWZ` applies to directly вҖ” no Пғ_AX-fiber transport needed. Proof structured as 4 named `have`s mirroring paper steps (a)вҖ“(d): `hStepA` (latent_exch + tower at Пғ_AUX вҶ’ вҲ«_{Aвү a} Ој[Y(a)\|Пғ_UX]), `hStepC` (likelihoodRatio_swapA_spec arm-swap via L2 вҶ’ вҲ«_{A=a} Ој[Y(a)\|Пғ_UX]В·L), `hStepB` (consistency + bridge_h substitution on `{A=a}` вҶ’ swap Ој[Y(a)\|Пғ_UX] for Ој[h(a,W,X)\|Пғ_AUX]), `hStepD1` (bridge_q вҶ’ swap L for Ој[q(Z,a,X)\|Пғ_AUX]), `hStepD2` (proxy_WZ_indep + condExp_mul_of_condIndep on (W,X) вҹӮ (Z,X) вҖ” built by two prodMk-left lifts via condIndepFun_prodMk_of_measurable_left + symm), `hStepD3` (tower {A=a} вҲҲ Пғ_AUX). Black-box dependencies: `condExp_mul_of_condIndep`, `condIndepFun_prodMk_of_measurable_left`; `setIntegral_eq_setIntegral_mul_of_likelihoodRatio_swap` (LikelihoodRatioSwap.lean) | **Proved** |
| `condExp_Y_eq_condExp_h_arm_AX_core` | `Ој[Y \| Пғ_AX] =бөҗ[restrict {A=a}] Ој[h(a,W,X) \| Пғ_AX]` | Raw-input collapse identity: takes a bridge function `h` together with `bridge`, `integrable_Y`, `integrable_h`, `integrable_h_arm` directly (no assumption-bundle dependency). Shared core used by both the WBased and TwoProxy wrappers. Proof: bridge equation + indicator-zero argument at Пғ_AUX, then Пғ_AX-tower via `Пғ_AX_le_Пғ_AUX` and `condExp_condExp_of_le` | **Proved** |
| `condExp_Y_eq_condExp_h_arm_AX` | wrapper for `WBasedAssumptions` | Bundled-input collapse identity for the W-only bundle; specialises `_core` with `HA.h, HA.bridge, HA.integrable_Y, HA.integrable_h, HA.integrable_h_arm` | **Proved** |
| `condExp_Y_eq_condExp_h_arm_AX_twoProxy` | wrapper for `TwoProxyAssumptions` | Same as above, but for the two-proxy bundle (`HA.bridge_h` plays the role of `bridge`); `TwoProxyAssumptions` does not contain `proxy_WA` so it cannot be projected to `WBasedAssumptions` | **Proved** |
| `setIntegral_mul_condExp_of_stronglyMeasurableLeft` | `вҲ«_s fВ·g dОј = вҲ«_s fВ·Ој[g\|m] dОј` for m-stronglyMeasurable f, integrable g and fВ·g, m-measurable s | Generic Mathlib-style helper combining `condExp_mul_of_stronglyMeasurable_left` with `setIntegral_condExp`. Used in `WBased.lean` to swap `h(a,W,X)` for `Ој[Y\|Пғ_AX]` inside `{A=a}` integrals (Fix C) | **Proved** |
| `stratumOddsRatio_spec` (private) | `Ој[рқҹҷ_{A=a}\|Пғ_X] В· stratumOddsRatio =бөҗ Ој[рқҹҷ_{A=В¬a}\|Пғ_X]` | Пғ_X projection of `likelihoodRatio_swapA_spec`: algebraic safe-division identity granted Пғ_X-positivity of `Ој[рқҹҷ_{A=a}\|Пғ_X]`. Closed via `field_simp` after invoking `Causalean.ae_pos_condExp_indicator_of_le` (the Пғ_X-projection of `overlap_strong`, isolated in `Mathlib/CondIndep.lean`) | **Proved** (modulo the labelled `ae_pos_condExp_indicator_of_le` stub in `Mathlib/CondIndep.lean`) |
| `condExp_q_eq_stratumOddsRatio_arm_AX` | `Ој[q(Z,a,X) \| Пғ_AX] =бөҗ[restrict {A=a}] stratumOddsRatio` | Prob-ratio q-collapse on `{A=a}` Пғ_AX. Under the codebase's prob-ratio q convention, the Пғ_AX-conditional expectation of `q(Z,a,X)` collapses on `{A=a}` to the Пғ_X-measurable stratum-odds ratio. Used in `condMeanYofA_WZ_bounds` to remove the latent bridge `q` from the public statement (parallel to `condExp_Y_eq_condExp_h_arm_AX` for `h`). Proof plan (see docstring): `ae_eq_condExp_of_forall_setIntegral_eq` over `(Ој.restrict {A=a}).trim` + Пғ_AX вҶ’ Пғ_X test-set reduction + the L1+L2+L2 chain (`setIntegral_mul_condExp_of_stronglyMeasurableLeft` + `setIntegral_eq_setIntegral_mul_of_likelihoodRatio_swap` twice) + `bridge_q` + `stratumOddsRatio_spec`. All substantive measure-theoretic gaps now isolated upstream вҖ” remaining body is mechanical bookkeeping (descent/integrability/measurability) | **Sorry** (mechanical bookkeeping only; no substantive gap remains in this body вҖ” substantive gap is now in `Mathlib/CondIndep.lean` `ae_pos_condExp_indicator_of_le`) |

### WBased (`Proxy/WBased.lean`) вҖ” Theorem 1 + Corollary 1

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `condMeanYofA_W_bounds` | sandwich on `condMeanYofA Ој a` | Theorem 1, observable form: `max(essinf Y, env-low) вүӨ E[Y(a) \| A=В¬a] вүӨ min(essup Y, env-up)` where the envelope integrals contain the **observable** factor `Ој[Y \| Пғ_AX]` (not the latent bridge `h`). Removed `h` from the public statement via the collapse identity `condExp_Y_eq_condExp_h_arm_AX` (Fix C). Takes 2 caller-supplied integrability hypotheses `hU_int_h`/`hL_int_h` for `(stratumOddsRatio В· Uenv/Lenv(a,X)) В· h(a,W,X)` (paper's implicit "all integrals finite" convention; not bundled because `Uenv`/`Lenv` are theorem-level parameters) | **Proved** |
| `meanYofA_W_bounds` | sandwich on `meanYofA Ој a` | Corollary 1, observable form with **trivial-clamp** (paper arXiv lines 177-195): `max(essinfY В· Ој{Aвү a}, envelope-lower) + вҲ«_{A=a} Y dОј вүӨ E[Y(a)] вүӨ min(essupY В· Ој{Aвү a}, envelope-upper) + вҲ«_{A=a} Y dОј`. The trivial clamp `essinfY В· Ој{Aвү a}` corresponds to the worst-case potential outcome on the off-arm stratum. Derived via `meanYofA_eq_strata` from the conditional bound, with the off-arm trivial clamp from `YofA_essbound_above`/`_below`. Takes 4 caller-supplied integrability hypotheses for `(stratumOddsRatio В· Uenv/Lenv(a,X)) В· h(a,W,X)` and the `Ој[Y\|Пғ_AX]` analogues (paper's implicit "all integrals finite" convention; not bundled because `Uenv`/`Lenv` are theorem-level parameters) | **Proved** |

Chain restructured to use Пғ_AUX (not Пғ_UX) at step (4), avoiding the missing `Y вҹӮ A \| Пғ_UX` lift. Takes three theorem-level integrability hypotheses (`hUInt`, `hU_q`, `hU_L`) for envelope В· q and envelope В· L pairings (paper's implicit-finiteness convention) | **Proved** |

No clamp needed (Remark 5). Takes 6 caller-supplied integrability hypotheses (`hLInt`, `hUInt`, `hL_q`, `hU_q`, `hL_L`, `hU_L`) threaded into the arm-chain lemmas | **Proved** (modulo `Mathlib/CondIndep.lean` stubs propagated through the arm chains) |
| `meanYofA_Z_bounds` | sandwich on `meanYofA Ој a` | Corollary 2: marginal version via `meanYofA_eq_strata` + `linarith`. Takes the same 6 caller-supplied integrability hypotheses as `condMeanYofA_Z_bounds` | **Proved** (modulo `Mathlib/CondIndep.lean` stubs propagated through the arm chains) |

Takes 2 caller-supplied integrability hypotheses `hU_envInt`/`hL_envInt` for the envelope-bound integrand `Uenv/Lenv(a,X) В· Ој[h\|Пғ_AX] В· Ој[q\|Пғ_AX]` (paper's implicit "all integrals finite" convention; Phase B decision mirroring WBased) | **Proved** (modulo black-box helpers `condIntYofA_eq_hq_armSwap_twoProxy` and `condExp_q_eq_stratumOddsRatio_arm_AX` which carry their own sorries) |

### IntervalForm (`Proxy/IntervalForm.lean`) вҖ” `Set.Icc` interval restatements

Mechanical `Set.Icc` membership corollaries of the five proximal sandwich
theorems: each pushes the source conjunction `L вүӨ Оё вҲ§ Оё вүӨ U` through the adapter
`Causalean.PartialID.mem_Icc_of_sandwich` to get `Оё вҲҲ Set.Icc L U`, matching the
abstract identified-set vocabulary of `PartialID/Basic.lean`. Same binders as the
source theorems; no new mathematical content.

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `condMeanYofA_W_mem_Icc` | `condMeanYofA Ој a вҲҲ Set.Icc L U` | Closed-interval `Set.Icc` form of the W-proxy conditional `E[Y(a) \| A=В¬a]` bound (`condMeanYofA_W_bounds`), via the `SandwichInterval` bridge | **Proved** |
| `meanYofA_W_mem_Icc` | `meanYofA Ој a вҲҲ Set.Icc L U` | Closed-interval `Set.Icc` form of the W-proxy marginal `E[Y(a)]` bound (`meanYofA_W_bounds`), via the `SandwichInterval` bridge | **Proved** |
| `condMeanYofA_Z_mem_Icc` | `condMeanYofA Ој a вҲҲ Set.Icc L U` | Closed-interval `Set.Icc` form of the Z-proxy conditional `E[Y(a) \| A=В¬a]` bound (`condMeanYofA_Z_bounds`), via the `SandwichInterval` bridge | **Proved** |
| `meanYofA_Z_mem_Icc` | `meanYofA Ој a вҲҲ Set.Icc L U` | Closed-interval `Set.Icc` form of the Z-proxy marginal `E[Y(a)]` bound (`meanYofA_Z_bounds`), via the `SandwichInterval` bridge | **Proved** |
| `condMeanYofA_WZ_mem_Icc` | `condMeanYofA Ој a вҲҲ Set.Icc L U` | Closed-interval `Set.Icc` form of the two-proxy conditional `E[Y(a) \| A=В¬a]` bound (`condMeanYofA_WZ_bounds`), via the `SandwichInterval` bridge | **Proved** |

**Out of scope (deferred):**
- Section 4 (mediator NIE/NDE; hidden front-door) вҖ” needs new mediator counterfactual layer in `Causalean/PO/`.
- Section 5 (LSE smooth approximation, bootstrap CIs) вҖ” statistical inference content.
- Sharpness вҖ” the paper does not establish sharpness for these bounds.

## 9j5. `PO/ID/Partial/Lee/` вҖ” Lee Bounds for Sample-Selection ATT (PO framework)

Formalises `prop:po-lee-bounds` from `Basic Concepts.tex`
(В§`subsec:po-lee-bounds`): a partial-identification sandwich bound for the
**always-selected ATT** `П„_AS = E[Y(1) - Y(0) | alwaysSelected]` under
sample selection. Hypotheses are random assignment (encoded as the
pair-level independence `A в«« (Y(a), Sel(a))` for each `a`), monotone sample
selection `Sel(0) вүӨ Sel(1)`, and a finite-support restriction on
`L(Y | A=true, Sel=true)`. The bound takes the form
`underline_mвӮҒ - mвӮҖ вүӨ П„_AS вүӨ overline_mвӮҒ - mвӮҖ`, where
`underline_mвӮҒ`, `overline_mвӮҒ` are the lower and upper Lee trimmed means and
`mвӮҖ = E[Y | A=false, Sel=true]` is the observable selected-control mean.

The quantile form (rem:po-lee-quantile) is deferred to a follow-on file.

Layout (one file per topic, all proofs complete):

- `Lee/Setup.lean` вҖ” `POLeeSystem` data + factual / counterfactual
  accessors + observable cells `selectedTreated`, `selectedControl`.
- `Lee/Assumptions.lean` вҖ” `BaseAssumptions` (consistency, pair-level
  random assignment, positivity, integrability) + `MonotoneSelection`.
- `Lee/Trim.lean` вҖ” selected-cell probabilities `p0`, `p1`, ratio `rho`,
  observable density `f1`, `LeeTrimWeight`, mean `Mw`, trimmed means
  `lowerTrimMean` / `upperTrimMean`, observable selected-control mean `m0`.
- `Lee/PrincipalStrata.lean` вҖ” latent events `alwaysSelected`,
  `helpedSelected`, `harmedSelected`; the pure set equality
  `selOfATrueSet = alwaysSelected вҲӘ helpedSelected`; under monotone
  selection, the a.s. identities collapsing latent events to observables.
- `Lee/ControlMean.lean` вҖ” Step A: `m0_eq_eventCondExp_Y0_alwaysSelected`
  collapses observable `mвӮҖ = E[Y|A=false,Sel=true]` to latent
  `E[Y(0)|alwaysSelected]`.
- `Lee/MixtureIdentity.lean` вҖ” selected-treated decomposition (the doc's
  "mixture law"): `selectedTreated_integral_split` (Step B),
  `selectedTreated_measure_split` (Step B'), and the indicator-integrand
  variant `selectedTreated_integral_split_indicator`.
- `Lee/LatentSupport.lean` вҖ” `YofA_true_in_finset_ae_alwaysSelected`:
  finite outcome support transfers from observable cell to latent strata.
- `Lee/TrimWeight.lean` вҖ” `f1AS` density + the
  `alwaysSelectedTrimWeight` `LeeTrimWeight` witness with all four field
  proofs (`nonneg`, `le_one`, `zero_off`, `sum_eq`).
- `Lee/TrimMean.lean` вҖ” `Mw_alwaysSelectedTrimWeight_eq_condExp_Y1_AS`:
  the witness's trimmed mean equals `E[Y(1)|alwaysSelected]`.
- `Lee/TrimBound.lean` вҖ” `trimmed_bounds_condExp_Y1_AS`: corresponding
  sandwich `lowerTrimMean рқ’ҙ вүӨ E[Y(1)|alwaysSelected] вүӨ upperTrimMean рқ’ҙ`.
  The `csInf`/`csSup` step is now routed through the engine bridge
  `Causalean.PartialID.mem_Icc_csInf_csSup` (see В§9j2 `SandwichInterval.lean`);
  the trimmed-mean endpoints are exactly the inf/sup of `Mw` over the
  unidentified trim-weight nuisance.
- `Lee/Main.lean` вҖ” `lee_bounds_ATT_AS` (prop:po-lee-bounds): final
  assembly via `eventCondExp_sub` on `alwaysSelected`.
- `Lee.lean` вҖ” umbrella re-export.

### Setup (`Lee/Setup.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POLeeSystem P` | `structure { A, Sel, Y, hAbool, hSelbool, hYreal, hASel, hAY, hSelY }` | Lee sample-selection subsystem over a PO system: binary `A`, binary `Sel` (selection), real `Y`, pairwise distinctness | **Defined** |
| `aVar` / `selVar` / `yVar` | `POVar P Bool` / `POVar P Bool` / `POVar P в„қ` | `POVar` wrappers for the three nodes | **Defined** |
| `SelOfA S a` | `P.О© вҶ’ Bool` | Counterfactual selection `Sel(a) := selVar.cfUnder aVar a` | **Defined** |
| `YofA S a` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Counterfactual outcome `Y(a) := yVar.cfUnder aVar a` | **Defined** |
| `factualA / factualSel / factualY` | `P.О© вҶ’ Bool / Bool / в„қ` | Factual treatment / selection / outcome | **Defined** |
| `aEvent S a` / `selEvent S s` | `Set P.О©` | Factual events `{A = a}` / `{Sel = s}` | **Defined** |
| `selectedTreated` | `Set P.О© := aEvent true вҲ© selEvent true` | Observable selected-treated cell | **Defined** |
| `selectedControl` | `Set P.О© := aEvent false вҲ© selEvent true` | Observable selected-control cell | **Defined** |
| measurability lemmas | `measurable_{SelOfA, YofA, factualA, factualSel, factualY}`, `measurableSet_{aEvent, selEvent, selectedTreated, selectedControl}` | One-line delegations to `POVar` | **Proved** |

### Assumptions (`Lee/Assumptions.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `BaseAssumptions S` | `structure { consistency, randAssign, posSelectedTreated, posSelectedControl, posATrue, posAFalse, posSelTrFinite, posSelCtFinite, integrableY1, integrableY0 }` | Common bundle for prop:po-lee-bounds. Factual-`Y` integrability is *derived*, not bundled (see `integrableY`) | **Defined** |
| `BaseAssumptions.randAssign` | `вҲҖ a : Bool, IndepFun S.factualA (fun Пү => (S.YofA a Пү, S.SelOfA a Пү)) P.Ој` | Pair-level random assignment; weaker than the doc's 4-tuple joint indep, but strictly stronger than mean independence вҖ” carries the conditional distribution of `(Y(a), Sel(a))` given `A` | **Defined** |
| `BaseAssumptions.integrable_YofA hA a` | `Integrable (S.YofA a) P.Ој` | Binary-folded form of `integrableY1` / `integrableY0` | **Proved** |
| `BaseAssumptions.integrableY hA` | `Integrable S.factualY P.Ој` | Factual outcome integrability, *derived* from arm integrability via consistency (`factualY = ОЈ_a Y(a)В·1{A=a}` a.e.); no longer an assumed field | **Proved** |
| `MonotoneSelection S` | `Prop { monotone }` | Monotone sample selection: `Sel(0) вүӨ Sel(1)` a.s. | **Defined** |

### Trim (`Lee/Trim.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `pSelGivenA S a` | `в„қ` | `eventCondExp Ој (aEvent a) (selVar.indicator true)` вҖ” conditional selection probability | **Defined** |
| `p0` / `p1` | `в„қ` | Selected-cell probabilities `P(Sel=true | A=false)` / `P(Sel=true | A=true)` | **Defined** |
| `rho` | `в„қ := p0 / p1` | Trimming ratio | **Defined** |
| `f1 S y` | `в„қ` | Observable density `P(Y=y | A=true, Sel=true)` via `eventCondExp` of an `if-then-else` indicator | **Defined** |
| `LeeTrimWeight S рқ’ҙ` | `structure { w, nonneg, le_one, zero_off, sum_eq }` | Lee trim weight on a finite outcome support `рқ’ҙ : Finset в„қ` (def:po-lee-trim) | **Defined** |
| `Mw wt` | `в„қ := rhoвҒ»В№ * вҲ‘ y вҲҲ рқ’ҙ, y * wt.w y * f1 y` | Mean of a trim weight | **Defined** |
| `lowerTrimMean рқ’ҙ` / `upperTrimMean рқ’ҙ` | `в„қ` | `sInf` / `sSup` of `Set.range (fun wt => Mw wt)` | **Defined** |
| `m0` | `в„қ := eventCondExp Ој selectedControl factualY` | Observable selected-control mean | **Defined** |

### PrincipalStrata (`Lee/PrincipalStrata.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `alwaysSelected` | `Set P.О© := {Пү | SelOfA false Пү = true вҲ§ SelOfA true Пү = true}` | Latent always-selected stratum | **Defined** |
| `helpedSelected` | `Set P.О© := {Пү | SelOfA false Пү = false вҲ§ SelOfA true Пү = true}` | Latent treatment-induced-selected stratum | **Defined** |
| `harmedSelected` | `Set P.О© := {Пү | SelOfA false Пү = true вҲ§ SelOfA true Пү = false}` | Latent harmed stratum (a.s. empty under monotone selection) | **Defined** |
| `selOfATrueSet` / `selOfAFalseSet` | `Set P.О©` | The latent sets `{Sel(1)=true}` / `{Sel(0)=true}` | **Defined** |
| measurability lemmas | `measurableSet_{alwaysSelected, helpedSelected, harmedSelected, selOfATrueSet, selOfAFalseSet}` | One-line delegations to `Measurable.preimage` of singletons | **Proved** |
| `selOfATrueSet_eq_alwaysSelected_union_helpedSelected` | `S.selOfATrueSet = S.alwaysSelected вҲӘ S.helpedSelected` | Pure set equality (no a.s.) by case analysis on `SelOfA false Пү : Bool` | **Proved** |
| `disjoint_alwaysSelected_helpedSelected` | `Disjoint S.alwaysSelected S.helpedSelected` | The two latent strata are disjoint | **Proved** |
| `harmedSelected_ae_empty` | `MonotoneSelection вҮ’ Ој harmedSelected = 0` | Harmed stratum is null under monotone selection | **Proved** |
| `selOfAFalseSet_ae_eq_alwaysSelected` | `MonotoneSelection вҮ’ {Sel(0)=true} =бөҗ alwaysSelected` | Latent `{Sel(0)=true}` collapses (a.s.) to alwaysSelected | **Proved** |

### ControlMean (`Lee/ControlMean.lean`) вҖ” Step A

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `m0_eq_eventCondExp_Y0_alwaysSelected` | `BaseAssumptions, MonotoneSelection вҮ’ m0 = eventCondExp Ој alwaysSelected (YofA false)` | Identifies `mвӮҖ` (observable selected-control mean) as the latent always-selected mean of `Y(0)`, via consistency on `{A=false, Sel=true}` plus drop-of-conditioning from `randAssign false` plus monotone-selection collapse `{Sel(0)=true} =бөҗ alwaysSelected` | **Proved** |

### MixtureIdentity (`Lee/MixtureIdentity.lean`) вҖ” Step B / B' / indicator

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `selectedTreated_integral_split` | `BaseAssumptions, MonotoneSelection вҮ’ вҲ« in selectedTreated, factualY = (Ој(aEvent true)).toReal В· (вҲ« in alwaysSelected, YofA true + вҲ« in helpedSelected, YofA true)` | Step B: selected-treated integral splits along the latent strata, with the `Ој(A=true)` mass factor from drop-of-conditioning | **Proved** |
| `selectedTreated_measure_split` | `BaseAssumptions, MonotoneSelection вҮ’ (Ој selectedTreated).toReal = (Ој(aEvent true)).toReal В· ((Ој alwaysSelected).toReal + (Ој helpedSelected).toReal)` | Step B': mass-level analogue (constant integrand `1`) | **Proved** |
| `selectedTreated_integral_split_indicator y` | `BaseAssumptions, MonotoneSelection вҮ’ вҲ« in selectedTreated, 1_{factualY = y} = (Ој(aEvent true)).toReal В· (вҲ« in alwaysSelected, 1_{YofA true = y} + вҲ« in helpedSelected, 1_{YofA true = y})` | Step B for indicator integrand `1_{Y=y}`; used by `TrimWeight` to bound the trim-weight from `f1` | **Proved** |

### LatentSupport (`Lee/LatentSupport.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `YofA_true_in_finset_ae_alwaysSelected` | `BaseAssumptions, MonotoneSelection, рқ’ҙ : Finset в„қ, hSupp вҮ’ (вҲҖбөҗ Пү вҲӮ(Ој.restrict alwaysSelected), YofA true Пү вҲҲ рқ’ҙ) вҲ§ (вҲҖбөҗ Пү вҲӮ(Ој.restrict helpedSelected), YofA true Пү вҲҲ рқ’ҙ)` | Transfers the finite-support hypothesis from observable cell to latent strata via consistency + drop-of-conditioning + monotone selection | **Proved** |

### TrimWeight (`Lee/TrimWeight.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `f1AS y` | `в„қ := eventCondExp Ој alwaysSelected (fun Пү => if YofA true Пү = y then 1 else 0)` | Conditional density of `Y(1)` on `alwaysSelected` at `y` | **Defined** |
| `alwaysSelectedTrimWeight hA hMono рқ’ҙ hSupp` | `LeeTrimWeight рқ’ҙ` with `w(y) := if y вҲҲ рқ’ҙ вҲ§ S.f1 y вү  0 then S.rho * S.f1AS y / S.f1 y else 0` | Lee-trim-weight witness for the always-selected sub-distribution; the four field proofs (`nonneg`, `le_one`, `zero_off`, `sum_eq`) collapse via `selectedTreated_integral_split_indicator` and `YofA_true_in_finset_ae_alwaysSelected` | **Proved** |

### TrimMean (`Lee/TrimMean.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Mw_alwaysSelectedTrimWeight_eq_condExp_Y1_AS` | `Mw (alwaysSelectedTrimWeight hA hMono рқ’ҙ hSupp) = eventCondExp Ој alwaysSelected (YofA true)` | The trimmed mean of the always-selected witness equals `E[Y(1)|alwaysSelected]`; the `ПҒвҒ»В№` in `Mw` cancels the `ПҒ` numerator built into `w` | **Proved** |

### TrimBound (`Lee/TrimBound.lean`)

| Symbol | Type | Description | Status |

### Status

- Lee module is sorry-free; full `lake build Causalean.PO.ID.Partial.Lee` succeeds with zero errors and zero `sorry` warnings on Lee files.

## 9k. `PO/ID/Exact/Frontdoor.lean` вҖ” Frontdoor ATE Identification Theorem (PO framework)

Formalizes `prop:po-frontdoor-ate` from `Basic Concepts.tex`
(В§`subsec:po-frontdoor-ate`, lines ~1518вҖ“1691): **classical frontdoor
identification of the ATE** under binary treatment `A`, discrete mediator `M`
(finite value space `ОІ`), and real outcome `Y`. The proof pattern relies on the
*composition* clause of `POSystem.Consistency` to collapse the two-variable
counterfactual `Y(a, M(a))` to `Y(a)` on `{M(a) = m}`, plus full mediation and
two exchangeability assumptions.  Event-level style throughout
(`eventCondExp`), matching `Manski.lean` / `DID.lean`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POFrontdoorSystem P ОІ` | `structure { A, M, Y, hAbool, hMequiv, hYreal, hAM, hAY, hMY }` | Frontdoor PO subsystem: binary treatment `A`, discrete mediator `M : ОІ` (finite), real outcome `Y`, pairwise distinctness | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.{aVar, mVar, yVar}` | `POVar P Bool` / `POVar P ОІ` / `POVar P в„қ` | `POVar` wrappers | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.{YofA, MofA}` | `Bool вҶ’ P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` / `Bool вҶ’ P.О© вҶ’ ОІ` | Single-target counterfactuals `Y(a)`, `M(a)` | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.regimeAM S a m` | `Regime P.V P.X` | Two-target intervention `{A вҶҗ a, M вҶҗ m}` as a `Regime.sqcup` of two singletons (disjointness from `hAM`) | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.YofAM S a m` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ := yVar.cf (regimeAM a m)` | Two-variable counterfactual `Y(a, m)` | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.{factualA, factualM, factualY}` | `P.О© вҶ’ Bool` / `ОІ` / `в„қ` | Factual treatment / mediator / outcome | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.measurable_{YofA, MofA, YofAM, factualA, factualM, factualY}` | `Measurable вҖҰ` | One-line measurability delegations to `POVar.measurable_{cf, cfUnder, factual}` | **Proved** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.{aEvent, mEvent}` | `Set P.О©` | Factual events `{A = a}`, `{M = m}` (indicators are now `POVar.indicator` on the corresponding `POVar`) | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.measurableSet_{aEvent, mEvent}` | вҖ” | Measurability of the factual events | **Proved** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.mUnderA S a` | `RegimedVar P ОІ` | `M(a)` as a regimed variable, for bundling | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.mBundle S` | `POCFBundle P` | Two-entry bundle `[M(true), M(false)]`, used to state `A вҠҘ (M(1), M(0))` | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.{pA, pMgivenA, EYgivenAM}` | `в„қ` | Observable `P(A=a)`, `P(M=m \| A=a)`, `E[Y \| A=a, M=m]` (event-level) | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.frontdoorTerm S a` | `в„қ := вҲ‘ m, (EYgivenAM 1 m В· pA 1 + EYgivenAM 0 m В· pA 0) В· pMgivenA m a` | Frontdoor-adjusted functional `ПҶ(a)` | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.{ATE, frontdoorATE}` | `в„қ` | Target parameter `E[Y(1) - Y(0)]` and its observable counterpart `ПҶ(1) - ПҶ(0)` | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.Assumptions S` | `structure { consistency, fullMediation, exch_AM, exch_MY, posA, posAM, indep_Y_M, integrable_{factualY, YofA, YofAM} }` | Full bundle of PO-level frontdoor assumptions from `def:po-frontdoor-ate-assumptions`.  The extra field `indep_Y_M : вҲҖ a m, IndepFun (MofA a) (YofAM true m) Ој` is a cross-world independence assumption needed for the drop-of-conditioning step; it is not derivable from the other fields in the bare PO framework (would follow from d-separation in the graphical frontdoor setup) | **Defined** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.MofA_eq_factualM_on_aEvent` | `P.Consistency вҶ’ Пү вҲҲ aEvent a вҶ’ MofA a Пү = factualM Пү` | On `{A = a}`, the single-target counterfactual `M(a)` coincides with the factual mediator; one-line shim on `POVar.cf_eq_factual_on_event` | **Proved** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.YofAM_eq_factualY_on_aMEvent` | `P.Consistency вҶ’ Пү вҲҲ aEvent a вҲ© mEvent m вҶ’ YofAM a m Пү = factualY Пү` | On `{A = a} вҲ© {M = m}`, the two-variable counterfactual `Y(a,m)` coincides with the factual outcome; built on `POVar.cf_eq_factual_of_factualAgrees` via a `sqcup`-case-split factual-agreement proof | **Proved** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.YofAM_eq_YofA_on_MofA_event` | `P.Consistency вҶ’ MofA a Пү = m вҶ’ YofAM a m Пү = YofA a Пү` | **Composition lemma**: on `{M(a) = m}`, `Y(a,m) = Y(a)` pointwise; reduces the two-target counterfactual to the single-target one via `Consistency.composition` applied to the disjoint singletons `{A вҶҗ a}` and `{M вҶҗ m}` | **Proved** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.integral_eq_sum_integral_MofA` | `Integrable f Ој вҶ’ вҲ« f вҲӮОј = вҲ‘ m : ОІ, вҲ« Пү in {MofA a = В·}, f Пү вҲӮОј` | Finite-partition helper: decompose an integral along the level sets of the counterfactual mediator `MofA a` (valid since `ОІ` is `Fintype`) | **Proved** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.integral_eq_sum_eventCondExp_aEvent` | `Integrable g Ој вҶ’ вҲ« g вҲӮОј = вҲ‘ a' : Bool, eventCondExp Ој (aEvent a') g В· Ој(aEvent a').toReal` | Bool-partition tower: express `вҲ« g` as the sum over treatment arms of arm-conditional means weighted by arm probability | **Proved** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.EofY_eq_frontdoorTerm` | `S.Assumptions вҶ’ вҲҖ a, вҲ« YofA a вҲӮP.Ој = frontdoorTerm a` | **Frontdoor identification (individual regime):** `E[Y(a)] = ПҶ(a)` for each `a вҲҲ {0,1}`.  Closes in four blocks: (A) mediator-marginal identity `Ој(MofA a = m).toReal = pMgivenA m a` via `exch_AM.component` + consistency; (B) on-slice composition + full-mediation rewrite `вҲ«_{MofA a = m} YofA a = вҲ«_{MofA a = m} YofAM true m`; (C) drop-of-conditioning via `indep_Y_M`; (D) inner tower `вҲ« YofAM true m = вҲ‘_{a'} EYgivenAM a' m В· pA a'` via `integral_eq_sum_eventCondExp_aEvent` + `exch_MY` + `fullMediation` + `YofAM_eq_factualY_on_aMEvent` | **Proved** |
| `POFrontdoorSystem.ate_frontdoor` | `S.Assumptions вҶ’ S.ATE = S.frontdoorATE` | **Frontdoor identification of the ATE** `prop:po-frontdoor-ate`: immediate corollary of `EofY_eq_frontdoorTerm` at `a = 1, 0` by linearity of the integral | **Proved** |

---

## 9l. `PO/ID/Exact/Proximal/` вҖ” Proximal ATE Identification (PO framework, skeleton)

Proximal causal inference ATE identification under binary treatment `A`,
outcome-side proxy `W`, treatment-side proxy `Z`, latent confounder `U`, and covariate `X`.
Implements def:po-proximal-ate from Basic Concepts.tex В§2555вҖ“2622.
Split into four files: **Setup** (data layer), **Assumptions** (assumption bundle), **Helpers** (CE manipulations), **Main** (identification theorems).

### `Proximal/Setup.lean` вҖ” Data layer

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POProximalSystem P Оі_X Оі_Z Оі_W Оі_U` | `structure { Xvar, Avar, Zvar, Wvar, Yvar, Uvar }` | Six `POVar`s: covariate `X`, binary treatment `A`, treatment-side proxy `Z`, outcome-side proxy `W`, real outcome `Y`, latent confounder `U` | **Defined** |
| `S.{X, A, Z, W, Y, U}` | `P.О© вҶ’ Оі_*` | Factual maps for each variable | **Defined** |
| `S.YofA a` | `P.О© вҶ’ в„қ` | Potential outcome `Y(a) := Yvar.cfUnder Avar a` | **Defined** |
| `S.{AZX, AUX, UX, AZUX}` | `P.О© вҶ’ Bool Г— вҖҰ` | Tuple maps used as conditioning targets | **Defined** |
| `S.{Пғ_AZX, Пғ_AUX, Пғ_UX, Пғ_AZUX}` | `MeasurableSpace P.О©` | Пғ-algebras generated by the respective tuples | **Defined** |
| `S.{Пғ_AZX_le, Пғ_AUX_le, Пғ_UX_le, Пғ_AZUX_le}` | `S.Пғ_* вүӨ inferInstance` | Sub-Пғ-algebra proofs for each | **Proved** |

### `Proximal/Assumptions.lean` вҖ” Assumption bundle

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POProximalSystem.Assumptions S Ој` | `structure { consistency, latent_exch, proxy_YZ, proxy_WAZ, h, measurable_h, integrable_hAWX, bridge, positivity_arm, completeness, integrable_{Y,YofA0,YofA1,h0WX,h1WX} }` | Full proximal assumption bundle (def:po-proximal-assumptions): consistency, latent exchangeability Y(a) вҹӮ A \| (U,X), outcome proxy Y вҹӮ Z \| (A,U,X), treatment proxy W вҹӮ (A,Z) \| (U,X), outcome bridge function `h` with E[Y вҲ’ h(A,W,X) \| A,Z,X] = 0, `positivity_arm` (Miao 2018 Asm. 7: each treatment arm has positive conditional probability given (U,X)), stratum-wise Z-completeness for (U,X) functionals on each arm `{A=a}` (Miao 2018 Asm. 8), and integrabilities | **Defined** |

### `Proximal/Helpers.lean` вҖ” Conditional-expectation manipulation lemmas

Six helper lemmas for the proximal ATE proof.  The five "drop conditioning" lemmas remain `sorry`'d pending downstream proof cleanup around the now-proved generic drop-conditioning lemma; the sixth (`eq_zero_globally_of_eq_zero_on_arm`) is proved and uses `positivity_arm` to lift a stratum-wise zero Пғ_UX-measurable function to global Ој-zero.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `condExp_drop_Z HA` | `Ој[S.Y \| S.Пғ_AZUX] =бөҗ[Ој] Ој[S.Y \| S.Пғ_AUX]` | Drop Z from conditioning on Y: Y вҹӮ Z \| (A,U,X) makes Z irrelevant in Пғ(A,Z,U,X) | **sorry** (needs `condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep`) |
| `condExp_h_drop_Z HA a` | `Ој[h(a,W,X) \| Пғ_AZUX] =бөҗ[Ој] Ој[h(a,W,X) \| Пғ_AUX]` | Drop Z from conditioning on h(a,W,X): via weak union from W вҹӮ (A,Z) \| (U,X) | **sorry** (needs `condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep` + weak union) |
| `condExp_h_drop_A HA a` | `Ој[h(a,W,X) \| Пғ_AUX] =бөҗ[Ој] Ој[h(a,W,X) \| Пғ_UX]` | Drop A from conditioning on h(a,W,X): W вҹӮ A \| (U,X) (projection from W вҹӮ (A,Z) \| (U,X)) | **sorry** (needs `condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep` + CI projection) |
| `latent_exch_to_condExp HA a` | `Ој[S.YofA a \| S.Пғ_AUX] =бөҗ[Ој] Ој[S.YofA a \| S.Пғ_UX]` | Drop A from conditioning on Y(a): Y(a) вҹӮ A \| (U,X) makes A irrelevant | **sorry** (needs `condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep`) |
| `consistency_event HA a hAY` | `Ој[S.Y \| S.Пғ_AUX] =бөҗ[Ој.restrict {A=a}] Ој[S.YofA a \| S.Пғ_AUX]` | On {A=a}, Y = Y(a); requires `hAY : S.Avar.v вү  S.Yvar.v`.  Step 1 (Y =бөҗ Y(a) on restrict) proved via `POVar.cf_eq_factual_on_event` + `ae_restrict_of_forall_mem`.  Step 2 (lift to condExp on restrict) `sorry`'d | **sorry** (step 2 needs condExp-over-restrict lift lemma) |
| `eq_zero_globally_of_eq_zero_on_arm HA a hf_meas hf_zero_on_arm` | `f =бөҗ[Ој] 0` (when `f` is Пғ_UX-measurable and zero on arm `{A=a}`) | Lift a stratum-wise zero Пғ_UX-measurable function to global Ој-zero via `positivity_arm` (Miao 2018 Asm. 7). | **Proved** |

### `Proximal/Main.lean` вҖ” Identification theorems

Ties the helper lemmas together into the two main identification results.
`ate_proximal` is fully proved (one-line, reduces to `Eofyofa_eq_Eh`).
`Eofyofa_eq_Eh` is `sorry`'d pending resolution of the helper blockers and
the `g_a` measurable-selection construction.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Eofyofa_eq_Eh HA a hAY` | `вҲ« Пү, S.YofA a Пү вҲӮОј = вҲ« Пү, HA.h (a, S.W Пү, S.X Пү) вҲӮОј` | For each treatment level `a`, counterfactual mean equals bridge mean; requires constructing `g_a : Оі_U Г— Оі_X вҶ’ в„қ` via Пғ-algebra factorisation and applying completeness | **sorry** (blocked on helpers + needs measurable-selection for `g_a`) |
| `ate_proximal HA hAY` | `вҲ« YofA true вҲӮОј вҲ’ вҲ« YofA false вҲӮОј = вҲ« h(true,W,X) вҲӮОј вҲ’ вҲ« h(false,W,X) вҲӮОј` | ATE equals difference of bridge integrals; immediate from `Eofyofa_eq_Eh` for both treatment levels | **Proved** |

---

## 10a. `Mathlib/CondDistrib.lean` вҖ” Missing `condDistrib` lemmas (stubs to upstream)

Collects general-purpose conditional-distribution lemmas that are not
specific to this project and should plausibly be upstreamed to Mathlib.
Statements here are independent of the SCM / SWIG infrastructure.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Causalean.condDistrib_comp_right_measurableEquiv` | `вҲҖбөҗ x вҲӮ(Ој.map X), condDistrib Y (e вҲҳ X) Ој (e x) = condDistrib Y X Ој x` (for `e : Оұ вүғбөҗ ОІ`) | Push-forward invariance of `condDistrib` under a measurable equivalence of the conditioning variable; proof via uniqueness of disintegration (`condDistrib_ae_eq_iff_measure_eq_compProd`) applied to the transported kernel `(condDistrib Y X Ој).comap e.symm e.symm.measurable`. `Rule2Kernel`'s `hA_extract` step was closed inline without this stub. | **Proved** |
| `Causalean.measure_eq_bind_marginal_condDistrib` | `Ој = (Ој.map Prod.snd).bind (fun c => (condDistrib Prod.fst Prod.snd Ој c).map (fun b => (b, c)))` for finite `Ој : Measure (ОІ Г— Оі)`, `ОІ` standard Borel | Measure-theoretic disintegration / chain rule: a finite measure on `ОІ Г— Оі` equals the `bind` of its `Оі`-marginal against the regular conditional distribution of `ОІ | Оі`; consumed by the backdoor completeness chain-rule step | **Proved** |

## 10a''. `Mathlib/Probability/Kernel/GraphMapProd.lean` вҖ” graph push-forward of a product measure

General measure-theoretic core of "exogenous noise + a structural mechanism gives a composition
product": pushing a product measure forward along a graph map preserving the first coordinate is a
`compProd`. Independent of the SCM/SWIG layer; used by Invariant Causal Prediction (`MechanismFactor`).

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Causalean.Mathlib.GraphMapProd.mechanismKernel` | `(ОҪвӮ— : Measure Оі) (ОҰ : ОІ Г— Оі вҶ’ Оҙ) : Kernel ОІ Оҙ`, with `mechanismKernel ОҪвӮ— ОҰ o = ОҪвӮ—.map (ОҰ (o, В·))` | The structural-mechanism kernel: at each value `o` of the first coordinate, push the second-factor law `ОҪвӮ—` through the slice `ОҰ (o, В·)`. Markov when `ОҪвӮ—` is a probability measure and `ОҰ` measurable. | **Proved** |
| `Causalean.Mathlib.GraphMapProd.map_graph_prod_eq_compProd` | `Measure.map (fun p => (p.1, ОҰ p)) (Оұ.prod ОҪвӮ—) = Оұ.compProd (mechanismKernel ОҪвӮ— ОҰ)` (`Оұ` sfinite, `ОҪвӮ—` probability, `ОҰ` measurable) | Pushing the product `Оұ вҠ— ОҪвӮ—` along the graph map `(o,l) вҶҰ (o, ОҰ(o,l))` equals the composition product against `mechanismKernel`. | **Proved** |

## 10a'''. `Mathlib/Probability/StdNormalCDF.lean` & `StdNormalMoments.lean` вҖ” standard-normal CDF, probit, truncated moment

Self-contained one-dimensional standard-normal analysis (Mathlib gap; upstream-contribution candidate), used by the Gaussian special case of the DornвҖ“Guo MSM bound. `ОҰ` reuses Mathlib's `cdf (gaussianReal 0 1)` (inheriting monotonicity + `atBot/atTop` limits); the rest is proven here. All `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Causalean.Mathlib.stdNormalPDF` / `stdNormalCDF` | `в„қ вҶ’ в„қ` | the standard-normal density `ПҶ = gaussianPDFReal 0 1` and CDF `ОҰ = cdf (gaussianReal 0 1)` | **Defined** |
| `stdNormalCDF_continuous` | `Continuous stdNormalCDF` | `ОҰ` continuous вҖ” the standard normal is atomless (StieltjesFunction jump = 0) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `stdNormalCDF_strictMono` | `StrictMono stdNormalCDF` | `ОҰ` strictly increasing вҖ” positive mass on every interval | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `stdNormalCDF_pos` / `stdNormalCDF_lt_one` | `0 < ОҰ x` / `ОҰ x < 1` | full support: `ОҰ` stays in the open interval `(0,1)` | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `probit` | `в„қ вҶ’ в„қ := sInf {x \| p вүӨ ОҰ x}` | the standard-normal quantile `ОҰвҒ»В№` (generalized inverse) | **Defined** |
| `stdNormalCDF_probit` / `probit_stdNormalCDF` | `ОҰ(ОҰвҒ»В№ p)=p` on `(0,1)` / `ОҰвҒ»В№(ОҰ x)=x` | exact two-sided inversion (IVT + strict monotonicity) | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `integral_Ioi_stdNormalPDF` | `вҲ«_{c}^вҲһ ПҶ = 1 вҲ’ ОҰ(c)` | the survival integral | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `integral_Ioi_id_mul_stdNormalPDF` | `вҲ«_{c}^вҲһ tВ·ПҶ(t) dt = ПҶ(c)` | the **truncated first moment** (antiderivative `вҲ’ПҶ` + FTC) вҖ” the identity behind the closed-form Gaussian MSM half-width | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `gaussianMSMHalfWidthFactor` | `в„қ вҶ’ в„қ := (ОӣВІвҲ’1)/Оӣ В· ПҶ(ОҰвҒ»В№(Оӣ/(Оӣ+1)))` | the DornвҖ“Guo Gaussian half-width scalar | **Defined** |

`Mathlib/Probability/MeasurableCondQuantile.lean` (**proved, axiom-clean**) builds the remaining DornвҖ“Guo Phase-7 substrate from Mathlib's `condCDF`: `condQuantile ПҒ П„ a = sInf {x | П„ a вүӨ condCDF ПҒ a x}` (the conditional generalized inverse) and `measurable_condQuantile_and_attains` вҖ” it is measurable in `a` (sublevel-set identity `{q вүӨ t} = {a | П„ a вүӨ condCDF ПҒ a t}` + `measurable_condCDF`) and, under atomless conditional laws (`Continuous (condCDF ПҒ a)`), attains the level `condCDF ПҒ a (condQuantile ПҒ П„ a) = П„ a` (right-continuity вҮ’ inf attained; IVT вҮ’ exact). The conditional analogue of `Causalean.Stat.quantile`; an upstream-Mathlib-contribution candidate. It is consumed by `MSM/CutoffConstruct.lean` (В§9j2msm) to construct the calibrating cutoff and close the sharp bound.

## 10a'. `Mathlib/CondDistribWitness.lean` вҖ” Witness-kernel form of a conditional distribution

The measure-theoretic core of a backdoor / Rule-2 argument, stated purely in terms of
Mathlib's `condDistrib` (no SCM machinery).  When the outcome is a measurable function of the
conditioning variable and a residual coordinate, its conditional law is the pushforward of the
residual's conditional law by that function вҖ” the "witness kernel".

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ProbabilityTheory.witnessKernel` | `Kernel (рқ’і Г— рқ’ө) рқ’ҙ`, `p вҶҰ (condDistrib C Z Ој p.2).map (h p.1 p.2)` | Packages the posterior witness kernel `p вҶҰ (condDistrib C Z Ој p.2).map (h p.1 p.2)` as a `Kernel`; Markov when `Ој` is finite. | **Proved** |
| `ProbabilityTheory.condDistrib_map_of_condDistrib_fst_eq` | If `Y = h X Z C` pointwise and `C вҠҘ X вҲЈ Z` (as `condDistrib C (X,Z) Ој =бөҗ condDistrib C Z Ој`), then `condDistrib Y (X,Z) Ој =бөҗ (fun p => (condDistrib C Z Ој p.2).map (h p.1 p.2))` | The witness-kernel form of a conditional distribution under conditional independence; the SCM-agnostic heart of the backdoor / Rule-2 identification. Proof by uniqueness of disintegration on rectangles. | **Proved** |
| `ProbabilityTheory.condDistrib_map_of_funext` | If `Y = H Z C` pointwise then `condDistrib Y Z Ој =бөҗ[Ој.map Z] (fun z => (condDistrib C Z Ој z).map (H z))` | The **no-treatment** (`X`-free) specialization of the witness lemma: when the conditioning variable `Z` already carries all the information used to split `Y`, no conditional-independence hypothesis is needed. Consumed by the do-side bridge `doSide_M2_pullback_eq_M1_witness`. | **Proved** |

## 10b. `Mathlib/CondIndep.lean` вҖ” Graph-independent CI axioms (re-export)

Re-exports the four sub-modules below.  Existing `import Causalean.Mathlib.CondIndep`
statements continue to work unchanged.

### 10b-i. `Mathlib/CondIndep/SemiGraphoid.lean` вҖ” Semi-graphoid axioms on `ValuesOn` projections

Weak union and contraction for `CondIndepFun` specialized to `ValuesOn I О©` projections.
Requires `Causalean.SCM.Model.SCM`.

### 10b-ii. `Mathlib/CondIndep/CondExp.lean` вҖ” CondExp + CondIndepFun lemmas

Drop-of-conditioning, product factorization, weak union via `prodMk`, and extension
by an `m`-measurable function.  No SCM import required.

### 10b-iii. `Mathlib/CondIndep/AELift.lean` вҖ” A.e.-equality/inequality lifts under overlap

Single-arm a.e.-lift and essential-bound inheritance for potential-outcome variables.

### 10b-iv. `Mathlib/CondIndep/Integrability.lean` вҖ” Integrability via condExp indicators

Пғ-projection of indicator positivity and integrability bound from a condExp product identity.

**SemiGraphoid** (`CondIndep/SemiGraphoid.lean`):

|---|---|---|---|
| `Causalean.condIndep_valuesProjection_weak_union` | `CondIndepFun (Пғ_Z) (valProjX) (valProjYW) Ој вҶ’ CondIndepFun (Пғ_ZW) (valProjX) (valProjY) Ој` | Weak-union axiom on `ValuesOn` projections; proved by decomposing the union projection into `(Y,W)` and applying the generic `prodMk` weak-union helper | **Proved** |
| `Causalean.condIndep_valuesProjection_contraction` | `CondIndepFun (Пғ_ZW) X Y Ој вҶ’ CondIndepFun Пғ_Z X W Ој вҶ’ CondIndepFun Пғ_Z X (valProjYW) Ој` | Contraction axiom on `ValuesOn` projections; proved by `condIndepFun_contraction_of_prodMk` plus projection-union assembly | **Proved** |

**CondExp** (`CondIndep/CondExp.lean`):

|---|---|---|---|
| `Causalean.condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep_comap` *(private)* | `CondIndepFun m hm g f Ој вҶ’ StronglyMeasurable[Пғ(g)] Y вҶ’ Integrable Y Ој вҶ’ Ој[Y \| m вҠ” Пғ(f)] =бөҗ[Ој] Ој[Y \| m]` | Precise generic drop-of-conditioning helper for `Пғ(g)`-measurable real integrands; proved by indicator rectangles plus L1 density | **Proved** |
| `Causalean.condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep` | `CondIndepFun m hm g f Ој вҶ’ Measurable h вҶ’ Integrable (h вҲҳ g) Ој вҶ’ Ој[h вҲҳ g \| m вҠ” Пғ(f)] =бөҗ[Ој] Ој[h вҲҳ g \| m]` | Drop-of-conditioning: if `g вҹӮ f \| m`, enlarging conditioning by `Пғ(f)` leaves `h вҲҳ g`'s condExp unchanged; reduces to the private `Пғ(g)`-measurable helper | **Proved** |
| `Causalean.condExp_mul_of_condIndep` | `CondIndepFun m hm f g Ој вҶ’ Ој[(uвҲҳf)В·(vвҲҳg) \| m] =бөҗ Ој[uвҲҳf \| m] * Ој[vвҲҳg \| m]` | Product factorization of condExp under CI; core step of backdoor ATE proof | **Proved** (depends on `condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep`) |
| `Causalean.condIndepFun_weak_union_of_prodMk` | `CondIndepFun m hm W (V,A) Ој вҶ’ CondIndepFun (m вҠ” Пғ_A) (sup_le hm _) W V Ој` | Weak union via `prodMk`; proved by CE tower/pullout over the `(V,A)` conditioning algebra and drop-conditioning for the W-indicator | **Proved** (depends on `condExp_sup_comap_eq_of_condIndep`) |
| `Causalean.condIndepFun_prodMk_of_measurable_left` | `CondIndepFun m hm W Z Ој вҶ’ Measurable[m] X вҶ’ CondIndepFun m hm (W,X) Z Ој` | Extension of `CondIndepFun` by an `m`-measurable factor | **Proved** |
