### 13'''.c `Estimation/CATE/PseudoOutcomeMean.lean` (Prop 1)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `phiвӮҖ_factualZ_cond_exp` | `theorem` | Пғ(X)-conditional form of `prop:est-cate-dr-cond-mean`: `Ој[ПҶвӮҖ(factualZ) | Пғ(X)] =бөҗ П„_val вҲҳ factualX` under back-door + strict overlap. **Proved by Codex** via local `weighted_residual_cond_exp_zero` helper + `cond_exp_residual_zero` + `condExp_mul_of_stronglyMeasurable_left`. |
| `phi_eta_cond_exp_eq_tau` | `theorem` | Value-space `P_X`-a.e. form: `вҲҖбөҗ x вҲӮP_X, вҲ« z, ПҶвӮҖ(z) вҲӮcondDistrib factualZ factualX P.Ој x = П„_val x`. Hypotheses add `[StandardBorelSpace Оі] [Nonempty Оі]` (for `condDistrib`) and `Integrable (ПҶвӮҖ вҲҳ factualZ) P.Ој`. **Proved by Codex** by transporting `phiвӮҖ_factualZ_cond_exp` through `condExp_ae_eq_integral_condDistrib` and pushing forward to `P_X` via `MeasureTheory.ae_map_iff` (measurability of the equality set comes from `StronglyMeasurable.integral_condDistrib` for the LHS and `measurable_П„_val` for the RHS). |

### 13'''.d `Estimation/CATE/ConditionalBias.lean` (Prop 2 вҖ” milestone)

The DR conditional-bias identity. Pure Пғ(X)-conditional algebra; the closed-form cross-product remainder driving the double-robustness corollary (`rem:est-cate-double-robust`).

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `condBias О· О·вӮҖ x` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | Closed form: `ОЈ_{aвҲҲBool} ((О·.e_fn x вҲ’ О·вӮҖ.e_fn x)В·(О·.Ој_fn a x вҲ’ О·вӮҖ.Ој_fn a x)) / (if a then О·.e_fn x else 1 вҲ’ О·.e_fn x)`. |
| `measurable_condBias` | `lemma` | Measurability in `x`. **Proved by Codex** via `Finset.measurable_sum` + product-of-measurables. |
| `cond_exp_residual_at_h` | `private lemma` | Generalized form of `cond_exp_residual_zero` (parameterised over arbitrary measurable `h : Оі вҶ’ в„қ`): `Ој[1{D=d}В·(Y вҲ’ h(X)) | Пғ(X)] =бөҗ propScore d В· (Ој_val d (factualX) вҲ’ h (factualX))`. **Proved by Codex** mirroring `MeanZero.lean` lines 109вҖ“196. |
| `phi_eta_minus_phiвӮҖ_cond_exp` | `theorem` | Пғ(X)-conditional bias identity (Prop 2 form on О©): `Ој[ПҶ_О·(factualZ) вҲ’ ПҶ_0(factualZ) | Пғ(X)] =бөҗ condBias О· О·вӮҖ вҲҳ factualX` under per-arm outcome-regression integrability and strict overlap. **Proved by Codex** with a 100-line expansion: 4 calls to `cond_exp_residual_at_h` + `e_compat` / `propScore_false_ae` substitution + `field_simp` + `ring`. **Hypothesis additions vs. plan**: `(h_Ој_О·_int : вҲҖ a, Integrable (О·.Ој_fn a вҲҳ factualX) P.Ој)` and `(hОө_pos : 0 < Оө)` were added so the algebra is well-defined. |
| `phi_eta_minus_phiвӮҖ_at_x` | `theorem` | Value-space `P_X`-a.e. form: `вҲҖбөҗ x вҲӮP_X, вҲ« z, (phi_eta z О· вҲ’ phiвӮҖ S z) вҲӮcondDistrib factualZ factualX P.Ој x = condBias О· О·вӮҖ x`. Hypotheses add `[StandardBorelSpace Оі] [Nonempty Оі]`, `0 < Оө`, and per-arm О·-integrability. **Proved by Codex** by transporting `phi_eta_minus_phiвӮҖ_cond_exp` through `condExp_ae_eq_integral_condDistrib` and pushing forward to `P_X` via `MeasureTheory.ae_map_iff` (measurability of the equality set from `StronglyMeasurable.integral_condDistrib` and `measurable_condBias`). |
| `condBias_zero_of_propensity_match`, `condBias_zero_of_outcome_match` | `lemma` | Double-robustness corollaries (`rem:est-cate-double-robust`): `condBias = 0` if propensity matches truth, or if both outcome arms match. **Proved by Codex** via `Finset.sum_eq_zero` + `sub_eq_zero` substitution. |
| `cond_exp_phi_eta_dir_deriv_at_truth_zero` | `theorem` | Differentiated companion of `phi_eta_minus_phiвӮҖ_cond_exp`: Пғ(X)-conditional of `phi_eta_dir_deriv О·вӮҖ v (factualZ)` is zero a.e. under strict overlap on `О·вӮҖ` and bounded `v` (uniform bounds on `v.Ој_fn b` and `v.e_fn`). **Proved by Codex** by 5-summand decomposition of the closed form; the two `e_fn`-residual terms vanish via `cond_exp_residual_zero` (d=true / d=false) and the two `Ој_fn`-pullouts cancel via `S.e_compat` (propScore = e_val a.e.) plus the derived `propScore false =бөҗ 1 вҲ’ e_val вҲҳ factualX`. |

### 13'''.dвҖІ `Estimation/CATE/PhiEtaDeriv.lean`

Closed-form directional derivative of the DR pseudo-outcome `phi_eta` in its nuisance argument `О·`, evaluated at an anchor `gвӮҖ : NuisanceVec Оі` along a direction `v : NuisanceVec Оі`. Because `phi_eta` is reciprocal in `О·.e_fn`, the value-difference `phi_eta z О· вҲ’ phi_eta z gвӮҖ` is **not** the directional derivative; this file computes the genuine derivative and proves the pointwise difference-quotient tendsto under strict overlap.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `phi_eta_dir_deriv gвӮҖ v z` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | Closed-form directional derivative `D_g phi_eta(z, gвӮҖ)[v] = (v.Ој_fn true X вҲ’ v.Ој_fn false X) + indA(z)В·(вҲ’v.e_fn(X)/gвӮҖ.eВІВ·(Y вҲ’ gвӮҖ.Ој_fn true X) вҲ’ v.Ој_fn true X / gвӮҖ.e_fn X) вҲ’ (1 вҲ’ indA(z))В·(v.e_fn(X)/(1 вҲ’ gвӮҖ.e_fn X)ВІВ·(Y вҲ’ gвӮҖ.Ој_fn false X) вҲ’ v.Ој_fn false X / (1 вҲ’ gвӮҖ.e_fn X))`. Used by `Estimation/CATE/OSL/DRLearner/Analytic.lean` to identify the opaque `NuisanceDirDeriv.dPhi` field via uniqueness of limits. |
| `measurable_phi_eta_dir_deriv` | `lemma` | Measurability in `z`. Proved by composing the measurabilities of the five summands. |
| `phi_eta_dir_deriv_tendsto` | `theorem` | Pointwise tendsto: `(phi_eta z (gвӮҖ + t вҖў v) вҲ’ phi_eta z gвӮҖ) / t вҶ’ phi_eta_dir_deriv gвӮҖ v z` as `t вҶ’ 0` along `рқ“қ[вү ] 0`, under strict overlap (`gвӮҖ вҲҲ H_Оө Оө`, `0 < Оө`). **Proved by Codex** via a private `phi_eta_real_line_hasDerivAt` HasDerivAt helper on в„қ + standard real-analysis combinators; the strict-overlap hypothesis ensures the denominators `gвӮҖ.e_fn X` and `1 вҲ’ gвӮҖ.e_fn X` are nonzero. |

### 13'''.e `Estimation/CATE/Kennedy/DRLearner.lean`

Thin instantiation of `SecondStageOperator` to the AIPW pseudo-outcome.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `drLearnerEstimator S op О·_hat n Пү x` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | `op.evalAt n Пү (fun z => phi_eta z (О·_hat n Пү)) x`. Kennedy's `\hat\tau^{DR}_n(x)`. |
| `drOracleEstimator S op n Пү x` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | `op.evalAt n Пү (fun z => phiвӮҖ S z) x`. Kennedy's `\tilde\tau_n(x)`. |
| `drOracleRiskScale S op x n` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | Specialisation of `oracleRiskScale` to `(phiвӮҖ S, S.П„_val, x)`. |
| `drOracleEstimator_eq_oracleEstimator` | `lemma` | Sanity unfolding: `drOracleEstimator S op = op.oracleEstimator (phiвӮҖ S)`. **Proved** by `rfl`. |

### 13'''.f `Estimation/CATE/Kennedy/OracleExpansion.lean` (Theorem 5)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dr_oracle_expansion` | `theorem` | AIPW specialisation of `General.oracle_expansion`: under `CATEEstimationSystem`, `Stable op S.П„_val d_n x BiasIdent`, `Tendsto_inProb d_n 0`, and a `BiasIdent` witness for `phi_eta`, `phiвӮҖ`, and `condBias`, `(drLearner вҲ’ drOracle вҲ’ op.evalAt(condBias)) = o_p(R^*_n(x))`. **Proved by Codex** as a direct call to `General.oracle_expansion`. |
| `dr_oracle_efficient` | `theorem` | Corollary: if additionally the smoothed-bias term is `o_p(R^*_n(x))`, then `(drLearner вҲ’ drOracle) = o_p(R^*_n(x))`. **Proved by Codex** via `IsLittleOp.add_eventually_nonneg_rate` (newly exposed from `Estimation/ATE/RemainderIdentity.lean`) + algebraic cancellation via `convert ... ; funext ; ring`. |

### 13'''.g `Estimation/CATE/Kennedy/LinearSmootherCATE.lean` (Prop 6)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `cate_linear_smoother_bias_bound` | `theorem` | HГ¶lder bound for the smoothed DR-bias term: `\|op.evalAt n Пү (condBias О·_hat О·вӮҖ вҲҳ z.1) x\| вүӨ aipw_rem_const Оө В· c_n В· вҖ–О”ПҖвҖ–_{w,p} В· ОЈ_a вҖ–О”Ој_aвҖ–_{w,q}` under `IsLinearSmoother op n Пү x B w xs`, `ОЈ \|w\| вүӨ c_n`, `Real.HolderConjugate p q`, and `О·_hat n Пү вҲҲ H_Оө Оө`. **Proved by Codex (filled)** вҖ” codex left 4 mechanical errors (unknown `Finset.sum_bool` instead of `Fintype.sum_bool`; summand-order mismatch; sum-distributivity rearrangements) which were patched inline. The proof: bound `\|condBias y\| вүӨ aipw_rem_const Оө В· ОЈ_a \|О”ПҖ y\| В· \|О”Ој_a y\|` pointwise (mirrors `aipw_remainder_bound` in `RemainderBound.lean`), then apply `smoother_bias_product_holder` arm-by-arm to a constructed `absOp` with absolute weights. |
| `cate_dr_oracle_efficient_linear` | `theorem` | Corollary plugging a linear-smoother `LinearSmootherOp` into `dr_oracle_efficient` (uses `op.toSecondStageOperator` projection). **Proved** by direct application of `dr_oracle_efficient`. |

### 13'''.h `Estimation/CATE/SecondOrderBias.lean` (honest second-order product bias вҖ” reusable core)

The genuine double-robustness content: the DR-Learner nuisance bias weighted by an arbitrary bounded Пғ(X)-test function `w` is a **product** of the two nuisance LВІ-errors. Generalises `aipw_remainder_bound` (the `w вүЎ 1` / ATE case) to a test function. All sorry-free + axiom-clean.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `integral_phiDiff_mul_eq_condBias` | `theorem` | Conditioning identity: `вҲ« z, (phi_eta z О· вҲ’ phiвӮҖ S z)В·w z.1 вҲӮP_Z = вҲ« x, condBias О· О·вӮҖ x В· w x вҲӮP_X` for measurable `w`. **Proved** by pulling the Пғ(X)-measurable factor `w(X)` through `condExp_mul_of_stronglyMeasurable_right` and substituting `phi_eta_minus_phiвӮҖ_cond_exp` (the `dr_scoreZero` pull-out idiom). |
| `abs_integral_phiDiff_mul_le_product` | `theorem` | Second-order product bound: `\|вҲ« z, (phi_eta z О· вҲ’ phiвӮҖ S z)В·w z.1 вҲӮP_Z\| вүӨ (B/Оө)В·ОЈ_a вҖ–О·.Ој_fn a вҲ’ Ој_val aвҖ–_{LВІ(P_X)}В·вҖ–О·.e_fn вҲ’ e_valвҖ–_{LВІ(P_X)}` for `\|w\| вүӨ B`, `О· вҲҲ H_Оө`. **Proved** by the identity + pointwise `\|condBiasВ·w\| вүӨ (B/Оө)(\|О”Ој_TВ·О”e\| + \|О”Ој_FВ·О”e\|)` (strict overlap) + `integral_abs_mul_le_eLpNorm_mul_eLpNorm` per arm вҖ” the CauchyвҖ“Schwarz route of `aipw_remainder_bound`. |

### 13'''.i `Estimation/CATE/OSL/SecondOrderBias.lean` (DR-Learner `Bias_n` is second-order)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OSL.drBias_le_product` | `theorem` | `\|Bias_n (drOSLSystem) ((drMixedDirDeriv).DОё_at О·вӮҖ) ((drMixedDirDeriv).DОё_at h) ОёМӮ\| вүӨ (2B/Оө)В·ОЈ_a вҖ–h.Ој_fn a вҲ’ Ој_val aвҖ–вӮӮВ·вҖ–h.e_fn вҲ’ e_valвҖ–вӮӮ` for `\|D.dEval ОёМӮ\| вүӨ B`, `h вҲҲ H_Оө`. **Proved**: both `drMixedDirDeriv` bundles have `dв„“_Оё = -2В·(phi_eta z О· вҲ’ eval ОёвӮҖ z.1)В·D.dEval Оё z.1` (literal field), so `Bias_n` telescopes (the `eval ОёвӮҖ` term cancels) to `2В·вҲ«(phi_etaВ·h вҲ’ phiвӮҖ)В·D.dEval ОёМӮ`, then `abs_integral_phiDiff_mul_le_product` with `w := D.dEval ОёМӮ`. **Replaces the trivial `OSL.Bias_taylor_form` existential placeholder.** Axiom-clean. |

### 13'''.j `Estimation/CATE/OSL/Modulus/DRLearnerHonest.lean` (honest fixed-nuisance Kennedy oracle inequality)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OSL.oracle_inequality_drLearner_highProb_honest` | `theorem` | Same setup as `oracle_inequality_drLearner_highProb`, with the DD bundles fixed to `drMixedDirDeriv` and a uniform bound `\|D.dEval Оё\| вүӨ B` on `Оҳ_set`. Conclusion replaces the symbolic `Bias_n` term with the **explicit** product bias: `вҖ–П„МӮ вҲ’ ОёвӮҖвҖ–ВІ вүӨ (4(1+Пғ)/ПғВІ)В·ПҒВІ_{n,Оҙ} + (4/Пғ)В·(2B/Оө)В·ОЈ_a вҖ–О”Ој_aвҖ–вӮӮвҖ–О”eвҖ–вӮӮ + (4/Пғ)В·r_opt n` w.p. вүҘ 1вҲ’Оҙ. **Proved** by composing the existing end-to-end with `drBias_le_product` (`(4/Пғ)В·Bias_n вүӨ (4/Пғ)В·\|Bias_n\| вүӨ вҖҰ`). Axiom-clean. |

### 13'''.k `Estimation/CATE/OSL/Modulus/DRLearnerRandomNuisance.lean` (un-pinned random cross-fitted nuisance)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OSL.oracle_inequality_drLearner_random_nuisance` | `theorem` | Un-pins the nuisance from fixed `h` to a random fold-A estimate `ДҘ : в„• вҶ’ О© вҶ’ NuisanceVec Оі` (each `ДҘ n Пү вҲҲ H_Оө`). Conclusion carries the **random** product bias `(4/Пғ)В·(2B/Оө)В·ОЈ_a вҖ–ДҘ n Пү.Ој_fn a вҲ’ Ој_val aвҖ–вӮӮВ·вҖ–ДҘ n Пү.e_fn вҲ’ e_valвҖ–вӮӮ` on a high-prob set per `n`. **Proved** by the deterministic `oracle_inequality_plugin_ERM` (already accepts random `ghat`) + `drBias_le_product` at `ДҘ n Пү` (already holds вҲҖ `h вҲҲ H_Оө`). Takes the realised empirical-process modulus event `hMod` as a hypothesis вҖ” discharging it is the cross-fitting frontier (keystone now proved, see `RandomParam.lean`). Axiom-clean. |

### 13'''.l `Estimation/OSL/Modulus/RandomParam.lean` (cross-fit conditioning keystone)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OSL.randomParam_event_le` | `theorem` | **Cross-fit conditioning keystone.** Given a fold-A sub-Пғ-algebra `m_A`, the fold-B coordinate map `Y : О© вҶ’ ОІ` with `Ој.map Y = ОҪ` and `Indep m_A Пғ(Y)`, a fold-A-measurable bad-set family `Bad : О© вҶ’ Set ОІ` (joint-measurable in `m_A.prod mОІ`) with each section `ОҪ (Bad Пү) вүӨ Оҙ`, then the *random* event `Ој {Пү : Y Пү вҲҲ Bad Пү} вүӨ Оҙ` вҖ” plugging a fold-A-measurable random parameter into fold-B events of uniform mass вүӨ Оҙ preserves the bound. **Proved** via `indep_trim_prod_map_eq` (product factorisation `Ој.map (Пү вҶҰ (Пү,YПү)) = (Ој.trim m_A).prod ОҪ`) + `Measure.prod_apply` (Tonelli on the ОҪ-section) + `вҲ«(вүӨОҙ)=вүӨОҙ`. Axiom-clean. The measure-theoretic heart of lifting the fixed-nuisance modulus to a random cross-fitted nuisance вҖ” now consumed by `RandomNuisance.lean` below. |

### 13'''.l.2 `Estimation/OSL/Modulus/RandomNuisance.lean` (cross-fit lift of the modulus to a random nuisance)

Closes the OSL/Kennedy G2 frontier: the fixed-`g` bridge `localEmpProcessModulus_of_bounded_rademacher` is lifted to a *random fold-A-measurable nuisance* `ДҘ : в„• вҶ’ О© вҶ’ G` via the keystone. All declarations sorry-free and axiom-clean.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OSL.LocalEmpProcessModulusRandom S S_iid split ПҒ Оҙ ДҘ` | `def`, `Prop` | Random-`g` analogue of `LocalEmpProcessModulus`: for each `n` a high-prob (`вүҘ 1вҲ’Оҙ`) event on which the centred excess risk at the random nuisance `ДҘ n Пү` obeys the modulus inequality uniformly in `Оё`. Exactly the `hMod` shape consumed by `oracle_inequality_drLearner_random_nuisance`. |
| `OSL.foldBCoord S_iid split n` | `noncomputable def`, `О© вҶ’ Fin (foldB n).card вҶ’ Z` | Fold-B coordinate map (reindex of the fold-B subsample by `orderIsoOfFin`). |
| `OSL.badDataSet S S_iid split n b Оҙ R g` | `noncomputable def`, `Set (Fin (foldB n).card вҶ’ Z)` | Product-space bad set for nuisance `g`: `{s : 2вҖўrademacherComplexity + 2bвҲҡ(2 log(1/Оҙ)/m) вүӨ uniformDeviation (centred-loss class at g) s}`. |
| `OSL.modulusRadius split b Оҙ R` | `noncomputable def`, `в„• вҶ’ в„қ` | Deterministic radius `ПҒ n = вҲҡ(if card=0 then 2b else 2 R n + 2bвҲҡ(2 log(1/Оҙ)/card))`. |
| `OSL.foldBCoord_law` | `theorem` | `Ој.map (foldBCoord S_iid split n) = Measure.pi P_Z` вҖ” the fold-B coordinate law (mirrors the monolith `hY_law`, via `foldB_pi_law` + `piCongrLeft`). |
| `OSL.foldBCoord_meas` | `theorem` | `foldBCoord` is measurable. |
| `OSL.badDataSet_mass_le` | `theorem` | `Measure.pi P_Z (badDataSet вҖҰ g) вүӨ Оҙ` (McDiarmid tail bound `uniform_deviation_tail_bound_separable_of_pos` at the centred class; needs `0 < b`, `0 < card`). |
| `OSL.modulus_of_not_badData` | `theorem` | Off the bad set (`foldBCoord Пү вҲү badDataSet вҖҰ g`), the modulus inequality holds uniformly over `Оҳ_set` (mirrors the monolith on-event branch; re-derives the dense-range Rademacher bridge inline since the monolith's bridge lemmas are `private`). |
| `OSL.localEmpProcessModulus_random_of_bounded_rademacher` | `theorem` | **Cross-fit lift (frontier capstone).** Given a random nuisance `ДҘ` with uniform bound `b>0`, continuity, and Rademacher bound `R` *at every realisation* `ДҘ n Пү`, plus the cross-fit structural facts `hindep n` (fold A вҠҘ fold-B coords) and `hbad_joint n` (the bad set depends jointly measurably on `(Пү,s)` w.r.t. `m_A n вҠ— Пғ(foldB)`), concludes `LocalEmpProcessModulusRandom S S_iid split (modulusRadius вҖҰ) Оҙ ДҘ`. **Proved** by `badDataSet_mass_le` (per-section mass) + `randomParam_event_le` (condition on fold A) for the high-prob event, `modulus_of_not_badData` on the complement, with an `card=0` trivial branch. Axiom-clean. `hindep`/`hbad_joint` are named structural hypotheses (true by the cross-fit construction; same spirit as taking `RademacherBound` as a hypothesis). |

## 13''''. `Estimation/OSL/` вҖ” Orthogonal Statistical Learning (function-valued targets)

Sibling submodule to `Estimation/OrthogonalMoments/` and `Estimation/CATE/`: when the target is a function (e.g. CATE) instead of a scalar functional, "orthogonality" is Neyman-orthogonality of the *loss*, and the headline guarantee is a deterministic **oracle inequality** in the target-space norm rather than a CLT. Mirrors `doc/basic_concepts/po/estimation/orthogonal_statistical_learning.tex`. Phase-1 + Phase-2 + Phase-3 land the deterministic theorems and the DR-Learner orthogonality witness (abstract вҖ” concrete discharge of the mixed-DD bundle / DCT bridge / Riesz cancellation deferred to `Estimation/CATE/OSL/DRLearner/Analytic.lean`); concentration / modulus realisation (Phase 4) is deferred.

### 13''''.a `Estimation/OSL/Setup.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OSLSystem О© Ој Z P_Z Оҳ G` | `structure` | Bundle: convex `Оҳ_set вҠҶ Оҳ` (Hilbert-space-like), nuisance set `G_set вҠҶ G`, loss `в„“ : Z вҶ’ Оҳ вҶ’ G вҶ’ в„қ`, joint measurability, truth `(ОёвӮҖ, gвӮҖ)`. Statistical-learning analogue of `GeneralMoment`. Definition `def:est-osl-system`. |
| `OSLSystem.L S Оё g` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | Population risk `вҲ« в„“ z Оё g вҲӮP_Z`. |
| `Оҳ_PerturbClosed`, `G_PerturbClosed` | `def`, `Prop` | Closure of `Оҳ_set` (resp. `G_set`) under line segments from the truth. |

### 13''''.b `Estimation/OSL/DirectionalDeriv.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `HasDirDerivTheta S g` | `structure` | Pointwise dir derivative of `Оё вҶҰ в„“ z Оё g` along `ОёвӮҖ вҶ’ Оё`, with measurability and tendsto witnesses. Anchored at any nuisance `g`. |
| `HasDirDerivG S` | `structure` | Pointwise dir derivative of `g вҶҰ в„“ z ОёвӮҖ g` along `gвӮҖ вҶ’ g`. |
| `HasMixedDirDeriv S` | `structure` | Family `DОё_at : вҲҖ g, HasDirDerivTheta S g` plus mixed-derivative value `dв„“_Оёg Оё g z` with tendsto + measurability. Captures the natural-language `D_g D_Оё в„“` at `(ОёвӮҖ, gвӮҖ)`. |
| `FirstOrderInequality S DОё` | `def`, `Prop` | `вҲҖ Оё вҲҲ Оҳ_set, 0 вүӨ вҲ« z, DОё.dв„“_Оё Оё z вҲӮP_Z` вҖ” population KKT inequality at the truth. |

### 13''''.k `Estimation/CATE/OSL/DRLearner.lean` (Phase-3 milestone)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ` | `def`, `Set (NuisanceVec Оі)` | Bounded-direction slice anchored at `О·вӮҖ`: the set of `О·` whose deviation `О· вҲ’ О·вӮҖ` has uniformly bounded outcome-regression and propensity components (`вҲғ CОј, вҲҖ b x, |(О· вҲ’ О·вӮҖ).Ој_fn b x| вүӨ CОј` and analogous for `e_fn`). Used as the nuisance slice `G_set` of `drOSLSystem` so that the score-zero obligation can be discharged constructively via `dr_scoreZero_of_bounded`. |
| `anchor_mem_boundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ` | `lemma` | `О·вӮҖ вҲҲ BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ`, witnessed by `CОј = Ce = 0`. |
| `drOSLSystem S Оҳ Оҳ_set Оҳ_convex ОёвӮҖ ОёвӮҖ_mem eval eval_meas eval_ОёвӮҖ` | `noncomputable def`, `OSLSystem` | DR-Learner OSL system: data law from `S.toBackdoorEstimationSystem.P_Z`; loss `(z, Оё, О·) вҶҰ (phi_eta z О· вҲ’ eval Оё z.1)ВІ`; nuisance `G := NuisanceVec Оі` with `G_set := BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ` (uniformly bounded perturbation directions); truth-witness `eval ОёвӮҖ = П„_val`. |
| `drNeymanOrthog_witness` | `theorem` | DR-Learner squared loss is Neyman-orthogonal at `(П„вӮҖ, О·вӮҖ)`, consuming a concrete `M : HasMixedDirDeriv` and the analytic inputs `hBridge : MixedScoreDCTBridge` and `hScoreFlat` (the score-form orthogonality tendsto, quantified over `BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ` to match `drOSLSystem.G_set`). Proved as a thin wrapper around `neymanOrthog_iff_score_deriv_zero`. Proposition `prop:est-osl-dr-loss-orthogonal`. The concrete instantiation of `M`, with closed-form `DОё_at`/`dв„“_Оёg` and the pointwise tendsto obligations discharged, lives in `Estimation/CATE/OSL/DRLearner/Analytic.lean`. |

### 13''''.k' `Estimation/CATE/OSL/DRLearner/Analytic.lean` (Phase-3 analytic discharge)

Refines `drNeymanOrthog_witness` by *constructing* the closed-form `HasMixedDirDeriv` for the DR-Learner squared loss and discharging the pointwise tendsto obligations. The DCT swap and integrated orthogonality remain as hypotheses вҖ” see footnote.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `EvalDirDeriv Оҳ_set ОёвӮҖ eval` | `structure` | Directional-derivative bundle for the candidate-evaluation map `eval : Оҳ вҶ’ Оі вҶ’ в„қ`: carries `dEval Оё x` (the dir-deriv value at `ОёвӮҖ` in direction `Оё вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ`), pointwise tendsto, measurability, and a uniform `LвҲһ` bound on `dEval Оё` (needed for DCT). For the linear function-class case `eval Оё x = Оё x`, `dEval Оё x = Оё x вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ x`. |
| `NuisanceDirDeriv gвӮҖ` | `structure` | Directional-derivative bundle for `phi_eta` in the *nuisance* direction at `gвӮҖ`: carries `dPhi : NuisanceVec Оі вҶ’ (Оі Г— Bool Г— в„қ) вҶ’ в„қ` with pointwise tendsto and measurability. Required because `phi_eta` is reciprocal in `О·.e_fn`, hence non-linear in `О·`, and the value-difference `phi_eta z О· вҲ’ phi_eta z gвӮҖ` is **not** the directional derivative. |
| `drMixedDirDeriv S hA hОө_pos h_overlap_О·вӮҖ Оҳ Оҳ_set Оҳ_convex ОёвӮҖ ОёвӮҖ_mem eval eval_meas eval_ОёвӮҖ D ND` | `noncomputable def`, `HasMixedDirDeriv (drOSLSystem ...)` | Closed-form mixed directional-derivative bundle for the DR-Learner loss: `(DОё_at О·).dв„“_Оё Оё z = вҲ’2В·(phi_eta z О· вҲ’ eval ОёвӮҖ z.1)В·D.dEval Оё z.1` and `dв„“_Оёg Оё О· z = вҲ’2В·ND.dPhi О· zВ·D.dEval Оё z.1`. Pointwise tendsto for both fields **proved by Codex** via the chain rule `aВІ вҲ’ bВІ = (aвҲ’b)(a+b)` on `(phi_eta z О· вҲ’ eval Оё z.1)ВІ` for the target field, and via direct substitution + `ND.pointwise` for the mixed field. |
| `dr_scoreZero_of_bounded` | `lemma` | **Honest discharge of the integrated-orthogonality obligation.** For any candidate target `Оё` and any nuisance perturbation `О· : NuisanceVec Оі` whose direction `О· вҲ’ О·вӮҖ` has uniformly bounded `Ој_fn`/`e_fn`, `вҲ« z, ND.dPhi О· z В· D.dEval Оё z.1 вҲӮP_Z = 0`. **Proved by Codex** by (i) identifying `ND.dPhi О· z = phi_eta_dir_deriv О·вӮҖ (О· вҲ’ О·вӮҖ) z` via uniqueness of `nhdsWithin` limits applied to `ND.pointwise` and `phi_eta_dir_deriv_tendsto`, (ii) converting the `P_Z`-integral to a `P.Ој`-integral via `MeasureTheory.integral_map`, (iii) applying the conditional-expectation tower + Пғ(X)-measurable pull-out of `D.dEval вҲҳ factualX`, and (iv) plugging in `cond_exp_phi_eta_dir_deriv_at_truth_zero` to get the inner conditional is `0` a.e. Replaces the tautological `dr_mixedScoreDCTBridge` passthrough that previously sat in this file. |
| `dr_scoreFlat ... D ND hBridge` | `theorem` | Score-flatness on `BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ`: for every `Оё вҲҲ Оҳ_set` and every `О· вҲҲ BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ`, the integrated score difference quotient tends to zero as `t вҶ’ 0`. The single remaining analytic hypothesis is `hBridge` (the DCT swap); the integrated-orthogonality obligation is discharged inside the proof by `dr_scoreZero_of_bounded`, applied to the boundedness witnesses extracted from `О· вҲҲ BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ`. The closing computation is `вҲ« M.dв„“_Оёg = вҲ’2 В· вҲ« ND.dPhi В· D.dEval = вҲ’2 В· 0 = 0`. |
| `drNeymanOrthog ... D ND hBridge` | `theorem` | `NeymanOrthogLoss` for the DR-Learner loss at `(П„вӮҖ, О·вӮҖ)` over `BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ`, parameterised by `D : EvalDirDeriv` and `ND : NuisanceDirDeriv`. The score-zero obligation is fully internalised: the only remaining analytic hypothesis is `hBridge` (the DCT swap). One-line proof: feed `hBridge` and `dr_scoreFlat` into `neymanOrthog_iff_score_deriv_zero`. Restricting `drOSLSystem.G_set` to `BoundedNuisanceDirs О·вӮҖ` is the standard semiparametric move that lets `dr_scoreZero_of_bounded` discharge the integrated-orthogonality obligation directly without integral-defaults-to-zero conventions for unbounded directions. |

### 13''''.l `Estimation/OSL/Modulus.lean` (Phase-4a bridge)

Bridge between the vendored Rademacher / McDiarmid / Symmetrization
chain in `Causalean/Stat/Concentration/` and the OSL `LocalEmpProcessModulus`
predicate.  Pure consumption of FoML headlines plus
`Stat/FoldBEmpiricalProcess.foldB_pi_law` for the
`ОјвҒҝ`-on-`Fin m вҶ’ О©` вҶ” `Ој`-on-`О©` transport, and a generic-`DenseRange`
analog of `separableSpaceSup_eq_real` for the sup-lifting step.

**Why not `[Countable S.Оҳ_set]`?**  Combined with `S.Оҳ_convex`,
countability forces `S.Оҳ_set.Subsingleton` (a non-trivial convex subset
of a real vector space contains a line segment, which is uncountable).
The bridge therefore takes an **explicit countable enumeration**
`idx : в„• вҶ’ S.Оҳ_set` with `DenseRange idx` plus a continuity hypothesis
`LossContinuousOnОҳset`, and uses the dense-range analog of FoML's
`separableSpaceSup_eq_real` to lift sup-over-в„• to sup-over-`вҶҘS.Оҳ_set`.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `foldB_pi_law` | `lemma` | Public alias of the (private) `oneShot_iid` from `Stat/SampleSplit/FoldBEmpiricalProcess.lean`: `Ој.map (Пү вҶҰ (i вҶҰ S.Z i Пү)) = Measure.pi (fun _ вҶҰ P)` over `i вҲҲ split.foldB n`. The bridge consumed by the McDiarmid/symmetrization chain to transport `ОјвҒҝ`-conclusions to fold B on `Ој`. |
| `RademacherBound S S_iid split g idx R` | `def`, `Prop` | Hypothesis: for every `n`, `0 вүӨ R n` and `rademacherComplexity (split.foldB n).card (k вҶҰ в„“ z (idx k).val g вҲ’ в„“ z ОёвӮҖ g) Ој (S_iid.Z 0) вүӨ R n`. Indexed over the *countable* index `в„•` via the user-supplied `idx : в„• вҶ’ S.Оҳ_set`. |
| `UniformlyBoundedLoss S g b` | `def`, `Prop` | `вҲҖ z, вҲҖ Оё вҲҲ Оҳ_set, |в„“ z Оё g| вүӨ b`. |
| `LossContinuousOnОҳset S g` | `def`, `Prop` | `вҲҖ z, Continuous (fun (Оё : вҶҘS.Оҳ_set) => S.в„“ z Оё.val g)`. Needed by the dense-range lifting. |
| `separableSup_via_denseRange` | `private lemma` | Generic `DenseRange` analog of `FoML.separableSpaceSup_eq_real`: for continuous `f : X вҶ’ в„қ` on nonempty topological `X` with `DenseRange idx`, `вЁҶ x : X, f x = вЁҶ k : в„•, f (idx k)`. Proved. |
| `empiricalRademacherComplexity_eq_denseRange`, `rademacherComplexity_eq_denseRange` | `private lemma` | Empirical / population Rademacher complexity is preserved under re-indexing from `X` to `в„•` via dense range, given continuity in `Оё`. Proved. |
| `rademacherComplexity_map_id` | `private lemma` | `rademacherComplexity n f (Ој.map sample) id = rademacherComplexity n f Ој sample`. Pushforward simplification used in the transport step. Proved. |
| `populationRisk_abs_le_of_uniform`, `populationRisk_sub_le_two_mul_bound` | `private lemma` | `|S.L Оё g| вүӨ b` and `S.L Оё g вҲ’ S.L ОёвӮҖ g вүӨ 2 b` for `Оё вҲҲ Оҳ_set`, derived from `UniformlyBoundedLoss` + `[IsProbabilityMeasure P_Z]`. The boundedness fallback used in the empty-fold (`m = 0`) case. Proved. |
| `localEmpProcessModulus_of_bounded_rademacher` | `theorem` | **Phase-4a headline (proved).** Under `UniformlyBoundedLoss S g b`, `LossContinuousOnОҳset S g`, an explicit countable dense `idx : в„• вҶ’ S.Оҳ_set`, and `RademacherBound` against `idx`, conclude `LocalEmpProcessModulus` with `ПҒ n := вҲҡ(if (split.foldB n).card = 0 then 2b else 2 R n + 2b В· вҲҡ(2 log(1/Оҙ) / (split.foldB n).card))`. The nonempty-fold branch is the textbook `вҲҡ(2 R_n + Оө)` rate with `Оө = 2b В· вҲҡ(2 log(1/Оҙ)/|B(n)|)`; the `m = 0` branch uses `вҲҡ(2b)` to dominate the boundedness fallback `|L Оё g вҲ’ L ОёвӮҖ g| вүӨ 2b`. Proof: case split on `m = 0` vs `m вүҘ 1`, then on `b = 0` vs `b > 0`; for `m вүҘ 1, b > 0` chains `expectation_le_rademacher` + `mcdiarmid_inequality_pos'` + `uniformDeviation_bounded_difference` on the в„•-indexed centred class, transports via `foldB_pi_law` + `Finset.orderIsoOfFin`, and lifts to sup-over-`вҶҘS.Оҳ_set` via `separableSup_via_denseRange`. |
| `localEmpProcessModulus_singleton` | `theorem` | Smoke test: `Оҳ_set = {ОёвӮҖ}` вҮ’ modulus holds with `ПҒ вүЎ 0`. Proved. |

### 13''''.m `Estimation/CATE/OSL/Modulus/DRLearner.lean` (Phase-4a end-to-end)

Apply the Phase-4a bridge to the DR-Learner OSL system.  Real success
criterion for Phase 4a: yields `LocalEmpProcessModulus` for `(П„МӮ_n, ДҘ_n)`
under bounded eval / outcomes / nuisance LвҲһ / overlap.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `DREvalBounded Оҳ_set eval M_Оҳ` | `def`, `Prop` | Uniform `|eval Оё x| вүӨ M_Оҳ` over `Оҳ_set Г— Оі`. |
| `DROutcomeBounded S M_Y` | `def`, `Prop` | Bounded outcomes type-level: `0 вүӨ M_Y вҲ§ вҲҖ z : Оі Г— Bool Г— в„қ, |z.2.2| вүӨ M_Y`. The `вҲҖ z` form (rather than `вҲҖ Пү`) is needed because `UniformlyBoundedLoss` quantifies over all `z`. |
| `DRNuisanceOverlap S Оҳ_set h Оө` | `def`, `Prop` | Strict-overlap predicate: `0 < Оө вҲ§ Оө вүӨ 1/2 вҲ§ вҲҖ x, Оө вүӨ h.e_fn x вҲ§ h.e_fn x вүӨ 1 вҲ’ Оө`. Carries the propensity-bracketing slice condition (no longer a `True`-stub). |
| `DRNuisanceMuBounded h M_Ој` | `def`, `Prop` | Uniform LвҲһ bound on the outcome-regression nuisance: `0 вүӨ M_Ој вҲ§ вҲҖ b x, |h.Ој_fn b x| вүӨ M_Ој`. Required for boundedness of the AIPW pseudo-outcome. |
| `dr_loss_uniformly_bounded` | `theorem` | Bounded eval + outcomes + nuisance LвҲһ + overlap вҮ’ DR squared loss is uniformly bounded over `Оҳ_set` at `h` by the **explicit** value `b := (M_Оҳ + 2В·M_Ој + 2В·(M_Y + M_Ој)/Оө)ВІ`. Proved by Codex via the AIPW pseudo-outcome triangle bound `\|phi_eta z h\| вүӨ 2 M_Ој + 2 (M_Y + M_Ој) / Оө`. (Returns `UniformlyBoundedLoss ... b` directly вҖ” no existential вҖ” so callers can write FS-style hypotheses against the explicit value.) |
| `localEmpProcessModulus_drLearner` | `theorem` | End-to-end: instantiates `localEmpProcessModulus_of_bounded_rademacher` for the DR-Learner `OSLSystem`. Takes `idx : в„• вҶ’ вҶҘ(drOSLSystem ...).Оҳ_set`, `idx_dense : DenseRange idx`, and `LossContinuousOnОҳset` for the DR loss in addition to the `(M_Оҳ, M_Y, M_Ој, Оө)` quartet. Concludes the tightened piecewise rate, with textbook `вҲҡ(2 R_n + Оө)` on nonempty folds and `вҲҡ(2b)` when the fold is empty. Proved as a thin wrapper. |

### 13''''.n `Estimation/CATE/OSL/Modulus/DRLearnerEndToEnd.lean` (Phase-3 вҶ” Phase-4a chain)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `oracle_inequality_drLearner_highProb` | `theorem` | **Phase-3 вҶ” Phase-4a end-to-end chain (proved).** Composes `localEmpProcessModulus_drLearner` (Phase-4a DR modulus discharge) with `oracle_inequality_plugin_ERM_highProb` (Phase-1 high-probability oracle inequality) to derive a closed-form high-probability rate `вҖ–П„hat n Пү вҲ’ П„вӮҖвҖ–ВІ вүӨ (4(1+Пғ)/ПғВІ)В·(вҲҡ(if (split.foldB n).card = 0 then 2b else 2 R n + 2bВ·вҲҡ(2 log(1/Оҙ)/(split.foldB n).card)))ВІ + (4/Пғ)В·Bias_n + (4/Пғ)В·r_opt n` with `Ој`-probability вүҘ `1 вҲ’ Оҙ` for the DR-Learner OSL system. Threads `idx`, `idx_dense`, `LossContinuousOnОҳset`, and `DRNuisanceMuBounded` through. Phase 4a verification step 3 вҖ” **complete and sorry-free**. |

### 13''''.o `Stat/Concentration/{StarHull,Contraction,CriticalRadius,LocalRademacher,UniformDeviationLocalized}.lean` (Phase-4b localized chain)

Path-B (McDiarmid + symmetrization + contraction) localized empirical-process toolbox. Sibling to Phase-4a `Stat/Concentration/{Rademacher,...}` shims, but contains *new* formalization (not vendored). Headline: `localized_uniform_deviation` with shape `rВ·Оҙ_n + Оҙ_nВІ` matching FosterвҖ“Syrgkanis 2019 Lemma 29 up to log factors. Plan reference: `.claude/plans/i-just-added-a-rosy-hennessy.md`, Phase 4b.

#### 13''''.o.1 `Stat/Concentration/StarHull.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `starHull F` | `def`, `Set (рқ’і вҶ’ в„қ)` | `{Оұ вҖў F i : i вҲҲ О№, Оұ вҲҲ [0,1]}`. BartlettвҖ“BousquetвҖ“Mendelson 2005 star-hull around 0. |
| `starHullIndex F` | `noncomputable def` | Subtype re-index `{f // f вҲҲ starHull F}` for downstream Rademacher arguments. |
| `mem_starHull_self`, `zero_mem_starHull`, `starHull_mono`, `starHull_smul_mem` | `lemma`s (`sorry`) | Algebra: `F i вҲҲ starHull F`, `0 вҲҲ starHull F`, monotonicity, scalar closure on `[0,1]`. |

#### 13''''.o.2 `Stat/Concentration/Contraction.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `LipschitzAt0 ПҶ L` | `def`, `Prop` | `ПҶ 0 = 0 вҲ§ вҲҖ x y, |ПҶ x вҲ’ ПҶ y| вүӨ L |x вҲ’ y|`. The Lipschitz-with-`ПҶ(0)=0` regime needed by LedouxвҖ“Talagrand. |
| `rademacher_contraction` | `theorem` | **LedouxвҖ“Talagrand 1991 Thm 4.12 (signed form).** `RМӮ_n^{noabs}(ПҶ вҲҳ F, S) вүӨ L В· RМӮ_n^{noabs}(F, S)` for L-Lipschitz `ПҶ` with `ПҶ 0 = 0`. **Proved by Codex** via the hybrid-induction argument: a sign-pair Lipschitz inequality (`sup_pair_lipschitz_scaled`) bounds the two-sign sum at one coordinate, then a hybrid average `hybridAverage` interpolating between `ПҶ вҲҳ F` and `L В· F` is shown monotone in the number of swapped coordinates (`hybridAverage_mono_step`); telescoping recovers the headline. |
| `rademacher_contraction_abs` | `theorem` | Absolute-value form: `RМӮ_n(ПҶ вҲҳ F, S) вүӨ 2В·LВ·RМӮ_n(F, S)`. **Proved by Codex** by reducing to the signed form applied to `ПҶ` and `вҲ’ПҶ` (via `lipschitzAt0_neg`), bounding `|x| вүӨ xвҒә + xвҒ»` over the Rademacher sup. |
| `empiricalRademacherComplexity_contraction_abs_of_bddAbove` | `theorem` | **Infinite-index contraction.** Same `RМӮ_n(ПҶ вҲҳ F, S) вүӨ 2LВ·RМӮ_n(F, S)` as `rademacher_contraction_abs` but for an ARBITRARY `[Nonempty О№]` (not just `Fintype`), assuming a uniform bound `|F i x| вүӨ M`. Reduces the infinite-index case to the Fintype lemma by choosing, for each of the finitely many sign vectors, an `Оө`-approximate maximizer; their finite collection is a finite subindex. This is what lets the squared-loss kernel/lasso ERM (whose weight ball is infinite) use the contraction. **Proved.** |
| `empiricalRademacherComplexity_sub_le` | `theorem` | **Sub-additivity over class differences.** `RМӮ_n(F вҲ’ G, S) вүӨ RМӮ_n(F, S) + RМӮ_n(G, S)` (uniform bounds on `F`, `G`). Splits the centered squared loss `вҹӘw,xвҹ©ВІ вҲ’ 2yвҹӘw,xвҹ©` into its quadratic and cross parts. **Proved.** |
| `empiricalRademacherComplexity_smul_class`, `empiricalRademacherComplexity_without_abs_smul_class` | `theorem` | Smoke test: `RМӮ_n(cвҖўF) = |c|В·RМӮ_n(F)` (resp. signed analogue). **Proved.** |
| `rademacher_swap_step`, `rademacher_telescope` | `private lemma` | Sign-swap proof scaffolds; **proved** as wrappers around the headline `rademacher_contraction` after the hybrid-induction proof landed. Kept private to flag the proof outline. |
| `SignAtom`, `flipSign`, `flipSignEquiv` | `private def` / `Equiv` | `Signs n` infrastructure: `SignAtom = {-1, 1}` finset element, single-coordinate sign flip and the sign-flip equivalence used to re-index `вҲ‘_Пғ` after a coordinate swap. **Proved.** |
| `sup_pair_lipschitz_scaled` | `private lemma` | Sign-pair Lipschitz inequality on `iSup`: `(вЁҶ a + cВ·sВ·ПҶ b) + (вЁҶ a вҲ’ cВ·sВ·ПҶ b) вүӨ (вЁҶ a + cВ·sВ·LВ·b) + (вЁҶ a вҲ’ cВ·sВ·LВ·b)` for `s вҲҲ {вҲ’1, +1}`, `c вүҘ 0`. The single-coordinate engine of the contraction proof. **Proved.** |
| `hybridInner`, `hybridAverage`, `hybridBase` | `private noncomputable def` | The hybrid signed-Rademacher quantity: at parameter `m`, replaces `ПҶ(F i (S k))` by `LВ·F i (S k)` for `k < m` and keeps `ПҶ` for `k вүҘ m`. `hybridInner` is the per-`Пғ`-per-`i` summand; `hybridAverage` is `(1/2вҒҝ) ОЈ_Пғ вЁҶ_i hybridInner`; `hybridBase` factors out the `k`-th coordinate for the swap step. |
| `hybridAverage_mono_step` | `private lemma` | Monotonicity of the hybrid average in `m`: `hybridAverage m вүӨ hybridAverage (m+1)` for `m < n`, by applying `sup_pair_lipschitz_scaled` to the two-sign sum at coordinate `m` after re-indexing via `flipSignEquiv`. **Proved.** |
| `rademacher_contraction_core` | `private lemma` | The actual contraction inequality on the without-abs form, before the `L`-scaling re-arrangement. Iterates `hybridAverage_mono_step` from `m = 0` to `m = n`, then closes by the without-abs scaling lemma. **Proved.** |
| `lipschitzAt0_neg` | `private lemma` | `LipschitzAt0 ПҶ L вҶ’ LipschitzAt0 (fun x => вҲ’ПҶ x) L`. **Proved.** |
| `iSup_abs_le_iSup_add_iSup_neg_of_exists_zero` | `private lemma` | `вЁҶ |x i| вүӨ (вЁҶ x i) + (вЁҶ (вҲ’x i))` when `0` lies in the family (i.e. for any class containing the zero function). **Proved.** |
| `withZero F` | `private def` | The class `F` augmented with the zero function, used to ensure both sup's are non-negative for the abs-form bound. |

#### 13''''.o.4 `Stat/Concentration/LocalRademacher.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `localRademacherComplexity F norm Ој X n r` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | Localized Rademacher complexity, **zero-out form**: the FoML `rademacherComplexity` of the family `fun g x => if norm g.val вүӨ r then g.val x else 0` over `starHullIndex F`. The earlier `sInf`-over-upper-bounds scaffold was anti-monotone in `r`; the zero-out form fixes the direction (more `r` вҮ’ more non-zero entries вҮ’ larger sup). |
| `localRademacherComplexity_nonneg` | `lemma` | Non-negativity via `integral_nonneg` + `Real.iSup_nonneg` + `abs_nonneg` (each summand of `empiricalRademacherComplexity` is an absolute value). **Proved.** |
| `localRademacherComplexity_mono_r` | `lemma` (`sorry`) | Monotonicity in radius. The pointwise comparison is straightforward; lifting through the integral needs an integrability witness on the upper function. **Phase-4b TODO.** |
| `localRademacherComplexity_le_starHull` | `lemma` (`sorry`) | **Star-hull lifting** (BBM 2005 step 2). Same integrability TODO as `_mono_r`. |

#### 13''''.o.5 `Stat/Concentration/UniformDeviationLocalized.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `LocalizedRegime О© О№ рқ’і F norm Ој X` | `structure` | Input bundle (Phase 4b redesign): uniform bound `b` on `|F i (X Пү)|`, and a sub-root Rademacher envelope `ПҲ` on `starHullZeroOut F norm r` (uniform in `n`). The Lipschitz `ПҶ` slot has been **dropped** вҖ” the envelope `ПҲ` lives directly on the centred loss class. Callers wanting a parameter-class envelope + Lipschitz `ПҶ` link can layer a contraction wrapper (deferred вҖ” see `Contraction.lean`). |
| `localized_uniform_deviation` | `theorem` | **Path-B fixed-`n` headline.** Under `LocalizedRegime`, with probability `вүҘ 1 вҲ’ Оҙ` over `ОјвҒҝ`, uniformly over `i` of `norm`-radius `вүӨ r`, the centred deviation is bounded by `4В·rВ·Оҙ_n + bВ·вҲҡ(2 log(1/Оҙ)/n)` where `Оҙ_n := criticalRadius ПҲ`. The `L_ПҶ` factor is **gone** (absorbed into `ПҲ`). Quarantines the McDiarmid step inside the proof so a future Talagrand upgrade is a drop-in (Risk #9). **Proved.** |
| `localized_uniform_deviation_sharp` | `theorem` | Reusable FosterвҖ“Syrgkanis Lemma 29 peeling layer over `localized_uniform_deviation`: for any public upper radius `ПҒ вүҘ criticalRadius (ПҲ n)`, diameter cap `Rmax`, radius-uniform Rademacher prerequisites, and peeling slack `bВ·вҲҡ(2 log(2(K+1)/Оҙ)/n) вүӨ ПҒВІ`, produces a single `ОјвҒҝ`-event on which each class element satisfying `0 вүӨ norm(F_i) вүӨ Rmax` obeys `|(P_n вҲ’ P)F_i| вүӨ 8ПҒВ·norm(F_i) + 5ПҒВІ`. This is the generic abstraction intended for OSL, NPIV, and future localized EP users. **Proved.** |
| `localized_uniform_deviation_singleton` | `theorem` | Singleton smoke-test stub. **Proved.** |

#### 13''''.o.6 `Stat/Concentration/LocalizedEnvelopeExpectation.lean`

In-expectation (and self-localizing offset) forms of the localized deviation bound, for downstream rate arguments that need an expectation rather than a high-probability envelope. Both are general empirical-process facts over a `LocalizedRegime`; the margin-coupled / VC specializations (turning the `norm`-radius into a problem-specific regret radius) are supplied by the caller. Built to discharge the localized finite-VC envelope gates of `stat_policy_regret_margin_overlap`.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `localized_uniform_deviation_expectation` | `theorem` | **Fixed-radius in-expectation envelope.** Steps 1вҖ“2 of the Path-B argument (symmetrization via FoML `uniform_deviation_expectation_le_two_smul_rademacher_complexity` + critical radius via `localRademacher_le_critical_radius`), stopping before the McDiarmid tail. For the radius-`r` zero-out localization, `рқ”ј[uniformDeviation over {norm(F i) вүӨ r}] вүӨ 2В·rВ·criticalRadius(ПҲ n)`. The in-expectation analogue of `localized_uniform_deviation`. **Proved (Codex), axiom-clean.** |
| `localized_offset_expectation` | `theorem` | **Self-localizing offset positive-part envelope.** Given a margin coupling `norm(F i) вүӨ AВ·(О” i)^Оә` (the caller's regret radius `О”`, `0<Оә<1`), `рқ”ј[вЁҶ i, {2В·|(PвӮҷвҲ’P)F i| вҲ’ О” i/4}_+] вүӨ offsetPeelingConstantC (1/8) Оә В· (16ПҒA)^{1/(1вҲ’Оә)} + 10ПҒВІ + 4В·R.bВ·Оҙ`. Assembled from the high-probability `localized_uniform_deviation_sharp`, the deterministic Young/AM-GM optimisation `OffsetPeeling.offset_peeling_coeff`, and a bounded bad-event tail split. Caller picks `ПҒ` = VC critical-radius rate and `Оҙ` polynomially small for a clean `(BВІ/n)^{A_Оұ}(log n)^p` rate. **Proved (Codex), axiom-clean.** |

Sibling to `OSL/Modulus.lean` (Phase 4a). Discharges `LocalEmpProcessModulus` from `localized_uniform_deviation` with the localized rate `ПҒ_n вүҲ criticalRadius ПҲ`.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OSLLocalizedRegime S S_iid split g idx norm ПҲ b` | `def`, `Prop` | Phase 4b redesigned predicate: `0 вүӨ b`, centred-loss boundedness `|в„“ z Оё g вҲ’ в„“ z ОёвӮҖ g| вүӨ b`, `SubRoot ПҲ`, and `RademacherUpperBound` for the centred в„•-indexed loss class (re-indexed via dense `idx : в„• вҶ’ S.Оҳ_set`) on a fold-B-sized population sample. The Lipschitz-link slot `L_ПҶ` is **dropped** вҖ” the envelope `ПҲ` lives directly on the centred loss class. |
| `empRiskFoldB_centered_abs_le` | `private lemma` | Pointwise centred-loss bound `\|в„“ z Оё g вҲ’ в„“ z ОёвӮҖ g\| вүӨ b` averages to `\|empRiskFoldB Оё вҲ’ empRiskFoldB ОёвӮҖ\| вүӨ b`. **Proved.** |
| `localEmpProcessModulus_of_localized_bounded` | `theorem` | **Uniform-bound fallback bridge (legitimate low-hypothesis option).** Under `OSLLocalizedRegime` + a population centred-risk bound `hpop_center : вҲҖ Оё вҲҲ Оҳ_set, \|S.L Оё g вҲ’ S.L ОёвӮҖ g\| вүӨ b`, concludes `LocalEmpProcessModulus` with the *constant* envelope `ПҒ n := вҲҡ(2b)`. **Proved.** Does NOT use `ПҲ`, critical-radius, or any Lipschitz / Rademacher-integrability machinery вҖ” purely bounded-loss. Useful when those inputs are unavailable; rate does not vanish in `n`. |
| `localEmpProcessModulus_of_localized_sharp` | `theorem` | **Phase-4b sharp headline вҖ” FosterвҖ“Syrgkanis Lemma 29 form (proved).** Under `OSLLocalizedRegime` plus an explicit Lipschitz constant `(L : в„қ) (hL_nonneg) (hF_lip : norm (zвҶҰв„“ z Оё g вҲ’ в„“ z ОёвӮҖ g) вүӨ L В· вҖ–ОёвҲ’ОёвӮҖвҖ–)`, diameter `Rmax`, the n-dependent critical-radius hypotheses, Rademacher prerequisites, and the **peeling-aware** FS critical-radius lower bound `hОҙ_dom : вҲҖ n K, 0 < (split.foldB n).card вҶ’ Rmax вүӨ Оҙ_n В· 2^K вҶ’ b В· вҲҡ(2 log(2(K+1)/Оҙ)/m) вүӨ Оҙ_nВІ`, concludes `LocalEmpProcessModulus` with the FS Lemma 29 rate `ПҒ n := if (split.foldB n).card = 0 then вҲҡ(2b) else (8L+3) В· criticalRadius (ПҲ (split.foldB n).card)`. **Proved (Codex)** via dyadic peeling + fold-B transport (mirroring `OSL/Modulus.lean:583-606`) + FS-absorption. Axiom-clean. |
| `localEmpProcessModulus_of_localized_singleton` | `theorem` | Singleton smoke-test (Оҳ_set = {ОёвӮҖ} вҮ’ ПҒ вүЎ 0). **Proved.** |

### 13''''.q `Estimation/CATE/OSL/Modulus/LocalizedDRLearner.lean` (Phase-4b end-to-end)

Apply `localEmpProcessModulus_of_localized` to the DR-Learner. Verification step 6 of Phase 4b.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `DRCriticalRadius S Оҳ_set eval idx h norm ПҲ` | `def`, `Prop` | Phase 4b redesigned predicate: `SubRoot ПҲ вҲ§ вҲҖ n, RademacherUpperBound (centred quadratic DR-loss class indexed by idx) norm S.P_Z id n ПҲ`. The DR centred class is `(ПҶ_h(z) вҲ’ eval (idx k) z.1)ВІ вҲ’ (ПҶ_h(z) вҲ’ S.П„_val z.1)ВІ`. (Deterministic / population вҖ” Risk #10.) |
| `localEmpProcessModulus_localized_drLearner` | `theorem` | **Phase-4b success criterion (sharp FosterвҖ“Syrgkanis Lemma 29 form, proved).** End-to-end: instantiates `localEmpProcessModulus_of_localized_sharp` for the DR-Learner OSL system. Takes `(M_Оҳ, M_Y, M_Ој, Оө)` boundedness/overlap, `[Countable Оҳ_set]`, dense `idx`, `DRCriticalRadius`, an explicit Lipschitz constant `(L, hL_nonneg, hF_lip)` for the centred DR-loss class, the diameter `Rmax`, the n-dependent critical-radius facts, the Rademacher prerequisites, and the **peeling-aware** FS lower-bound `hОҙ_dom : вҲҖ n K, 0 < |B(n)| вҶ’ Rmax вүӨ Оҙ_n В· 2^K вҶ’ 2В·b_lossВ·вҲҡ(2 log(2(K+1)/Оҙ)/m) вүӨ Оҙ_nВІ` (stated against `b_loss = (M_Оҳ + 2В·M_Ој + 2В·(M_Y+M_Ој)/Оө)ВІ`). Concludes `LocalEmpProcessModulus` with the FS Lemma 29 rate `ПҒ n := if (split.foldB n).card = 0 then вҲҡ(2b) else (8L+3) В· criticalRadius (ПҲ (split.foldB n).card)`. When chained with `OracleInequality`, gives the FosterвҖ“Syrgkanis `O_p(Оҙ_nВІ + nuisanceВІ)` rate. |
| `localEmpProcessModulus_localized_drLearner_bounded` | `theorem` | **Phase-4b end-to-end (uniform-bound fallback variant).** Working chain that calls `localEmpProcessModulus_of_localized_bounded` with `b := 2В·dr_loss_bound`. Concludes `LocalEmpProcessModulus` with the *constant* rate `ПҒ n := вҲҡ(2 В· 2b)` вҖ” does NOT use the critical radius. **Proved.** Useful as a low-hypothesis option when the sharp hypotheses (Lipschitz, Rademacher integrability, FS lower bound) are not available. |

## 13gm. `Estimation/GaussMarkov/` вҖ” Finite Gauss-Markov / BLUE layer

Reusable finite Gauss-Markov theory: the variance of a linear estimator, spherical/general covariance, the OLS weight via the normal-equations pseudoinverse, and the minimum-variance (BLUE) ordering theorems. Built on Mathlib `Matrix` (`mulVec`/`vecMul`/`dotProduct`, `nonsing_inv`, `PosSemidef`) and `ProbabilityTheory.covariance`/`variance`. Files: `QuadForm.lean` (variance object), `LeastNorm.lean` (algebraic ordering), `OLS.lean` (OLS weight), `Variance.lean` (probability bridge), `BLUE.lean` (variance-form BLUE). Consumed by the imputation event-study efficiency theorem (В§9i0a-ImputationEventStudyEfficiency). No `sorry`/`admit`/`axiom`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `GaussMarkov.quadVar` | `Matrix Obs Obs в„қ вҶ’ (Obs вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ в„қ` | Variance of a linear estimator with weight `w` under covariance `ОЈ`: the quadratic form `w в¬қбөҘ ОЈ *бөҘ w` (`= wбөҖОЈw`) | **Defined** |
| `GaussMarkov.SphericalErrors` | `Matrix Obs Obs в„қ вҶ’ в„қ вҶ’ Prop` | Spherical (homoskedastic, uncorrelated) covariance: `ОЈ = ПғВІ вҖў I` | **Defined** |
| `GaussMarkov.quadVar_spherical` | `SphericalErrors S Пғ вҶ’ quadVar S w = ПғВІ * (w в¬қбөҘ w)` | Under spherical errors the variance form reduces to `ПғВІвҖ–wвҖ–ВІ` | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.quadVar_nonneg` | `S.PosSemidef вҶ’ 0 вүӨ quadVar S w` | Variance form of a PSD covariance is nonnegative | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.colSpan_dotProduct_leftNull` | `z бөҘ* X = 0 вҶ’ (X *бөҘ g) в¬қбөҘ z = 0` | Column span вҹӮ left null space (the orthogonality at the heart of Gauss-Markov) | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.gauss_markov_spherical` | `SphericalErrors S Пғ вҶ’ wStar = X *бөҘ g вҶ’ wStar бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ w бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ quadVar S wStar вүӨ quadVar S w` | **Finite Gauss-Markov, spherical:** among weights with the same unbiasedness image, an OLS weight (in the column span of `X`) minimizes variance (Pythagoras) | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.gauss_markov_gls` | `S.PosSemidef вҶ’ S *бөҘ wStar = X *бөҘ g вҶ’ wStar бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ w бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ quadVar S wStar вүӨ quadVar S w` | **Finite Gauss-Markov, general (GLS):** for any PSD covariance, a GLS weight (`ОЈ wStar` in column span) minimizes variance | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.olsWeight` | `Matrix Obs Param в„қ вҶ’ (Param вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (Obs вҶ’ в„қ)` | OLS weight via the normal-equations pseudoinverse: `X (XбөҖX)вҒ»В№ c` | **Defined** |
| `GaussMarkov.olsWeight_unbiased` | `IsUnit (XбөҖ * X).det вҶ’ olsWeight X c бөҘ* X = c` | The OLS weight is unbiased when `XбөҖX` is invertible (full column rank) | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.olsWeight_mem_colSpan` | `olsWeight X c = X *бөҘ ((XбөҖ * X)вҒ»В№ *бөҘ c)` | The OLS weight lies in the column span of `X` | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.olsWeight_blue_spherical` | `IsUnit (XбөҖ*X).det вҶ’ SphericalErrors S Пғ вҶ’ w бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ quadVar S (olsWeight X c) вүӨ quadVar S w` | OLS is BLUE (variance-form) under spherical errors | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.covMatrix` | `(Obs вҶ’ О© вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Measure О© вҶ’ Matrix Obs Obs в„қ` | Covariance matrix of a finite random family, `ОЈ i j = cov(Yбөў, Yвұј)` | **Defined** |
| `GaussMarkov.variance_linearCombination` | `(вҲҖ i, MemLp (Y i) 2 Ој) вҶ’ Var[вҲ‘ i, w i * Y i; Ој] = quadVar (covMatrix Y Ој) w` | **Probability bridge:** the variance of a random linear estimator equals the covariance quadratic form | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.SphericalFamily` | `(Obs вҶ’ О© вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Measure О© вҶ’ в„қ вҶ’ Prop` | Random family with spherical errors: each cell variance `ПғВІ`, distinct cells uncorrelated | **Defined** |
| `GaussMarkov.sphericalFamily_covMatrix` | `SphericalFamily Y Ој Пғ вҶ’ SphericalErrors (covMatrix Y Ој) Пғ` | A spherical family has scalar-identity covariance matrix | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.covMatrix_posSemidef` | `(вҲҖ i, MemLp (Y i) 2 Ој) вҶ’ (covMatrix Y Ој).PosSemidef` | A covariance matrix is positive semidefinite | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.variance_blue_spherical` | `(вҲҖ i, MemLp (Y i) 2 Ој) вҶ’ SphericalFamily Y Ој Пғ вҶ’ wStar = X *бөҘ g вҶ’ wStar бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ w бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ Var[вҲ‘ wStarВ·Y] вүӨ Var[вҲ‘ wВ·Y]` | **BLUE (variance form), spherical:** OLS minimizes actual `ProbabilityTheory.variance` in the linear-unbiased class | **Proved** |
| `GaussMarkov.variance_blue_gls` | `(вҲҖ i, MemLp (Y i) 2 Ој) вҶ’ (covMatrix Y Ој) *бөҘ wStar = X *бөҘ g вҶ’ wStar бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ w бөҘ* X = c вҶ’ Var[вҲ‘ wStarВ·Y] вүӨ Var[вҲ‘ wВ·Y]` | **BLUE (variance form), general:** GLS minimizes variance for the family's own covariance | **Proved** |

---

## 13. `Estimation/ATE/` вҖ” Back-door ATE estimation and inference

Specific-system layer instantiating `POBackdoorSystem`. Mirrors
`doc/basic_concepts/po/estimation/{aipw_if,plug_in_ate,dml_ate}.tex`. The
concrete `dml_ATE_isAsymLinear` in `Estimation/ATE/DML.lean` remains the
production AIPW asymptotic-linearity headline; the abstract framework in
`Estimation/OrthogonalMoments/*` provides the abstractions, and `aipw_dml_isAsymLinear`
is **proved** (the ОёвӮҖ-shift gap was closed by the 2026-05-06 per-О·МӮ bilinear-remainder
refactor; see В§12g.6).

### 13a. `Estimation/ATE/InfluenceFunction.lean` (umbrella)

Single-import aggregator that re-exports the five sub-modules below.
`PlugIn.lean` and `DML.lean` import this file. Refactored from the original
~900-line monolithic file.

#### 13a.1 `Estimation/ATE/Setup.lean`

`BackdoorEstimationSystem` structure, data law, value-space estimand.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `BackdoorEstimationSystem P Оі` | structure | Extends `POBackdoorSystem` with value-space `Ој_val : Bool Г— Оі вҶ’ в„қ`, `e_val : Оі вҶ’ (0,1)`, and the **observable** compat fields `Ој_reg_compat : Ој_val d вҲҳ factualX =бөҗ adjustedCE d` (the ML/regression target вҖ” NO assumptions; see `regression_adjustment`), `e_compat : propScore true =бөҗ e_val вҲҳ factualX`. **The counterfactual reading `Ој[Y(d)\|ПғX] =бөҗ Ој_val d вҲҳ factualX` is no longer a field** вҖ” it is the derived lemma `Ој_compat` below. |
| `BackdoorEstimationSystem.Ој_compat` | `(hA : Assumptions) (d) вҶ’ Ој[Y(d)\|ПғX] =бөҗ Ој_val d вҲҳ factualX` | **Derived counterfactual compatibility** (was a structure field): `cate_backdoor hA d` composed with `Ој_reg_compat`. The counterfactual binding now correctly requires identification, not structural data. **Proved.** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.toBackdoorEstimationSystem` | `(S : POBackdoorSystem) (hov : two-sided overlap a.e.) (hY : Integrable factualY) вҶ’ BackdoorEstimationSystem P Оі` | **Derivability constructor.** Certifies the structure adds no assumptions beyond `POBackdoorSystem` + overlap + integrability: `Ој_val := regFn`, `e_val := eLift` clamped into (0,1) off-support; all fields discharged (`Ој_reg_compat` from `regression_adjustment`, `e_pos`/`e_lt_one` from the clamp, `e_compat` from overlap). **Proved.** |
| `StrictOverlap S Оө` | `Prop` | `0 < Оө`, `Оө вүӨ 1/2`, and `Оө вүӨ propScore true Пү вүӨ 1вҲ’Оө` a.s. |
| `P_X`, `P_Z`, `factualZ` | `def`s | Covariate marginal `Ој.map factualX`, joint data law `Ој.map (X,A,Y)`, and the data triple. |
| `measurable_factualZ` | `Measurable S.factualZ` | Product-measurability. **Proved.** |
| `ОёвӮҖ S` | `def` | Value-space estimand `вҲ« x, Ој_val(1,x) вҲ’ Ој_val(0,x) вҲӮP_X`. |
| `ОёвӮҖ_eq_ATE` | `S.ОёвӮҖ = S.ATE` | Reduces to `integral_map` + `Ој_compat hA` + `condExp_sub` + `integral_condExp`. **Proved.** |

#### 13a.2 `Estimation/ATE/AIPWMoment.lean`

AIPW moment, influence function, nuisance space.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `projX`, `projA`, `projY`, `indA` | `def`s | Projections from `(Оі Г— Bool Г— в„қ)` and the real-valued indicator of `{a = true}`. |
| `aipwMoment z Ој_fn e_fn Оё` | `def` | The AIPW moment `m_AIPW` from `def:est-aipw-moment`. |
| `ПҲ_AIPW S z` | `def` | Influence function at the truth `m_AIPW(О·вӮҖ, z, ОёвӮҖ)`. |
| `NuisanceVec Оі` | structure | Nuisance pair `(Ој_fn, e_fn)` with measurability witnesses. Componentwise `Zero`/`Add`/`Neg`/`Sub`/`SMul в„қ`/`AddCommGroup`/`Module в„қ` instances. **Proved.** |
| `О·вӮҖ S` | `def` | The truth as a `NuisanceVec`. |
| `H_Оө Оө` | `def` | Overlap-bounded realization set `{О· : Оө вүӨ О·.e_fn вүӨ 1вҲ’Оө on Оі}`, the Lean instantiation of `def:est-aipw-nuisance-space`. |
| `aipwMomentFunctional` | `def` | The AIPW moment as a `NuisanceVec Оі вҶ’ (Оі Г— Bool Г— в„қ) вҶ’ в„қ вҶ’ в„қ` family, suitable for `NeymanOrthogonal`. |

#### 13a.3 `Estimation/ATE/MeanZero.lean`

Helpers and the headline mean-zero lemma.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `measurable_ПҲ_AIPW` | `Measurable S.ПҲ_AIPW` | **Proved.** |
| `cond_exp_residual_zero` | `Ој[indD d В· (Y вҲ’ Ој_val d (X)) \| ПғX] =бөҗ 0` | Reusable backdoor-factorization lemma; cites `cate_backdoor`, `Ој_compat`, `condExp_sub`. **Proved.** |
| `theta_zero_factualX_integral` | `S.ОёвӮҖ = вҲ« Пү, (Ој_val 1 X(Пү) вҲ’ Ој_val 0 X(Пү)) вҲӮP.Ој` | One-line `integral_map` pull-back. **Proved.** |
| `aipw_factualZ_integral_zero` | `вҲ« Пү, ПҲ_AIPW(factualZ Пү) вҲӮP.Ој = 0` | Pointwise decomposition into 4 pieces; main + constant cancel, both IPW corrections vanish via `weighted_residual_integral_zero`. **Proved.** |
| `aipw_mean_zero` | `вҲ« ПҲ_AIPW dP_Z = 0` | One-line `integral_map` reduction to `aipw_factualZ_integral_zero`. **Proved.** |

#### 13a.4 `Estimation/ATE/ScorePullout.lean`

Shared score pull-out lemmas used by `MeanZero.lean` and `Remainder*.lean`.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `e_val_label` | `e_val_label true = e_val`, `e_val_label false = 1 - e_val` | Value-space propensity conversion for labels. **Proved.** |
| `measurable_e_val_label` | `Measurable (S.e_val_label d)` | Measurability of value-space propensity label. **Proved.** |
| `propScore_false_ae` | `propScore false =бөҗ 1 - propScore true` | Linearity of conditional expectation + `indicator_add_indicator_not`. **Proved.** |
| `propScore_eq_e_val_label_ae` | `propScore d =бөҗ e_val_label d (X)` | `Пғ(X)`-conditional expectation of the treatment indicator. **Proved.** |
| `weighted_residual_integral_zero` | `вҲ« g(X) В· indD d В· (Y вҲ’ Ој_val d X) вҲӮP.Ој = 0` for measurable `g` and integrable product | Пғ(X)-pull-out + `h_residual_ce_zero` + `integral_condExp`. **Proved.** |
| `indicator_to_propScore_integral` | `вҲ« f(X) В· indD d вҲӮP.Ој = вҲ« f(X) В· e_val_label d (X) вҲӮP.Ој` | Rewrites indicators inside integrals to value-space scores. **Proved.** |

#### 13a.5 `Estimation/ATE/Archived/` вҖ” GГўteaux-derivative Neyman witness (archived 2026-05-06)

The textbook GГўteaux-derivative Neyman orthogonality witness for AIPW
(`aipw_neyman` and the supporting `NeymanAux/*` helpers) was archived after
the 2026-05-06 refactor of `aipw_dml_isAsymLinear`, which closes the DML
asymptotic-linearity proof through the per-О·МӮ bilinear-remainder bound
(`aipw_remainder_bound`) directly without going through a directional
derivative.  The archived files are retained for reference; they no longer
participate in the live build.

* `Archived/Neyman.lean` вҖ” `aipw_neyman` (Sorry; GГўteaux-form Neyman orthogonality on `H_Оө`).
* `Archived/NeymanAux.lean` вҖ” umbrella import.
* `Archived/NeymanAux/Overlap.lean` вҖ” perturbation algebra and overlap bounds.
* `Archived/NeymanAux/Score.lean` вҖ” assignment-residual pull-out.
* `Archived/NeymanAux/{MuTrueResidual,MuFalseResidual,ETrueResidual,EFalseResidual}.lean` вҖ” four directional residual-zero integrals.
* `Archived/NeymanAux/Residual.lean` вҖ” residual umbrella.
* `Archived/NeymanAux/Directional.lean` вҖ” `aipwDirDeriv`, `measurable_aipwDirDeriv`, `aipwMoment_diff_quotient_tendsto`, `integral_aipwDirDeriv_eq_zero` (Sorry), `integral_aipwMoment_diff_quotient_tendsto` (Sorry).

#### 13a.6 `Estimation/ATE/FiniteVar.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `aipw_finite_var` | `Integrable (ПҲ_AIPWВІ) P_Z` | Pushforward to О© + `MemLp` arithmetic + conditional Jensen on `Ој_val(d, X)`. Requires `Integrable (factualYВІ)` and `Integrable ((YofD d)ВІ)`. **Proved.** |

#### 13a.7 `Estimation/ATE/AIPWScoreL2.lean`

LВІ(P_Z) continuity of `m_AIPW(О·, В·, ОёвӮҖ)` in `О·` on `H_Оө`. Consumed by the DML `RвӮӮ` empirical-process step.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `K_AIPW Оө` | `def` | Lipschitz constant `1 + 2/Оө + 2/ОөВІ`. |
| `aipw_score_diff_pointwise_bound` | `вҲҖбөҗ z вҲӮP_Z, \|m_AIPW(О·,z,ОёвӮҖ) вҲ’ m_AIPW(О·вӮҖ,z,ОёвӮҖ)\| вүӨ K_AIPW Оө В· (ОЈ_a \|О”Ој_a\| + (\|yвҲ’ОјвӮҒ\|+\|yвҲ’ОјвӮҖ\|)В·\|О”e\|)` | `P_Z`-a.e. Lipschitz on `H_Оө`. Statement is a.e. (not pointwise) so `S.StrictOverlap Оө` (`P.Ој`-a.s.) suffices: it transfers via `e_compat` and pushforward to `Оө вүӨ e_val вҲҳ projX вүӨ 1вҲ’Оө` `P_Z`-a.s., then the algebraic Lipschitz step closes. **Proved by Codex.** |
| `YMuVal_residual_sq` | `def` | `(\|y вҲ’ Ој_val(1,x)\| + \|y вҲ’ Ој_val(0,x)\|)ВІ` вҖ” fixed LВ№(P_Z) cross-term integrand. |
| `yMuVal_residual_sq_integrable` | `Integrable YMuVal_residual_sq P_Z` | Pushforward `h_y2 + h_yd2` along `factualZ`, plus conditional-Jensen for `Ој_val(d,X)ВІ вҲҲ LВІ(P_X)`. **Proved by Codex.** |
| `aipw_score_diff_isLittleOp_one` | individual rates + `MemLp` of nuisance differences вҮ’ `вҖ–m_AIPW(О·МӮ,В·,ОёвӮҖ) вҲ’ m_AIPW(О·вӮҖ,В·,ОёвӮҖ)вҖ–_{LВІ(P_Z)} = o_p(1)` | Uses the a.e. Lipschitz bound, `P_Z.map projX = P_X`, and a truncation argument for the residual-weighted propensity-error cross term. **Proved.** |

### 13b. `Estimation/ATE/PlugIn.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `plugInEstimator` | `def` | `(1/\|B(n)\|) ОЈ_{i вҲҲ B(n)} (ОјМӮ(n)(1, X_i) вҲ’ ОјМӮ(n)(0, X_i))`. |
| `ПҲ_plugin` | `def` | Plug-in IF `ПҲ_plugin(z) = Ој_val(1, x) вҲ’ Ој_val(0, x) вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ`. |
| `plugIn_isAsymLinear` | Anchor (C) | Asymptotic linearity at `ОёвӮҖ` with IF `ПҲ_plugin`, **indexed over `split.foldB`**. Hypotheses now include joint measurability `h_mu_meas : вҲҖ n a, Measurable (fun (p : P.О© Г— Оі) => Ој_hat n p.1 a p.2)`, the new joint fold-A measurability `h_mu_uncurry_foldA : вҲҖ n a, Measurable[m_A.prod Пғ_Оі] (fun p => Ој_hat n p.1 a p.2)` (consumed by the new `iid_centered_sum_sq_lintegral_le` bridge), and `MemLp` `h_mu_memLp : вҲҖ n Пү a, MemLp (fun x => Ој_hat n Пү a x) 2 S.P_X` (classical implicit assumptions). All three bullets **proved**: `mean_zero`, `finite_var` inline; `remainder` decomposes into `G + B` (centered fold-B sum + bias) via `foldB_centered_sum_isLittleOp_one` and `sqrtFoldB_integral_isLittleOp_one` plus the `S.P_Z.map projX = S.P_X` bridge. **Modulo the single probability sorry in `IIDCenteredSum.iid_centered_sum_sq_lintegral_unscaled_le` + the pre-existing Markov + DCT sorry in `foldB_centered_sum_truncated_isLittleOp_one`**. |
| `plugIn_tendstoNormal` | `вҲҡ\|B(n)\| (ОёМӮвҒҝ вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ) вҮ’ N(0, вҲ«ПҲВІ_plugin dP_Z)` | "In particular ..." clause of `thm:est-plug-in-ate-al`: composes `plugIn_isAsymLinear` with `IsAsymLinear.tendsto_normal_foldB` from `Stat/SampleSplit/PartialFoldCLT.lean`. **Proved** modulo the existing AL `sorry`. The `вҲҡn`-rate form `вҲҡn (ОёМӮвҒҝ вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ) вҮ’ N(0, ПғВІ/c)` is one further Slutsky scaling step (cf. `IsAsymLinear.tendsto_normal_foldB_sqrt_n`). |

### 13c. `Estimation/ATE/DML.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dmlEstimator` | `def` | `(1/\|B(n)\|) ОЈ_{i вҲҲ B(n)} m_AIPW(О·МӮ(n), Z_i, _)`. |
| `dml_ATE_isAsymLinear` | Anchor (B) | Asymptotic linearity at `ОёвӮҖ` with IF `ПҲ_AIPW`, **indexed over `split.foldB`**. **Migrated 2026-05-06** to a thin wrapper over the abstract `aipw_dml_isAsymLinear` (Estimation/OrthogonalMoments/AIPWInstance.lean): builds `О·_hat n Пү : NuisanceVec Оі` from `(Ој_hat n Пү, e_hat n Пү)`, derives per-О·МӮ_n LВІ-of-differences from `h_mu_memLp` / `h_e_memLp` (plus inline derivations of `MemLp (S.Ој_val a)` via condExp and `MemLp S.e_val` via boundedness), translates the production rate hypotheses into the abstract `ПҒвӮҒ = вҖ–О”Ој_TвҖ–вӮӮ + вҖ–О”Ој_FвҖ–вӮӮ` / `ПҒвӮӮ = вҖ–О”eвҖ–вӮӮ` shape (sum-of-`o_p` arguments), passes the score measurability/integrability bundle, applies the abstract theorem, then transports the conclusion field-by-field via two pointwise equalities: (i) IF equality `вҲ’JвӮҖ_inv В· aipwMomentFunctional S.О·вӮҖ z S.ОёвӮҖ = S.ПҲ_AIPW z` (`JвӮҖ = вҲ’1` вҮ’ `вҲ’JвӮҖ_inv = 1`); (ii) rescaled-error equality `вҲҡ\|B(n)\| В· (dmlChern вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ) = вҲҡ\|B(n)\| В· (dmlEstimator вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ)` proved by case-split on `\|B(n)\| = 0` (both sides vanish via `вҲҡ0 = 0`) vs `\|B(n)\| > 0` (algebraic identity using `aipwMoment(z, ОјМӮ, ГӘ, 0) = aipwMoment(z, ОјМӮ, ГӘ, S.ОёвӮҖ) + S.ОёвӮҖ`). The two-step transport correctly handles the empty-fold edge case where the underlying estimators differ pointwise but their rescaled errors agree. Net effect: the original ~615-line proof body (centered fold-B sum + bias decomposition expanded inline) is replaced by ~150 lines of structural translation, with all heavy lifting delegated to the OrthogonalMoments/ abstractions. New hypothesis vs the old version: `h_e_val_pointwise : вҲҖ x, Оө вүӨ S.e_val x вҲ§ S.e_val x вүӨ 1 вҲ’ Оө` (needed to construct `aipwGeneralMoment`'s `О·вӮҖ_mem` field). The `h_L2 : вҲҖ О· вҲҲ H_Оө Оө, вҖҰ` hypothesis was NOT added вҖ” it's eliminated by the parallel (2b) refactor of `aipw_dml_isAsymLinear`. **Proved** (no sorries). |
| `dml_ATE_tendstoNormal` | `вҲҡ\|B(n)\| (ОёМӮвҒҝ вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ) вҮ’ N(0, вҲ«ПҲВІ_AIPW dP_Z)` | "In particular ..." clause of `thm:est-dml-ate-al`: composes `dml_ATE_isAsymLinear` with `IsAsymLinear.tendsto_normal_foldB`. **Proved.** Signature gained one extra hypothesis `h_e_val_pointwise` (forwarded to `dml_ATE_isAsymLinear` after the 2026-05-06 migration). The `вҲҡn`-rate / `ПғВІ/c` form is the same downstream Slutsky scaling. |

### 13d. `Estimation/ATE/Remainder.lean`

AIPW second-order remainder bound (split into `RemainderIdentity.lean` and
`RemainderBound.lean`).  Combines the algebraic remainder identity with the
overlap-bounded CauchyвҖ“Schwarz step to convert the LВІ-product rate hypothesis
from `DML.lean` into the `o_p(n^{-1/2})` cross-term that closes `RвӮҒ` of the
three-remainder DML decomposition.  After the 2026-05-06 refactor this is the
sole route to Neyman orthogonality on the live AL critical path; the
GГўteaux-derivative witness `aipw_neyman` was archived to
`Estimation/ATE/Archived/Neyman.lean`.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `aipw_rem_const Оө` | `def` | The constant `2 / (Оө(1вҲ’Оө))`, the uniform weight bound on `H_Оө`. |
| `plugin_bias_le_eLpNorm` | `\|вҲ« (ОјМӮ вҲ’ Ој_val) dP_X\| вүӨ вҖ–ОјМӮ вҲ’ Ој_valвҖ–_{LВІ(P_X)}` | Direct corollary of `abs_integral_le_eLpNorm_two` since `P_X` is a probability measure. **Proved.** (`RemainderIdentity.lean`) |
| `aipw_remainder_identity` | `вҲ« aipwMomentFunctional О· z ОёвӮҖ dP_Z = вҲ«x ...` | Exact identity rewriting the remainder as cross terms before CauchyвҖ“Schwarz. **Proved.** (`RemainderIdentity.lean`) |
| `aipw_remainder_bound` | `\|вҲ« aipwMomentFunctional О· z ОёвӮҖ dP_Z\| вүӨ aipw_rem_const Оө В· ОЈ_a вҖ–О”Ој_aвҖ–вӮӮ В· вҖ–О”eвҖ–вӮӮ` for `О· вҲҲ H_Оө Оө` | Algebraic expansion of `aipw_remainder_identity` + weight bound + CauchyвҖ“Schwarz. **Proved.** (`RemainderBound.lean`) |
| `aipw_remainder_op` | `(О·МӮ(n) вҲҲ H_Оө Оө)` вҲ§ `вҖ–О”Ој_aвҖ–вӮӮ В· вҖ–О”eвҖ–вӮӮ = o_p(n^{-1/2})` вҮ’ `вҲ« aipwMomentFunctional О·МӮ z ОёвӮҖ dP_Z = o_p(n^{-1/2})` | Stochastic-order corollary consumed at `DML.lean:152` (the `RвӮҒ` cross-term). **Proved.** (`RemainderBound.lean`) |

---

## 13plr. `Estimation/PLR/{Nuisance,Moment,Setup,MeanZero,RemainderBound,DML,ScoreL2,Feasible,JacobianConsistency}.lean` вҖ” Partially Linear DML

Instantiates the abstract DML `GeneralMoment` framework (В§OrthogonalMoments) with
the Robinson partialling-out score for the partially linear model, built on the PO
causal layer В§9g'''. Yields the doubly-robust moment whose product-rate remainder
drives вҲҡn-asymptotic normality of the DML estimator of the structural slope `Оё`.
The score is a *linear score* with `m_a = вҲ’(DвҲ’m(X))ВІ`, so the Jacobian
`JвӮҖ = вҲ’E[(DвҲ’m_val(X))ВІ]` is DGP-dependent (unlike AIPW's `JвӮҖ = вҲ’1`).

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `PLRNuisance Оі` | structure | Bundled nuisance `(в„“, m)` of two measurable covariate functions, with `AddCommGroup`/`Module в„қ` instances вҖ” the DML nuisance space `H`. |
| `plrResidual О· z` | `в„қ` | The treatment residual `d вҲ’ m(x)` of observation `z=(x,d,y)`. |
| `plrMomentFunctional О· z Оё` | `в„қ` | The Robinson partialling-out score `(yвҲ’в„“(x)вҲ’Оё(dвҲ’m(x)))В·(dвҲ’m(x))`. |
| `plrMoment_decomp` | `ПҲ = m_aВ·Оё + m_b` | Linear-in-parameter decomposition, `m_a = вҲ’(dвҲ’m)ВІ`, `m_b = (yвҲ’в„“)(dвҲ’m)`. |
| `measurable_plrMomentFunctional` | measurability | The score is measurable in the data (the nuisance carries its own measurability). |
| `PLRSystem` | structure (extends model) | Value-space estimation system: a `POPartialLinearModel` plus regression representatives `в„“_val, m_val`, their compatibility with `E[YвҲЈПғX]`/`E[DвҲЈПғX]`, and nondegeneracy `E[(DвҲ’m_val(X))ВІ]вү 0`. |
| `PLRSystem.P_Z` / `P_X` | `Measure вҖҰ` | Joint observed-data law `(X,D,Y)` and covariate marginal. |
| `PLRSystem.integral_P_Z` | `вҲ« f dP_Z = вҲ« fвҲҳ(X,D,Y) dОј` | Change-of-variables bridge between `P_Z`-level and `Ој`-level statements. |
| `PLRSystem.plrGeneralMoment` | `GeneralMoment вҖҰ` | **The DML moment instance**: score, truth `О·вӮҖ=(в„“_val,m_val)`, target `ОёвӮҖ=Оё`, LВІ(P_X) bilinear seminorms, Jacobian `JвӮҖ=вҲ’E[(DвҲ’m_val(X))ВІ]`. |
| `PLRSystem.plr_meanZero` | `MeanZero plrGeneralMoment` | The score has zero population mean at the truth (reduces, via CoV + compat, to `integral_U_resid`). |
| `PLRSystem.plr_remainder_bound` | `\|E[ПҲ(О·,В·,ОёвӮҖ)]\| вүӨ (1+\|ОёвӮҖ\|)В·ПҒвӮҒВ·ПҒвӮӮ` | **Doubly-robust bilinear remainder**: the population bias at an estimated nuisance is the *product* of the two LВІ(P_X) nuisance errors; the framework's `o_p(n^{-1/2})` product-rate is exactly the textbook "both nuisances at `o_p(n^{-1/4})`." |
| `PLRSystem.plr_finite_var` | `Integrable ПҲ(О·вӮҖ,В·,ОёвӮҖ)ВІ` | Finite variance of the influence function, `E[UВІВ·(DвҲ’mвӮҖ(X))ВІ]<вҲһ`. |
| `PLRSystem.plr_dml_isAsymLinear` | `IsAsymLinear (dmlChernozhukovEstimator вҖҰ) ОёвӮҖ ПҲ вҖҰ` | **Asymptotic linearity** of the one-step partially linear DML estimator: builds mean-zero/finite-var/doubly-robust-remainder from the PLR facts and invokes the proven `dml_chernozhukov_asymptoticLinear` engine (measurability + nuisance-rate conditions taken as hypotheses, as in the AIPW headline). |
| `PLRSystem.plr_dml_tendstoNormal` | `вҲҡ\|B(n)\|В·(ОёМӮвҒҝвҲ’ОёвӮҖ) вҮ’ N(0, вҲ«ПҲВІ dP_Z)` | **вҲҡn-asymptotic normality** of the one-step DML estimator of the structural slope, via the generic `IsAsymLinear.tendsto_normal_foldB` CLT bridge; asymptotic variance `E[UВІ(DвҲ’mвӮҖ)ВІ]/E[(DвҲ’mвӮҖ)ВІ]ВІ`. |
| `PLRSystem.plr_score_diff_isLittleOp_one` | `вҖ–ПҲ(О·МӮ,В·,ОёвӮҖ)вҲ’ПҲ(О·вӮҖ,В·,ОёвӮҖ)вҖ–_{LВІ(P_Z)} = o_p(1)` | Score-difference LВІ-consistency (`ScoreL2.lean`): from bounded truth residuals + a uniform sup-bound on the treatment-regression error + the two LВІ(P_X) nuisance rates. Discharges the `h_score_diff_rate` hypothesis of `plr_dml_isAsymLinear` (so it need not be assumed). Proof: the purely algebraic 5-term doubly-robust expansion + eLpNorm triangle/LвҲһВ·LВІ bounds. |
| `PLRSystem.plrFeasibleEstimator` | `PвӮҷ[(YвҲ’в„“МӮ)(DвҲ’mМӮ)] / PвӮҷ[(DвҲ’mМӮ)ВІ]` | The **feasible solved** Robinson DML estimator (`Feasible.lean`) вҖ” the ratio actually computed in practice, obtained by solving the empirical orthogonal moment for `Оё`. |
| `PLRSystem.plr_dml_feasible_tendstoNormal` | `вҲҡ\|B(n)\|В·(ОёМӮ_feasвҲ’ОёвӮҖ) вҮ’ N(0, вҲ«ПҲВІ dP_Z)` | **вҲҡn-asymptotic normality of the feasible solved estimator**, with the same limiting variance as the one-step estimator. Reduces to `plr_dml_tendstoNormal` via the asymptotic equivalence `вҲҡ\|B\|(ОёМӮ_feasвҲ’ОёМӮ_os) = (JвӮҖвҒ»В№вҲ’(PвӮҷmвӮҗ)вҒ»В№)В·(вҲҡ\|B\|В·PвӮҷПҲ) = o_p(1)В·O_p(1)`, taking the fold-B Jacobian consistency `PвӮҷmвӮҗ(О·МӮ) вҶ’вӮҡ JвӮҖ` as a hypothesis. |
| `PLRSystem.integral_plrMomentA_О·вӮҖ_eq_JвӮҖ` | `вҲ« mвӮҗ(О·вӮҖ,В·) dP_Z = JвӮҖ` | The population integral of the partialling-out moment at the truth equals the Jacobian `JвӮҖ=вҲ’E[(DвҲ’m_val(X))ВІ]` (`JacobianConsistency.lean`). Change of variables + the `mвӮҗ=вҲ’(residual)ВІ`/`residSecondMoment` defs. |
| `PLRSystem.integral_plrMomentA_diff_eq` | `вҲ« (mвӮҗ(О·МӮ)вҲ’mвӮҗ(О·вӮҖ)) dP_Z = вҲ’вҖ–О”mвҖ–ВІвӮӮ` | **Bias of the empirical-Jacobian increment**: its population integral is minus the squared LВІ(P_X) treatment-regression error; the cross term vanishes by orthogonality of the residual (`integral_condExpZero_mul_comp_factualX` + `condExp_resid_sigmaX`). |
| `PLRSystem.plr_jacobian_consistency` | `PвӮҷmвӮҗ(О·МӮ) вҶ’вӮҡ JвӮҖ` | **Fold-B Jacobian consistency** (`JacobianConsistency.lean`): the empirical partialling-out Jacobian at the estimated nuisance, averaged over fold B, converges in probability to its population value `JвӮҖ`. This is exactly the `hJ_consist` hypothesis of `plr_dml_feasible_tendstoNormal`, so feasible-estimator normality no longer needs it assumed. Proof: fold-B WLLN on `mвӮҗ(О·вӮҖ,В·)` for the truth average; the bias of the increment is `вҲ’вҖ–О”mвҖ–ВІвӮӮ = o_p(1)` by the LВІ(P_X) rate; the centered fluctuation is `o_p(1)` from the fold-B centered empirical-process bound renormalized by `(вҲҡ\|B\|)вҒ»В№вҶ’0`. |

## 13'. `Estimation/ATT/` вҖ” Back-door ATT estimation and inference (parallel to В§13)

Specific-system layer instantiating `POBackdoorSystem` for the **Average Treatment effect on the Treated** (ATT). Mirrors the ATE pipeline of В§13 but uses the Hahn (1998) ATT AIPW form: nuisance is `(ОјвӮҖ, e)` (no `ОјвӮҒ`); one-sided overlap (`e вүӨ 1 вҲ’ Оө`); rescaled moment `m_AIPW^ATT(О·, z, Оё) = AВ·(Y вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ(X)) вҲ’ (1вҲ’A)В·(e/(1вҲ’e))В·(Y вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ(X)) вҲ’ AВ·Оё`; Jacobian `JвӮҖ = вҲ’ПҖ_T` (not `вҲ’1`); influence function `ПҲ_ATT(z) = (1/ПҖ_T) В· m_AIPW^ATT(О·вӮҖ, z, Оё_ATT)`.

Imports the Phase-1 identification result `PO/ID/Exact/ATT.lean` (В§9g').

### 13'a. `Estimation/ATT/InfluenceFunction.lean` (umbrella)

Single-import aggregator that re-exports Setup, AIPWMoment, ScorePullout, MeanZero, FiniteVar.

#### 13'a.1 `Estimation/ATT/Setup.lean` вҖ” `TreatedEstimationSystem`, data law, value-space estimand

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `TreatedEstimationSystem P Оі` | structure | Extends `POBackdoorSystem` with value-space `ОјвӮҖ_val : Оі вҶ’ в„қ`, `e_val : Оі вҶ’ в„қ`, `e_lt_one`, and the **observable** compat fields `ОјвӮҖ_reg_compat : ОјвӮҖ_val вҲҳ factualX =бөҗ adjustedCE false` (ML/regression target вҖ” NO assumptions), `e_compat : propScore true =бөҗ e_val вҲҳ factualX`. The counterfactual `Ој[Y(0)\|ПғX] =бөҗ ОјвӮҖ_val вҲҳ factualX` is the derived lemma `ОјвӮҖ_compat` below. Only the control-arm ОјвӮҖ enters the nuisance. |
| `TreatedEstimationSystem.ОјвӮҖ_compat` | `(hA : Assumptions) вҶ’ Ој[Y(0)\|ПғX] =бөҗ ОјвӮҖ_val вҲҳ factualX` | **Derived counterfactual compatibility** (was a field): `cate_backdoor hA false` composed with `ОјвӮҖ_reg_compat`. **Proved.** |
| `POBackdoorSystem.toTreatedEstimationSystem` | `(S : POBackdoorSystem) (hov : two-sided overlap a.e.) (hY : Integrable factualY) вҶ’ TreatedEstimationSystem P Оі` | **Derivability constructor.** `ОјвӮҖ_val := regFn false`, `e_val := eLift` clamped below 1; fields discharged (`ОјвӮҖ_reg_compat` from `regression_adjustment false`, `e_lt_one` from clamp, `e_compat` from overlap). **Proved.** |
| `OneSidedOverlap S Оө` | `Prop` | `0 < Оө вҲ§ Оө вүӨ 1/2 вҲ§ (вҲҖбөҗ Пү вҲӮP.Ој, propScore true Пү вүӨ 1 вҲ’ Оө)`. One-sided variant of `StrictOverlap`. |
| `P_X`, `P_Z`, `factualZ` | `def`s | Same as ATE; covariate marginal, joint data law, data triple. |
| `measurable_factualZ` | `Measurable S.factualZ` | **Proved.** |
| `P_Z_map_projX_eq_P_X` | `S.P_Z.map projX = S.P_X` | **Proved.** |
| `ПҖ_val S` | `def := S.toPOBackdoorSystem.propTreated` | Marginal treatment probability `ПҖ_T = E[A]`. |
| `ОёвӮҖ S` | `def := S.toPOBackdoorSystem.adjustedATT` | Value-space ATT estimand. |
| `ОёвӮҖ_eq_ATT` | `S.ОёвӮҖ = S.toPOBackdoorSystem.ATT` | One-line delegation to Phase-1 `ATT_eq_adjustedATT`. **Proved.** |

#### 13'a.2 `Estimation/ATT/AIPWMoment.lean` вҖ” ATT AIPW moment, IF, nuisance

| Declaration | Statement | Description |

| `aipwMomentATT z ОјвӮҖ_fn e_fn Оё` | `def` | `AВ·(Y вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ(X)) вҲ’ (1вҲ’A)В·(e/(1вҲ’e))В·(Y вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ(X)) вҲ’ AВ·Оё`. Reuses ATE's `projX, projA, projY, indA`. |

| `measurable_aipwMomentATTFunctional` | `Measurable (fun z => aipwMomentATTFunctional О· z Оё)` | **Proved.** |

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
