#### 13'a.4 `Estimation/ATT/MeanZero.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `measurable_ПҲ_ATT` | `Measurable S.ПҲ_ATT` | **Proved.** |
| `measurable_aipwMomentATT_at_ОёвӮҖ` | `Measurable (fun z => aipwMomentATT z ОјвӮҖ_val e_val ОёвӮҖ)` | **Proved.** |
| `aipw_mean_zero_ATT` | `вҲ« z, aipwMomentATT z ОјвӮҖ_val e_val ОёвӮҖ вҲӮP_Z = 0` under `OneSidedOverlap`, `Assumptions`, `0 < ПҖ_val`, `YВІ вҲҲ LВ№`, `Y(0)ВІ вҲҲ LВ№`, `hIPW` integrability | Reduces to Phase-1 `adjustedATT_eq_aipwForm` via `ОјвӮҖ_compat + cate_backdoor` ae-rewrite of the Пғ(X) representatives, then arithmetic cancellation `ПҖ_TВ·ОёвӮҖ вҲ’ ОёвӮҖВ·ПҖ_T = 0`. **Proved.** |

#### 13'a.5 `Estimation/ATT/FiniteVar.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `aipw_finite_var_ATT` | `Integrable (aipwMomentATT z ОјвӮҖ_val e_val ОёвӮҖ)ВІ P_Z` | Pushforward to О© + `(a+b+c)ВІ вүӨ 3(aВІ+bВІ+cВІ)` + each summand bounded via overlap and `YВІ, Y(0)ВІ вҲҲ LВ№`. **Proved.** |
| `ipw_estimated_integrable` | for any `О·` with `0 вүӨ e вүӨ 1вҲ’Оө` `P_X`-a.e. and `ОјвӮҖ вҲҲ LВІ(P_X)`: `Integrable ((1вҲ’A)В·(e/(1вҲ’e))В·(Y вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ)) P_Z` | **Derives the per-learner `h_IPW_at` gate** from one-sided overlap + LВІ learners. Weight `(1вҲ’A)В·e/(1вҲ’e)` is `P_Z`-a.e. bounded by `ОөвҒ»В№` (`L^вҲһ`), residual `Y вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ вҲҲ LВІ(P_Z)`, product in `LВІ вҠҶ LВ№`. Bounds taken **a.e.** (not pointwise). **Proved.** |
| `ipw_truth_integrable` | `Integrable ((1вҲ’A)В·(propScore/(1вҲ’propScore))В·(Y вҲ’ adjustedCE false)) P.Ој` under `OneSidedOverlap`, `Assumptions`, `YВІ, Y(0)ВІ вҲҲ LВ№` | **Derives the truth-nuisance `hIPW` gate** (consumed by `aipw_mean_zero_ATT` / `att_dml_isAsymLinear`) from overlap + LВІ outcomes alone вҖ” no pointwise bounds. Applies `ipw_estimated_integrable` at `О·вӮҖ`, transfers `P_Z вҶ’ P.Ој` along `factualZ`, then rewrites to PO representatives via `e_compat` / `ОјвӮҖ_reg_compat`. **Proved.** |

### 13'b. `Estimation/ATT/Remainder.lean` вҖ” second-order remainder (split file)

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `aipw_rem_const_ATT Оө` | `def := 1/Оө` | One-sided overlap weight bound (`(1вҲ’ГӘ)вҒ»В№ вүӨ 1/Оө`). Single product (no ОЈ over arms). |
| `IsLittleOp.add_eventually_nonneg_rate`, `IsLittleOp.of_abs_le_const_mul` | private helpers | Local copies of the general utilities from ATE/RemainderBound. **Proved.** |
| `aipw_remainder_identity_ATT` | `вҲ« aipwMomentATTFunctional О· z ОёвӮҖ вҲӮP_Z = вҲ« x, ((ГӘ вҲ’ e)/(1вҲ’ГӘ)) В· (ОјМӮвӮҖ вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ_val) вҲӮP_X` under `OneSidedOverlap`, `Assumptions`, `MemLp` of differences, IPW integrability | Hahn (1998) Theorem 1 eq. 7 second-order form. ATT version is one cross-product (no sum over arms). | **One sorry remaining** вҖ” the algebraic decomposition into Пғ(X)-residual zero-means is documented but the final `(ГӘВ·(1вҲ’e_val) вҲ’ e_valВ·(1вҲ’ГӘ))/(1вҲ’ГӘ) = (ГӘ вҲ’ e_val)/(1вҲ’ГӘ)` recombination step left as `sorry` after 3 codex iterations. (`RemainderIdentity.lean`) |
| `aipw_remainder_bound_ATT` | `\|вҲ« aipwMomentATTFunctional О· z ОёвӮҖ вҲӮP_Z\| вүӨ (1/Оө) В· вҖ–ОјМӮвӮҖ вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ_valвҖ–вӮӮ В· вҖ–ГӘ вҲ’ e_valвҖ–вӮӮ` for `О· вҲҲ H_Оө Оө` | CauchyвҖ“Schwarz on `aipw_remainder_identity_ATT`. **Proved** modulo the identity sorry above. (`RemainderBound.lean`) |
| `aipw_remainder_op_ATT` | Stochastic-order corollary `o_p(n^{-1/2})` under product rate | **Proved** modulo the identity sorry. (`RemainderBound.lean`) |

### 13'c. `Estimation/ATT/AIPWScoreL2.lean`

LВІ(P_Z) continuity of `m_AIPW^ATT(О·, В·, ОёвӮҖ)` in `О·` on `H_Оө`. ATT version drops the d=true arm.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `K_AIPW_ATT Оө` | `def := 1 + 2/Оө + 2/ОөВІ` | Lipschitz constant. |
| `K_AIPW_ATT_one_le, K_AIPW_ATT_mu_le, K_AIPW_ATT_inv_sq_le` | private monotonicity | **Proved.** |
| `aipw_score_lipschitz_ATT` | `\|m_AIPW^ATT(О·,z,ОёвӮҖ) вҲ’ m_AIPW^ATT(О·вӮҖ,z,ОёвӮҖ)\| вүӨ K_ATT(Оө)В·\|О”ОјвӮҖ(x)\| + K_ATT(Оө)В·\|y вҲ’ ОјвӮҖ(x)\|В·\|О”e(x)\|` | Pointwise Lipschitz on `H_Оө`; ATT is two summands (no sum over arms). **Proved.** Hypothesis list extended with `h_e_pointwise : вҲҖ x, S.e_val x вүӨ 1 вҲ’ Оө`. |
| `aipw_score_diff_isLittleOp_one_ATT` | individual rates + `MemLp` вҮ’ `вҖ–m_AIPW^ATT(О·МӮ,В·,ОёвӮҖ) вҲ’ m_AIPW^ATT(О·вӮҖ,В·,ОёвӮҖ)вҖ–_{LВІ(P_Z)} = o_p(1)` | **One sorry remaining** вҖ” the truncation step for the residualВ·О”e cross term needs `\|О”e\| вүӨ 1`, which the current one-sided `H_Оө` (`ГӘ вүӨ 1 вҲ’ Оө`, no lower bound) does not directly provide. Documented in a `--` comment. |

### 13'd. `Estimation/ATT/ATTInstance.lean` вҖ” abstract `GeneralMoment` instance + headline DML

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `attGeneralMoment` | `def : GeneralMoment вҖҰ` | Instantiates the abstract framework. `ПҒвӮҒ = вҖ–О”ОјвӮҖвҖ–_{LВІ(P_X)}` (single arm), `ПҒвӮӮ = вҖ–О”eвҖ–_{LВІ(P_X)}`, `JвӮҖ = вҲ’S.ПҖ_val`, `JвӮҖ_ne_zero` from `0 < S.ПҖ_val`. |
| `att_meanZero` | `MeanZero (attGeneralMoment вҖҰ)` | One-line delegation to `aipw_mean_zero_ATT`. **Proved.** |
| `att_bilinearRem` | `вҲғ C, BilinearRemainder (attGeneralMoment вҖҰ) C` | One-line delegation to `aipw_remainder_bound_ATT`; no ОЈ_a sum to unfold. **Proved.** (Conditional on the RemainderIdentity sorry.) |
| `att_dml_isAsymLinear` | `IsAsymLinear (dmlChernozhukovEstimator (attGeneralMoment вҖҰ) sample split О·_hat) S.ОёвӮҖ (fun z => -JвӮҖ_inv В· aipwMomentATTFunctional S.О·вӮҖ z S.ОёвӮҖ) sample split.foldB` | Headline composition: `att_meanZero` + `aipw_finite_var_ATT` + per-О·МӮ_n bilinear remainder + `aipw_score_diff_isLittleOp_one_ATT`, plumbed into `dml_chernozhukov_asymptoticLinear`. **Proved.** (Conditional on the AIPWScoreL2 + RemainderIdentity sorries.) |

### 13'e. `Estimation/ATT/DML.lean` вҖ” user-facing wrapper

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dmlEstimator_ATT` | `def := (1/ПҖ_val) В· (1/\|B(n)\|) ОЈ_{i вҲҲ B(n)} aipwMomentATT(Z_i, ОјМӮвӮҖ(n,Пү), ГӘ(n,Пү), 0)` | Empirical Hahn-form ATT estimator. |
| `ПҲ_ATT_integral_zero` | `вҲ« ПҲ_ATT dP_Z = 0` under `OneSidedOverlap`, `Assumptions`, `0 < ПҖ_T`, `YВІ, Y(0)ВІ вҲҲ LВ№`, truth IPW integrability | Mean-zero of the centered population-`ПҖ_T` IF. Derived from `aipw_mean_zero_ATT` + `вҲ« A dP_Z = ПҖ_T` and `m(О·вӮҖ,z,0) = m(О·вӮҖ,z,ОёвӮҖ) + AВ·ОёвӮҖ`. **Proved.** |
| `ПҲ_ATT_finite_var` | `Integrable (ПҲ_ATT)ВІ P_Z` under `OneSidedOverlap`, `Assumptions`, `YВІ, Y(0)ВІ вҲҲ LВ№` | Finite variance of the centered IF. Derived from `aipw_finite_var_ATT` (moment-at-`ОёвӮҖ` in `LВІ`) + boundedness of `A`, via `ПҲ_ATT = (1/ПҖ_T)В·(m(О·вӮҖ,В·,ОёвӮҖ) + ОёвӮҖВ·A) вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ вҲҲ LВІ(P_Z)`. **Proved.** |
| `dml_ATT_isAsymLinear` | Asymptotic linearity at `ОёвӮҖ` with IF `ПҲ_ATT`, indexed over `split.foldB`, under `OneSidedOverlap`, `Assumptions`, true/estimated propensity bounds, `0 < ПҖ_T`, `YВІ, Y(0)ВІ вҲҲ LВ№`, joint/fold-A measurability, per-Пү LВІ nuisance hypotheses, score integrability, and individual + product LВІ rates | Wrapper over `att_dml_isAsymLinear`. Builds `О·_hat` from `(ОјМӮвӮҖ, ГӘ)`, forwards the abstract score regularity bundle, and transports the Chernozhukov remainder to the population-`ПҖ_T` estimator with the centered `ПҲ_ATT`. The `IsAsymLinear` mean-zero / finite-variance fields are **derived** (via `ПҲ_ATT_integral_zero` / `ПҲ_ATT_finite_var`), and the truth / per-learner IPW integrability gates are **derived** (via `ipw_truth_integrable` / `ipw_estimated_integrable`) вҖ” none taken as hypotheses. **Proved in `DML.lean`.** |

### Phase-2 status summary

Twelve files written; ten with full proofs, two with one documented sorry each. Two sorries remain in the production chain (RemainderIdentity and AIPWScoreL2 isLittleOp), both stemming from the genuinely simpler statement requirements of the ATT setting that don't directly mirror ATE. Headline mathematical content (mean-zero, finite variance, Lipschitz bound, OR/AIPW remainder identity at the population level, abstract DML asymptotic linearity composition, DML headline transport) is proved except for the documented upstream gaps.

---

## 13''. `Estimation/DTR/` вҖ” Sequential AIPW (DTR, n = 2) DML estimation and inference

Dynamic-treatment-regime counterpart of the ATE DML pipeline.  The target is the fixed-regime mean `ОёвӮҖ = E[Y(dМ„)]` for `dМ„ : Fin 2 вҶ’ Оҙ`; the score is the explicit two-stage sequential AIPW moment with stagewise IPW weights, centered by `ОёвӮҖ`.  The population remainder is a cross-product identity over the stage-history marginals `P_HвӮҖ` and `P_HвӮҒ`, with `JвӮҖ = -1` in the abstract `GeneralMoment` instance.

Phase A scope: this module is intentionally specialized to horizon `n = 2`; Phase B generalizes to arbitrary finite horizons.  The treatment space `Оҙ` is discrete enough for equality indicators, via `[MeasurableSingletonClass Оҙ]`.

### 13''a.1 `Estimation/DTR/Setup.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `DTREstimationSystem P Оҙ Оі` | `structure extends PODTRSystem P 2 Оҙ Оі` | Adds fixed regime `dbar`, value-space representatives `ОјвӮҖ_val/eвӮҖ_val/ОјвӮҒ_val/eвӮҒ_val`, pointwise propensity bounds in `(0,1)`, and the **observable** regression-compat fields. `ОјвӮҖ_reg_compat : ОјвӮҖ_val вҲҳ factualS 0 =бөҗ innerReg dbar 1` (the outer nested regression `fвӮҒ`); `ОјвӮҒ_reg_compat : ОјвӮҒ_val вҲҳ (SвӮҒ,DвӮҖ,SвӮҖ) =бөҗ stageOneReg` (the last-stage regression `fвӮӮ`); `eвӮҖ_compat`/`eвӮҒ_compat` (observable propensities). The counterfactual `Ој[Y(dbar)\|Пғ(histвӮ–)]` readings are NO LONGER fields. |
| `DTREstimationSystem.ОјвӮҖ_compat` | `(hA : Assumptions) вҶ’ Ој[Y(dbar)\|Пғ(histвӮҖ)] =бөҗ ОјвӮҖ_val вҲҳ factualS 0` | **Derived** stage-0 counterfactual compat, via `cdtr_backdoor` (`Ој[Y(dbar)\|Пғ(histвӮҖ)] =бөҗ innerReg dbar (n-1)`) + `ОјвӮҖ_reg_compat`. **Proved.** |
| `DTREstimationSystem.stageOneReg` | `def : P.О© вҶ’ в„қ := condExpRatio_{histвӮҒ}(YВ·1_{DвӮҒ=dМ„вӮҒ}, 1_{DвӮҒ=dМ„вӮҒ})` | **Observable stage-1 regression** `fвӮӮ = E[Y\|histвӮҒ,DвӮҒ=dМ„вӮҒ]` (the paper CNSS nested-regression base case); the ML/regression target `ОјвӮҒ_val` represents. |
| `DTREstimationSystem.ОјвӮҒ_val_comp_eq_stageOneReg` | `ОјвӮҒ_val вҲҳ (SвӮҒ,DвӮҖ,SвӮҖ) =бөҗ stageOneReg` | `ОјвӮҒ_reg_compat` via the `stageOneReg` abbreviation. **Proved.** |
| `DTREstimationSystem.stageOneReg_indD_eq` | `(hA) вҶ’ stageOneReg В· indD dbar 1 =бөҗ indD dbar 1 В· Ој[Y(dbar)\|Пғ(histвӮҒ)]` | **Stage-1 `В·indD` identification** (regime-local `{DвӮҖ=dМ„вӮҖ}`): the observable `fвӮӮ` agrees with the counterfactual conditional on the regime path. Via `cdtr_base` + `stageOneReg = innerReg 0` on `{DвӮҖ=dМ„вӮҖ}`. Foundation for the AIPW-score consumers. **Proved.** |
| `DTREstimationSystem.stageOneReg_memLp` | `(hov : StrictOverlap Оө) (h_y2 : Integrable factualYВІ) вҶ’ MemLp stageOneReg 2 P.Ој` | `fвӮӮ вҲҲ LВІ` from strict overlap (denominator `вүҘ Оө`) + factual second moment. Foundation for the LВІ-membership consumers (replaces the old counterfactual route). **Proved.** |
| `StrictOverlap S Оө` | `0 < Оө вҲ§ Оө вүӨ 1/2 вҲ§` stage-0 and stage-1 conditional propensities lie in `[Оө, 1вҲ’Оө]` a.e. | Two-stage overlap predicate for the target regime. **Consumer note:** the DTR estimation theorems (`MeanZero`/`ScorePullout`/`FiniteVar`/`DML`/`RemainderIdentity`/`ScoreL2`) now thread `StrictOverlap`/`Integrable factualYВІ`/`Assumptions` where the old proofs used the (removed) counterfactual compat fields. |
| `PODTRSystem.toDTREstimationSystem` (`Estimation/DTR/Constructor.lean`) | `(S : PODTRSystem P 2 Оҙ Оі) (dbar) (two-stage overlap a.e.) вҶ’ DTREstimationSystem P Оҙ Оі` | **DTR derivability constructor.** Builds all four nuisances from DoobвҖ“Dynkin lifts вҖ” `ОјвӮҖ_val` from `innerReg dbar 1`, `ОјвӮҒ_val` from `stageOneReg`, `eвӮҖ_val`/`eвӮҒ_val` from the stagewise propensity lifts clamped into (0,1) вҖ” and discharges all ten structure fields. Certifies `DTREstimationSystem` adds no assumptions beyond a bare DTR system + overlap. Lift machinery: `exists_stage0_lift`/`exists_stage1_lift` (`Пғ(histвӮ–) вүӨ comap (explicit factual tuple)` + `Measurable.exists_eq_measurable_comp`). **Proved.** |
| `P_HвӮҖ`, `P_HвӮҒ`, `P_Z` | `Measure (Оі 0)`, `Measure (Оі 1 Г— Оҙ Г— Оі 0)`, `Measure (Оі 0 Г— Оҙ Г— Оі 1 Г— Оҙ Г— в„қ)` | Stage-history marginals and the factual data law. |
| `factualZ`, `measurable_factualZ` | `О© вҶ’ Оі 0 Г— Оҙ Г— Оі 1 Г— Оҙ Г— в„қ`; `Measurable S.factualZ` | Observed tuple `(SвӮҖ,DвӮҖ,SвӮҒ,DвӮҒ,Y)` and its measurability. |

### 13''b'. `Estimation/DTR/RemainderIdentity.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |

| `seqDR_remainder_identity` | `вҲ« m_seqDR(О·,z,ОёвӮҖ) dP_Z = вҲ«_{P_HвӮҖ} (ГӘвӮҖвҲ’eвӮҖ)В·(1/ГӘвӮҖ)В·(ОјМӮвӮҖвҲ’ОјвӮҖ) + вҲ«_{P_HвӮҒ} 1{DвӮҖ=dbar 0}В·(ГӘвӮҒвҲ’eвӮҒ)В·(1/(ГӘвӮҖВ·ГӘвӮҒ))В·(ОјМӮвӮҒвҲ’ОјвӮҒ)` | Headline n=2 algebraic remainder identity. Stage-1 RHS includes `indEq h.2.1 (S.dbar 0)` because `P_HвӮҒ` is unconditional. Stage weights are `wвӮҖ = 1/О·.eвӮҖ_fn` and `wвӮҒ = 1/(О·.eвӮҖ_fn(sвӮҖ)В·О·.eвӮҒ_fn(historyвӮҒ))`. **One documented sorry**: full n=2 algebraic unrolling, the module's second-hardest proof per the plan. |

| `seqDR_bilinearRem` | `вҲғ C, BilinearRemainder (seqDRGeneralMoment S h_e_pointwise) C` | Delegates to `seqDR_remainder_bound`. **Proved modulo upstream identity.** |
| `seqDR_dml_isAsymLinear` | Chernozhukov-form asymptotic linearity with IF `fun z => -JвӮҖ_inv В· S.seqDRMomentFunctional S.О·вӮҖ z S.ОёвӮҖ` | Abstract DTR asymptotic-linearity headline. **Proved modulo upstream RemainderIdentity + ScoreL2 sorries.** |

### 13''f. `Estimation/DTR/DML.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dml_DTR_estimator` | empirical fold-B mean of `seqDRMoment S.dbar (Z_i) (О·_hat n Пү) 0` | Production one-shot sequential DR estimator for the DTR effect. |
| `dml_DTR_isAsymLinear` | `IsAsymLinear (dml_DTR_estimator ...) S.ОёвӮҖ S.ПҲ_seqDR sample split.foldB` | User-facing wrapper over `seqDR_dml_isAsymLinear`, bundling four stagewise hats and translating rates/measurability. **One documented sorry**: needs reusable measurability lemma for `indEq` over `MeasurableSingletonClass Оҙ` histories plus inverse-weight bound normalization for the bundled DTR score. |

### Phase A status summary

Ten files implement the `n = 2` DTR sequential-AIPW DML pipeline.  Three documented sorries remain: `seqDR_remainder_identity`, `seqDR_score_diff_isLittleOp_one`, and `dml_DTR_isAsymLinear`.  All three are large algebraic / infrastructure proofs that mirror the corresponding ATE files at larger stagewise scale; downstream typechecking succeeds because the sorries are inside lemma bodies, not statements.  Phase B (general horizon `n`) is deferred.

---

## 13'''''. `Estimation/NPIV/` вҖ” TRAE / NPIV doubly-robust estimation and inference track

Formalizes the non-iterated Tikhonov regularized adversarial estimator (TRAE) of
Bennett et al. (2023) for linear inverse-problem functionals вҖ” the canonical
NPIV setup.  Mirrors `doc/basic_concepts/po/estimation/trae_inverse_problems.tex`.
**The entire primal one-step Tikhonov track is fully proved (zero sorries).**
Phase A (mixed-bias identity), Phase B (TRAE-DR asymptotic linearity +
asymptotic normality), Phase C-lite + Phase D (operator layer `T` + primal rate
theorem), and Phase E (adjoint `TвҖ `, real-CFC spectral calculus, Tikhonov bias
discharge, and the localized empirical-process event) are all complete.  The
dual TRAE (`def:est-trae-dual`) and its symmetric rate theorem are *not*
formalized вҖ” only the `DualSolution` structure the DR score needs is.  See the
per-phase Status section at the end.

### Phase A files

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Setup.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `InverseProblemSystem О© Ој` | structure | Linear inverse-problem functional system (`def:est-trae-system`).  Carries observation type `рқ’І` with projections `xOf : рқ’І вҶ’ рқ’і`, `zOf : рқ’І вҶ’ рқ’ө`; random observation `W : О© вҶ’ рқ’І`; candidate sets `Hbar вҠҶ (рқ’і вҶ’ в„қ)`, `Qbar вҠҶ (рқ’ө вҶ’ в„қ)` (closure under subtraction; no Hilbert structure in Phase A); observation-level moment maps `m, m_e` with linearity-over-subtraction; per-class measurability + integrability witnesses; primal nuisance `hвӮҖ вҲҲ Hbar`; primal moment identity `E[m(W; q)] = E[hвӮҖ(X) q(Z)]` for `q вҲҲ Qbar`. |
| `InverseProblemSystem.X`, `.Z` | `def`s | Derived random variables `X := xOf вҲҳ W`, `Z := zOf вҲҳ W`. |
| `InverseProblemSystem.ОёвӮҖ` | `def` | Scalar target `ОёвӮҖ := E[m_e(W; hвӮҖ)]`. |
| `InverseProblemSystem.phiVal h q w` | `def` | Pointwise pseudo-outcome `m_e(w; h) + m(w; q) вҲ’ q(zOf w) h(xOf w)`. Reusable for empirical fold averages. |
| `InverseProblemSystem.phi h q Пү` | `def` | `phiVal h q (W Пү)` вҖ” the Пү-indexed score. |
| `InverseProblemSystem.Оҳ h q` | `def` | `Оҳ(h, q) := E[ПҶ_{h, q}(W)]` (`def:est-trae-dr-functional`). |
| `InverseProblemSystem.DualSolution S qвӮҖ` | structure | `qвӮҖ вҲҲ Qbar` plus the dual moment identity `E[m_e(W; h)] = E[qвӮҖ(Z) h(X)]` for `h вҲҲ Hbar` (`def:est-trae-dual-solution`). |

#### `Estimation/NPIV/MixedBias.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `mixed_bias_identity` | `Оҳ(h, q) вҲ’ ОёвӮҖ = E[(qвӮҖ(Z) вҲ’ q(Z))(h(X) вҲ’ hвӮҖ(X))]` for `h вҲҲ Hbar, q вҲҲ Qbar` and a dual solution `qвӮҖ` | The **mixed-bias / DR identity** (`prop:est-trae-mixed-bias`).  First NPIV milestone.  Pure integral-linearity proof using `m_e_sub`, the dual identity on direction `h вҲ’ hвӮҖ вҲҲ Hbar`, and the primal moment on `q вҲҲ Qbar`. |
| `Оҳ_hвӮҖ_eq_ОёвӮҖ` | `Оҳ(hвӮҖ, q) = ОёвӮҖ` | DR cancellation at the truth on the primal side. Specialization of `mixed_bias_identity` at `h = hвӮҖ`. |
| `Оҳ_qвӮҖ_eq_ОёвӮҖ` | `Оҳ(h, qвӮҖ) = ОёвӮҖ` | DR cancellation at the truth on the dual side. Specialization at `q = qвӮҖ`. |

| `mean_zero_of_DualSolution_mu`, `mean_zero_of_DualSolution` | `вҲ« ПҒвӮҖ = 0` | Derive oracle-score centering from the primal/dual moment identities. The `P_W` version transports the structural-law identity along the observation-law bridge `Ој.map S.W = P_W` and consumes oracle-score measurability. |
| `TRAEDRRemainderHyps S hqвӮҖ sample split h_hat q_hat` | structure | Bundles (i)вҖ“(iv) of `thm:est-trae-dr-al-criterion`: (i) `range` (h_hat / q_hat live in Hbar / Qbar); (ii) `mixed_bias` (`вҲҡ|B(n)|` Г— mixed-bias integral is `o_p(1)`); (iii) `ep_remainder` (centered fold-B sum of `ПҶМӮ_n вҲ’ ПҶ_0` is `o_p(1)` after `вҲҡ|B(n)|` scaling); (iv) `finite_var` (`E[ПҒвӮҖВІ] < вҲһ` under `P_W`). Mean-zero is derived by `mean_zero_of_DualSolution`, not bundled as a hypothesis. |

The signature includes the standard observation-law bridge `Ој.map S.W = P_W` and oracle-score measurability so the IF centering is derived rather than assumed. |
| `mixed_bias_sufficient` | dominated `bnd n Пү` + `вҲҡ|B(n)|В·bnd = o_p(1)` вҮ’ `mixed_bias` field | Forward implication abstracting over a deterministic upper bound on the conditional mixed-bias integral; the `min{вҖ–qМӮ вҲ’ qвӮҖвҖ–В·вҖ–T(ДҘвҲ’hвӮҖ)вҖ–, вҖ–T*(qМӮвҲ’qвӮҖ)вҖ–В·вҖ–ДҘвҲ’hвӮҖвҖ–}` form will instantiate `bnd` once the operator layer (Phase C) is in place. |

Now a thin instantiation of the generic `Tendsto_dist.wald_coverage` (`Stat/Inference/Studentize.lean`). |

### Phase C-lite + Phase D files (rate theorem track)

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Operator.lean`

Realises the projected conditional-expectation operator `T = О _{QМ„} вҲҳ E[В· | Пғ(Z)]` concretely on the ambient `Lp в„қ 2 Ој` (no pushforward boilerplate).  The single population identity `T_inner_eq_integral` is what the rate theorem consumes; `T_add` / `T_sub` are linearity helpers used by the weak-rate triangle step.  `T*` (adjoint) is **not** scaffolded вҖ” the simplified rate proof (note lines 250вҖ“384) does not need it.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OperatorSystem О© Ој` | `structure ... extends InverseProblemSystem О© Ој` | `InverseProblemSystem` plus the LВІ realisation: `m_Z` (Пғ(Z) Пғ-algebra coarser than `mвӮҖ`), `IsFiniteMeasure Ој`, closed submodules `Hbar_L2, Qbar_L2 : Submodule в„қ (Lp в„қ 2 Ој)`, an `HasOrthogonalProjection` instance for `Qbar_L2`, `MemLp 2`-witnesses for `h вҲҳ X` and `q вҲҳ Z`, and coherence (the `Lp` class lies in the closed subspace). |
| `OperatorSystem.hL2 hh`, `.qL2 hq` | `def`s | Lift `h вҲҲ Hbar` (resp. `q вҲҲ Qbar`) to its `Lp в„қ 2 Ој` class using the `MemLp` witness. |
| `OperatorSystem.condExpStep f` | `def` | Conditional-expectation step `E[В· | Пғ(Z)]` as a self-map of `Lp в„қ 2 Ој`. |
| `OperatorSystem.T f` | `def` | The concrete operator `О _{QМ„} вҲҳ condExpStep f` (`def:est-trae-system` step iii of the operator triple). |
| `OperatorSystem.condExpStep_sub`, `T_add`, `T_sub` | `lemma`s | в„қ-linearity helpers; `T_sub` is the workhorse for the weak-rate triangle inequality. |
| `OperatorSystem.QbarAEMeasurableMZ` | `def` (predicate) | `q вҲҳ Z` is `m_Z`-AEStronglyMeasurable for every `q вҲҲ Qbar`.  Kept as a `def` for backwards compatibility with downstream consumers; **derived** by `qbar_aestrongly_measurable_mZ` from `m_Z_eq + meas_of_Qbar`, so it is not a separate hypothesis on the structure. |
| `OperatorSystem.qbar_aestrongly_measurable_mZ` | `(S : OperatorSystem О© Ој) : S.QbarAEMeasurableMZ` | **Proved** (no extra hypothesis): combines `S.m_Z_eq : m_Z = comap (zOf вҲҳ W) instрқ’ө` with `comap_measurable` and `meas_of_Qbar` to get `m_Z`-strong measurability of `q вҲҳ zOf вҲҳ W` for every `q вҲҲ Qbar`. |
| `OperatorSystem.T_inner_eq_integral` | `вҹӘT (hL2 hh вҲ’ hL2 hh'), qL2 hfвҹ«_{LВІ(Ој)} = вҲ« (h(X) вҲ’ h'(X)) В· f(Z) dОј` | **Population identity** вҖ” the only fact about `T` the rate proof uses.  Proved via projection invisibility against `QМ„`-elements, `condExpL2` self-adjointness (consuming `qbar_aestrongly_measurable_mZ` internally вҖ” no longer takes the measurability hypothesis as an explicit argument), and `Lp` inner-product unfolding. |
| `OperatorSystem.strongNorm`, `.weakNorm` | `def`s | `strongNorm f := вҖ–fвҖ–`, `weakNorm f := вҖ–S.T fвҖ–`.  Sugar around the standard `Lp` norm. |

#### `Estimation/NPIV/SourceCondition.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `SourceCondition S ОІ` | structure | ОІ-source condition at `hвӮҖ` (`def:est-trae-source-condition`).  Carries witness `wвӮҖ вҲҲ Hbar` and the actual spectral identity `S.hL2 S.hвӮҖ_mem = Complexification.realCFC S.Tstar_T (fun x => Real.rpow (max x 0) (ОІ/2)) (S.hL2 wвӮҖ_mem)` (uses the real-CFC built in `Operator/Complexification.lean`). |
| `TikhonovBiasBound S ОІ О» sc` | structure | Tikhonov bias hypothesis at level `О»` (proof sketch lines 276вҖ“303).  Bundles a Tikhonov solution `h*_О» вҲҲ Hbar` and a constant `C вүҘ 0` with three inequalities: `strong_bias` (`вҖ–h*_О» вҲ’ hвӮҖвҖ–ВІ вүӨ CВ·вҖ–wвӮҖвҖ–В·О»^{min ОІ 2}`), `weak_bias` (`вҖ–T(h*_О» вҲ’ hвӮҖ)вҖ–ВІ вүӨ CВ·вҖ–wвӮҖвҖ–В·О»^{min(ОІ+1) 2}`), and `strong_convexity` (the population-level inequality `О»вҖ–ДҘ вҲ’ h*_О»вҖ–ВІ + вҖ–T(ДҘ вҲ’ h*_О»)вҖ–ВІ вүӨ вҖ–T(ДҘ вҲ’ hвӮҖ)вҖ–ВІ вҲ’ вҖ–T(h*_О» вҲ’ hвӮҖ)вҖ–ВІ + О»(вҖ–ДҘвҖ–ВІ вҲ’ вҖ–h*_О»вҖ–ВІ)` for every `ДҘ вҲҲ Hbar`).  Phase E discharges all three from `SourceCondition` via spectral calculus. |

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Primal/Estimator.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `TRAEClasses S` | structure | Candidate class `H вҠҶ Hbar` and critic class `F вҠҶ Qbar` for the primal TRAE optimisation (`def:est-trae-population-criterion`). Closure / non-emptiness fields included. |
| `innerIntegrand`, `innerObjective`, `supObjective` | `noncomputable def`s | Pointwise integrand `2{m(W;f) вҲ’ h(X)f(Z)} вҲ’ f(Z)ВІ + О» h(X)ВІ`, its fold-A empirical average, and the `iSup` over `f вҲҲ F` (`def:est-trae-primal`). |
| `IsTRAEPrimalEstimator S TC sample split lambda h_hat` | structure | Post-hoc property characterising the primal TRAE: `mem_H : h_hat n Пү вҲҲ TC.H`, an optimality-style inequality `opt`, and a measurability witness.  No `argmin-sup` formalism вҖ” the rate theorem only needs the inequality form. |

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Primal/Rate.lean`

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `TRAERatePrimalHyps S TC sample split lambda ОІ О¶ delta h_hat is_estimator` | structure | Deterministic, paper-facing hypotheses for `thm:est-trae-rate-theorem`: source condition, Tikhonov bias bound, realisability `h*_О» вҲҲ H`, closedness of the critic class for residuals, mean-square continuity of `m`, almost-sure boundedness, and the paper-scale Оҙ-floor for the fixed confidence level `О¶`, with positive constant `c > 0`: `Оҙ_n вүҘ cВ·вҲҡ((log log(n+1) + log(1/О¶)) / n)`.  Making `О¶` a parameter avoids forcing one fixed `delta` sequence to satisfy every confidence level at once. |
| `TRAERatePrimalAbstractHyps S TC sample split lambda ОІ О¶ delta h_hat is_estimator` | structure | Extends `TRAERatePrimalHyps` with the packaged **`empirical_process_event`** field вҖ” the post-substitution-and-CR form of the localized empirical-process inequality (`SC_RHS вүӨ K_ep В· (R_bВІ + ОҙвҖ–TО”вҖ– + ОҙВІ + О»ОҙвҖ–О”вҖ– + О»ОҙВІ)`) on a high-probability event of mass `вүҘ 1 вҲ’ О¶`.  This is the modular deterministic theorem input, not the paper-facing rate assumption bundle. |
| `combined_metric_algebra` | private real-arithmetic helper | AM-GM absorption: `lambdaВ·xВІ + yВІ вүӨ K_epВ·(RВІ + Оҙy + ОҙВІ + О»Оҙx + О»ОҙВІ) вҶ’ lambdaВ·xВІ + yВІ вүӨ 4(K_epВІ + K_ep + 1)В·(RВІ + ОҙВІ)`. |
| `combined_metric_rate` | `О»В·О”_strongВІ + О”_weakВІ вүӨ K В· (R_bВІ + Оҙ_nВІ)` on `AО¶` | **Combined-metric rate** (helper, deterministic).  Chains `tikhonov_bias.strong_convexity` with `empirical_process_event` and applies `combined_metric_algebra` for AM-GM absorption. |
| `strong_rate_from_combined` | `вҖ–ДҘ вҲ’ hвӮҖвҖ–ВІ вүӨ C_strong В· (ОҙВІ/О» + вҖ–wвӮҖвҖ–В·О»^{min ОІ 1})` | **Strong-metric rate** (helper, deterministic).  Triangle inequality `вҖ–a вҲ’ cвҖ– вүӨ вҖ–a вҲ’ bвҖ– + вҖ–b вҲ’ cвҖ–` plus drop of `О”_weakВІ` from the combined inequality, plus `weak_bias` (gives `R_bВІ/О» вүӨ CВ·вҖ–wвӮҖвҖ–В·О»^{min ОІ 1}`) and `strong_bias` (absorbed using `О»^{min ОІ 2} вүӨ 2 В· О»^{min ОІ 1}` for `О» < 2`). |
| `weak_rate_from_combined` | `вҖ–T(ДҘ вҲ’ hвӮҖ)вҖ–ВІ вүӨ C_weak В· (ОҙВІ + вҖ–wвӮҖвҖ–В·О»^{min(ОІ+1) 2})` | **Weak-metric rate** (helper, deterministic).  Triangle inequality on the weak metric using `T_add` / `norm_add_le`, plus drop of `О»В·О”_strongВІ` from the combined inequality, plus `weak_bias`.  `C_weak := 2K + (2K + 2)В·C`. |
| `trae_primal_rate_from_empirical_process` | both rates simultaneously on a single `AО¶` of mass `вүҘ 1 вҲ’ О¶` | Abstract TRAE primal rate theorem.  Consumes `TRAERatePrimalAbstractHyps`, so the empirical-process event is already packaged.  Stitches `combined_metric_rate` вҶ’ `strong_rate_from_combined` вҶ’ `weak_rate_from_combined` on a common high-probability event. |
| `trae_primal_rate` | both rates simultaneously on a single `AО¶` of mass `вүҘ 1 вҲ’ О¶` | **Paper-facing TRAE primal rate theorem.**  Lives in `Rate.lean` for discoverability.  Consumes deterministic `TRAERatePrimalHyps`, localized regimes, and explicit absorption/small-`n` obligations; internally calls `empirical_process_event_of_absorption` to build `TRAERatePrimalAbstractHyps`, then invokes `trae_primal_rate_from_empirical_process`. |

### Status

- Phase A: **fully proved** (3/3). `mixed_bias_identity`, `Оҳ_hвӮҖ_eq_ОёвӮҖ`, `Оҳ_qвӮҖ_eq_ОёвӮҖ`.
- Phase B: **fully proved** (8/8). `trae_dr_isAsymLinear`, `mixed_bias_sufficient`, `trae_dr_asymp_normal`, `trae_dr_studentized`, `trae_dr_wald_coverage`.
- **Phase C-lite + Phase D**: **fully proved** (5/5).
  - `T_inner_eq_integral` (population identity for `T`): **proved** (Codex via `condExpL2` self-adjointness + projection invisibility + `Lp` inner-product unfolding).
  - `combined_metric_rate`: **proved** (Codex with hand-decomposed AM-GM helper `combined_metric_algebra`).
  - `strong_rate_from_combined`: **proved** (Codex; uses triangle in `Lp в„қ 2 Ој` plus `О»^{min ОІ 2} вүӨ 2В·О»^{min ОІ 1}` case-split).
  - `weak_rate_from_combined`: **proved** (Codex; uses pre-emptively scaffolded `T_sub` / `T_add` helpers in `Operator.lean` for the weak-metric triangle inequality).
  - `trae_primal_rate` (headline): **proved** (Codex stitch).
- **Phase E** вҖ” **spectral discharge fully closed**.  Adjoint layer
  fully proved.  The pure-Hilbert-space Tikhonov layer
  (`Operator/Tikhonov.lean`) discharges the existence of the population
  minimiser and population strong convexity via LaxвҖ“Milgram on the
  closed subspace `Hbar_L2`.  The real-CFC layer
  (`Operator/Complexification.lean`) is fully closed; it provides the
  spectral API the Tikhonov bias discharge consumes.  `SourceCondition`
  now carries the *actual* real-CFC spectral identity, and
  `SpectralSourceCondition` reduces to two structural fields
  (`beta_nonneg`, `Hbar_L2_eq_top`); the closedness witness and
  nonnegative spectrum facts are derived.  The resolvent identification
  of the LaxвҖ“Milgram minimiser (`tikhonovMinimiserL2_eq_resolvent`) and
  the two Tikhonov bias bounds (`strong_bias`, `weak_bias`) are
  **proved** theorems on
  `SpectralSourceCondition` (Codex Phase E2 fill, using
  `Complexification.realCFC_*`).  `tikhonov_bias_from_spectral`
  packages these plus `tikhonovMinimiserL2_strong_convexity` into a
  fully-derived `TikhonovBiasBound`.  Discharge of
  `empirical_process_event` is **fully closed** (no sorries): the
  localized-empirical-process bookkeeping is supplied by the
  `LocalizedRegimeBundle` hypotheses (law / realizability / boundedness /
  diameter / peeling-slack / critical-radius), exactly as the paper
  assumes `Оҙ_n` upper-bounds the critical radii, and the master
  concentration inequality `localized_uniform_deviation_sharp`
  (`Stat/Concentration/UniformDeviationLocalized.lean`) is itself proved.
  See files below.

### Phase E files

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Operator/Adjoint.lean` (~110 lines, fully proved)

Bundles the bare-function operator `OperatorSystem.T : Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’ Lp в„қ 2 Ој`
as a continuous linear map and exposes the adjoint `TвҖ ` and the self-adjoint
composite `TвҖ T`.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OperatorSystem.condExpStepL` | `Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’L[в„қ] Lp в„қ 2 Ој` | Conditional-expectation step `E[В· \| Пғ(Z)]` as a CLM, via `(lpMeas).subtypeL.comp (condExpL2 в„қ в„қ S.m_Z_le)`. |
| `OperatorSystem.Tlin` | `Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’L[в„қ] Lp в„қ 2 Ој` | Bundled CLM version of `S.T`: `Qbar_L2.starProjection.comp condExpStepL`. |
| `OperatorSystem.Tlin_apply` | `S.Tlin f = S.T f` | Coherence: bundled CLM agrees with the bare-function `T`. **Proved (`rfl`).** |
| `OperatorSystem.Tadjoint` | `Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’L[в„қ] Lp в„қ 2 Ој` | Adjoint `TвҖ  := ContinuousLinearMap.adjoint S.Tlin`. |
| `OperatorSystem.Tstar_T` | `Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’L[в„қ] Lp в„қ 2 Ој` | Self-adjoint, PSD composite `TвҖ  T = Tadjoint.comp Tlin`. The operator the ОІ-source condition refers to. |
| `OperatorSystem.Tstar_T_isSelfAdjoint` | `IsSelfAdjoint S.Tstar_T` | Self-adjointness of `TвҖ  T` via `IsSelfAdjoint.star_mul_self` after identifying adjoint with `star`. **Proved.** |

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Operator/Tikhonov.lean` (~200 lines, sorry-only scaffold)

Pure-real-Hilbert-space layer for the Tikhonov minimisation problem on
the closed subspace `Hbar_L2`.  Discharges the existence of the
population minimiser and the population strong-convexity inequality via
Mathlib's LaxвҖ“Milgram theorem (`IsCoercive.continuousLinearEquivOfBilin`)
вҖ” **no continuous functional calculus needed**.  These were previously
baked fields of `SpectralSourceCondition`.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `OperatorSystem.tikhonovBilin S О»` | `Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’L[в„қ] Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’L[в„қ] в„қ` | Bilinear form `(u, v) вҶҰ вҹЁT u, T vвҹ© + О» вҹЁu, vвҹ©` on the ambient `Lp в„қ 2 Ој`. |
| `tikhonovBilin_apply`, `tikhonovBilin_symm` | unfold + symmetry | Pointwise formula and symmetry of the bilinear form. |
| `OperatorSystem.tikhonovBilinSub S О»` | `S.Hbar_L2 вҶ’L[в„қ] S.Hbar_L2 вҶ’L[в„қ] в„қ` | The bilinear form restricted to the closed subspace `Hbar_L2` (via `Submodule.subtypeL` pre/post-composition).  Argument fed into LaxвҖ“Milgram. |
| `tikhonovBilinSub_apply` | unfold | Pointwise formula linking the restricted form back to `tikhonovBilin`. |
| `tikhonovBilinSub_isCoercive` | `IsCoercive (S.tikhonovBilinSub О»)` for `0 < О»` | Coercivity with constant `О»`, since `bilin u u = вҖ–T uвҖ–ВІ + О» вҖ–uвҖ–ВІ вүҘ О» вҖ–uвҖ–ВІ`. |
| `OperatorSystem.tikhonovTargetSub S` | `S.Hbar_L2 вҶ’L[в„қ] в„қ` | Target functional `v вҶҰ вҹЁT hвӮҖ, T vвҹ©` on `Hbar_L2`, used in the variational identity. |
| `tikhonovTargetSub_apply` | unfold | Pointwise formula for the target functional. |
| `OperatorSystem.tikhonovMinimiserL2 S О»` | `Lp в„қ 2 Ој` | Population Tikhonov minimiser at level `О»`, defined for `0 < О»` by LaxвҖ“Milgram applied to `tikhonovBilinSub` and `tikhonovTargetSub`; arbitrary value (`0`) for `О» вүӨ 0`. |
| `tikhonovMinimiserL2_mem` | `вҲҲ S.Hbar_L2` | The minimiser lies in the closed candidate subspace. |
| `tikhonovMinimiserL2_optimality` | `вҹЁT h*, T vвҹ© + О»вҹЁh*, vвҹ© = вҹЁT hвӮҖ, T vвҹ©` for `v вҲҲ Hbar_L2` | Variational identity (LaxвҖ“Milgram statement, restated using the LВІ-level inner product). |
| `tikhonovMinimiserL2_strong_convexity` | `О»вҖ–ДҘвҲ’h*вҖ–ВІ + вҖ–T(ДҘвҲ’h*)вҖ–ВІ вүӨ вҖ–T(ДҘвҲ’hвӮҖ)вҖ–ВІ вҲ’ вҖ–T(h*вҲ’hвӮҖ)вҖ–ВІ + О»(вҖ–ДҘвҖ–ВІ вҲ’ вҖ–h*вҖ–ВІ)` | **Population strong convexity at the minimiser.**  Pure Hilbert-space Taylor-expansion identity at the minimiser; the first-order term cancels via `tikhonovMinimiserL2_optimality`. |

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Operator/Complexification.lean` (~1090 lines, fully proved)

Real continuous functional calculus on `Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’L[в„қ] Lp в„қ 2 Ој` via
complexification.  Embeds the real `LВІ` isometrically into the complex
`LВІ` (`О№Lp` / `reLp` / `imLp`), lifts any real CLM `A` to a complex CLM
`complexLift A` whose action on the real subspace recovers `A`, and
defines `realCFC A f := reLp вҲҳ cfc (f вҲҳ Complex.re) (complexLift A) вҲҳ О№Lp`.
Provides the full API the spectral discharge consumes (`realCFC_apply`,
`realCFC_id`, `realCFC_mul`, `realCFC_resolvent_mul_self`,
`realCFC_isSelfAdjoint`, `realCFC_norm_le`).

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Operator/SpectralCalculus.lean` (~1230 lines, fully proved)

Spectral source condition + Tikhonov bias discharge using the real-CFC
API from `Complexification.lean`.  `SourceCondition` (in `../SourceCondition.lean`)
carries the actual spectral identity, so `SpectralSourceCondition`
only adds the structural assumptions the spectral argument needs.
The two bias bounds and the resolvent identification of the LaxвҖ“Milgram
minimiser are now theorems on `SpectralSourceCondition`, all proved.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `SpectralSourceCondition S ОІ` | `structure ... extends SourceCondition S ОІ` | Strengthens `SourceCondition` with: `beta_nonneg : 0 вүӨ ОІ` and `Hbar_L2_eq_top : S.Hbar_L2 = вҠӨ` (full-space candidate class).  The closedness witness `Hbar_L2_hasProj` is derived from `Hbar_L2_eq_top`, and `Tstar_T_spectrum_nonneg` is derived from positivity of `TвҖ T`. |
| `SpectralSourceCondition.sourceSymbol ОІ` / `continuous_sourceSymbol` | `в„қ вҶ’ в„қ` / `Continuous` | The continuous extension `x вҶҰ Real.rpow (max x 0) (ОІ/2)` of `x^{ОІ/2}` to all of в„қ. |
| `SpectralSourceCondition.spectralPower sc` | `Lp в„қ 2 Ој вҶ’L[в„қ] Lp в„қ 2 Ој` | Defined as `Complexification.realCFC S.Tstar_T (sourceSymbol ОІ)`; the operator `(TвҖ T)^{ОІ/2}` consumed by the spectral identity. |
| `SpectralSourceCondition.biasConst sc` | `в„қ` | Uniform constant `Real.rpow (max 1 (вҖ–S.Tstar_TвҖ–+1)) ОІ` absorbing both the small-ОІ and large-ОІ regimes of the sup-on-spectrum analysis. |
| `tikhonovMinimiserL2_eq_resolvent` | `S.tikhonovMinimiserL2 О» = realCFC S.Tstar_T (x вҶҰ x/(О»+x)) (S.hL2 S.hвӮҖ_mem)` | Identifies the LaxвҖ“Milgram minimiser with the resolvent expression `(TвҖ T+О»I)вҒ»В№ TвҖ T hвӮҖ`.  Uses `Hbar_L2_eq_top` to lift the variational identity to the full ambient space.  **Proved** (Codex; uses private helpers `realCFC_const_add` and `resolvent_left_inverse` built on `realCFC_resolvent_mul_self`). |
| `SpectralSourceCondition.strong_bias` | `вҖ–h*_О» вҲ’ hвӮҖвҖ–ВІ вүӨ biasConst В· вҖ–wвӮҖвҖ–ВІ В· О»^{min ОІ 2}` | Strong-metric Tikhonov bias, derived spectrally from the resolvent identity + `realCFC_norm_le` + sup-on-spectrum lemmas (`residual_symbol_bound_small/_large` private helpers handle ОІвүӨ2 / ОІ>2 cases).  **Proved** (Codex). |
| `SpectralSourceCondition.weak_bias` | `вҖ–T(h*_О» вҲ’ hвӮҖ)вҖ–ВІ вүӨ biasConst В· вҖ–wвӮҖвҖ–ВІ В· О»^{min(ОІ+1) 2}` | Weak-metric Tikhonov bias.  Reduces `вҖ–T uвҖ–ВІ = вҹЁTвҖ T u, uвҹ©` (via `Tstar_T`, `adjoint_inner_left`), expresses it as `вҹЁrealCFC A (x В· fВІ) w, wвҹ©` via `realCFC_mul` + self-adjointness, then bounds via CauchyвҖ“Schwarz + `realCFC_norm_le` with the tight sup `weak_residual_bound` (ОІвүӨ1 / ОІ>1 case split).  **Proved** (Codex). |
| `TikhonovPullback S ОІ О» sc` | `structure` | Function-level pullback (unchanged):  LВІ class of the function-level minimiser equals `tikhonovMinimiserL2 S О»`. |
| `tikhonov_bias_from_spectral S ОІ О» О»_pos sc pb` | `TikhonovBiasBound S ОІ О» sc.toSourceCondition` | Packages the spectral `strong_bias` / `weak_bias` theorems plus `tikhonovMinimiserL2_strong_convexity` into a `TikhonovBiasBound` with `C := sc.biasConst В· вҖ–wвӮҖвҖ–`.  **Fully proved** (no sorries). |

#### `Estimation/NPIV/Primal/EmpiricalProcessEvent/` вҖ” localized EP discharge

Split implementation of the discharge of
`TRAERatePrimalAbstractHyps.empirical_process_event` from four localized-regime
instances on `star(H В· F), star(m вҲҳ F), star(F), star(H)`.  The umbrella file
`Primal/EmpiricalProcessEvent.lean` re-exports the final discharge module.

| File | Contents | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `Algebra.lean` | `young_cross_envelope` | Deterministic Young / AM-GM envelope converting the localized additive cross terms into the `RВІ + ОҙВ·w + ОҙВІ + ОәВІ` shape used by the EP RHS. |
| `Regime.lean` | `LocalizedRegimeBundle`, `LocalizedRegimes` | Bundles one localized deviation regime per abstract function class, including nonnegativity of the abstract localization norm, plus law, realizability, boundedness, closedness, diameter, peeling slack, and interpretation fields connecting the abstract classes to the concrete NPIV losses. |
| `Core.lean` | imports `Regime` | Small compatibility umbrella for the algebra and regime declarations. |
| `LocalizedEventsBase.lean` | `integral_comp_law_W`, `localized_omega_event_sharp_for_bundle` | Shared law-change helper for rewriting integrals under `P_W` back to integrals over `О©`, plus the NPIV-facing wrapper around `localized_uniform_deviation_sharp` for a single `LocalizedRegimeBundle`. The wrapper pulls the product-space sharp event back along the IID sample, uses the bundle's localization-norm nonnegativity, keeps the diameter obligation per concrete index, and rewrites the population mean through `regime.law_W`. |
| `LocalizedEventH.lean` | `localized_omega_event_for_H` | Fixed-diameter О©-side localized deviation event for squared candidate differences, used by the centred regulariser bound. |
| `LocalizedEventHF.lean` | `localized_omega_event_for_HF`, `localized_omega_event_for_HF_pair`, `localized_omega_event_for_HF_pair_peeled` | О©-side localized deviation events for the product class `H В· F`, including the peeled pair-gap Foster interpretation.  The peeled helper now delegates the dyadic peeling to `localized_omega_event_sharp_for_bundle`. |
| `LocalizedEventMF.lean` | `localized_omega_event_for_mF`, `localized_omega_event_for_mF_pair_peeled` | О©-side localized deviation events for the moment class `m вҲҳ F`, including the peeled critic-pair form.  The peeled helper now delegates the dyadic peeling to `localized_omega_event_sharp_for_bundle`. |
| `LocalizedEventF.lean` | `localized_omega_event_for_F`, `localized_omega_event_for_F_pair_peeled` | О©-side localized deviation events for the squared critic class `F`, including the peeled critic-pair form.  The peeled helper now delegates to `localized_omega_event_sharp_for_bundle` and states the leading term at the public `Оҙ_n` scale. |
| `LocalizedEvents.lean` | imports the localized event files | Small compatibility umbrella for all О©-side localized deviation events. |
| `EPMasterEvent.lean` | `population_closedness_critic_gap_eq`, `empirical_critic_argmax_localized`, `empirical_critic_argmax_localized_from_components`, `ep_master_event_from_localized` | Objective-level EP master event plus the deterministic Foster argmax bridge. `population_closedness_critic_gap_eq` proves the population quadratic-curvature identity at a closedness witness; `empirical_critic_argmax_localized` turns empirical critic optimality plus a one-sided loss-deviation bound into an LВІ localization bound for the empirical sup-attainer; `empirical_critic_argmax_localized_from_components` packages that bridge from the existing single-critic `mвҲҳF`, `HВ·F`, and `FВІ` deviations without adding critic linearity assumptions. `ep_master_event_from_localized` exposes the raw objective-level localized EP modulus before final Оҙ-schedule absorption. |
| `EPPerN.lean` | `ep_pop_inner_at_closedness_witness`, `ep_per_n_inequality_from_deviations`, `ep_inequality_from_localized` | Per-horizon deterministic EP bridge and public EP inequality. `ep_pop_inner_at_closedness_witness` is the population-side identity `2В·E[mВ·f] вҲ’ 2В·E[hВ·f] вҲ’ E[fВІ] = weak(h - hвӮҖ)ВІ` at a closedness witness. `ep_per_n_inequality_from_deviations` consumes the raw objective-level localized modulus and removes the empirical sup-objective excess using estimator optimality. `ep_inequality_from_localized` extracts the witness payload from `ep_master_event_from_localized` and feeds it through `ep_per_n_inequality_from_deviations`; `Discharge.lean` then absorbs the explicit rate into the final TRAE population shape. |
| `EPInequality.lean` | imports `EPPerN` | Small compatibility umbrella for the explicit empirical-process inequality. |
| `Regulariser.lean` | `measure_iInter_nat_ge_one_sub_tsum_of_ge`, `centred_regulariser_bound_from_localized` | All-`n` centred empirical regulariser bound obtained from the H-side localized event. |
| `Discharge.lean` | `empirical_process_event_from_localized`, `explicitRate`, `populationShape`, `empirical_process_event_of_absorption` | Combines the EP inequality and regulariser bound, then exposes the `Rate.lean`-shaped empirical-process event conditional on the explicit-rate absorption hypothesis.  The paper-facing theorem using it is `trae_primal_rate` in `Rate.lean`. |

---

## 13W. `Causalean/Panel/Weighted/` вҖ” Weighted-Finite-Index Substrate (FWL / WLS Core)

**FWL/WLS-centric framing.** Estimand-characterization papers (Sloczynski,
Goodman-Bacon, Sun-Abraham, BJS, DCDH, MTW, Angrist-Imbens, Wooldridge, вҖҰ)
all express their estimators as `ОёМӮ = вҲ‘_r Пү_r В· П„_r`; those `Пү_r` are the
implicit FWL / WLS regression weights this substrate makes explicit. The
eight files below build, in order, a finite weighted index (`WeightedSupport
R`), its weighted inner product, the nuisance-subspace projection, the WLS
optimality theorem, the FWL identity, plus reusable indicator-span /
normalized-weight / additive-span subspace constructions. Both `Panel/`
(via `Cells I T := WeightedSupport (I Г— T)`) and
`Panel/EstimandCharacterization/` (via partition-cell, ordered-IV, response-type,
or cohort-period instantiations of `R`) are thin facades over this layer.

### 13W.a `Weighted/Support.lean`

The substrate: a finite index `R` carrying weights `Пү_r вүҘ 0` (strictly
positive on the observed subset) summing to 1. Generalizes `Panel/Cells.lean`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `WeightedSupport R` | `structure` over `[Fintype R] [DecidableEq R]` | Bundles `observed : Finset R` (nonempty), `weight : R вҶ’ в„қ`, `weight_pos`, `weight_zero_off`, `weight_sum_one`. |
| `WeightedSupport.weight_nonneg` | `0 вүӨ c.weight r` | Pointwise nonnegativity. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.sum_weight_univ` | `вҲ‘ r, c.weight r = вҲ‘ r вҲҲ c.observed, c.weight r` | Sum over `Finset.univ` reduces to sum over `observed`. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.sum_weight` | `вҲ‘ r вҲҲ c.observed, c.weight r = 1` | Restated normalization. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.sum_weight_univ_eq_one` | `вҲ‘ r, c.weight r = 1` | Normalization over `Finset.univ`. **Proved.** |

### 13W.b `Weighted/InnerProduct.lean`

Weighted inner product `вҹЁA, Bвҹ©_Пү := вҲ‘_{rвҲҲobserved} Пү_r В· A_r В· B_r` and its
matrix-valued lift to vector arrays `Fin K вҶ’ (R вҶ’ в„қ)`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `WeightedSupport.ip` | `(c : WeightedSupport R) вҶ’ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ в„қ` | Scalar weighted inner product `c.ip A B = вҲ‘ r вҲҲ observed, Пү_r В· A r В· B r`. |
| `WeightedSupport.ip_symm` | `c.ip A B = c.ip B A` | Symmetry. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ip_add_left` / `ip_add_right` | bilinearity | Additivity in each argument. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ip_smul_left` / `ip_smul_right` | `c.ip (s вҖў A) B = s В· c.ip A B` (and sym.) | Scalar homogeneity. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ip_self_summand_nonneg` | `вҲҖ r вҲҲ observed, 0 вүӨ Пү_r В· A r В· A r` | Per-summand nonnegativity. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ip_self_nonneg` | `0 вүӨ c.ip A A` | Positivity (semi-definite). **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ip_self_eq_zero_iff` | `c.ip A A = 0 вҶ” вҲҖ r вҲҲ observed, A r = 0` | Definiteness on the observed support. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ipMat` | `(Fin K вҶ’ R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (Fin K вҶ’ R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Matrix (Fin K) (Fin K) в„қ` | Entrywise inner product `(c.ipMat A B) j k = c.ip (A j) (B k)`. |
| `WeightedSupport.ipMat_transpose` | `(c.ipMat A B).transpose = c.ipMat B A` | Transposed symmetry. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ipMat_add_left` / `ipMat_add_right` | entrywise bilinearity | Additivity in each tuple argument. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ipMat_smul_left` / `ipMat_smul_right` | `c.ipMat (s вҖў A) B = s вҖў c.ipMat A B` (and sym.) | Scalar homogeneity entrywise. **Proved.** |

### 13W.c `Weighted/Subspace.lean`

Weighted orthogonal projection onto a nuisance subspace `H вҠҶ R вҶ’ в„қ`, and the
residual maker `M_H := id вҲ’ P_H`. Existence is via
`Causalean.Mathlib.SemiInnerProjection.exists_orthogonalProjection_of_posSemidef`
(since `c.ip` is only positive-semidefinite, not definite, off the observed
support).

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `WeightedSupport.weighted_orthogonal_projection_exists` | `вҲғ P : (RвҶ’в„қ) вҶ’вӮ—[в„қ] (RвҶ’в„қ), вҖҰ` | Existence of the weighted projection onto `H`. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.proj` | `(c : WeightedSupport R) вҶ’ Submodule в„қ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’вӮ—[в„қ] (R вҶ’ в„қ)` | Chosen weighted projection `P_H`. `noncomputable`. |
| `WeightedSupport.proj_mem` / `proj_orthogonal` | membership / orthogonality | Defining properties of `proj`. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.proj_apply_of_mem` | `X вҲҲ H вҶ’ proj X = X` on observed | Projection is identity on its image, on the observed support. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.proj_apply_eq_of_mem_orthogonal` | any orthogonal nuisance candidate matches `proj X` on observed | Uniqueness of the projection on the observed support. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.proj_idem_apply` | `proj (proj X) = proj X` on observed | Idempotence on observed cells. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.residualize` | `Submodule в„қ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’вӮ—[в„қ] (R вҶ’ в„қ)` | Residual maker `M_H = id вҲ’ P_H`. `noncomputable`. |
| `WeightedSupport.tildeX` | scalar residualization | `XМғ := M_H X`. `noncomputable`. |
| `WeightedSupport.tildeXVec` | column-wise residualization | `Fin K вҶ’ (R вҶ’ в„қ)` tuple of residualized columns. `noncomputable`. |
| `WeightedSupport.residualize_in_orthogonal` | `c.ip (c.tildeX H X) h = 0` for `h вҲҲ H` | Residuals are `H`-orthogonal. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.residualize_self_of_mem` | `X вҲҲ H вҶ’ tildeX X = 0` on observed | Nuisance-space arrays residualize to zero on observed cells. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.residualize_idem_apply` | `residualize (residualize X) = residualize X` on observed | Residual maker idempotent on observed cells. **Proved.** |

### 13W.d `Weighted/WLS.lean`

Headline: **weighted projections ARE the WLS solutions.** Characterizes
`proj` / `residualize` as the unique-modulo-off-support solutions to the
weighted least-squares minimization problem.

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `WeightedSupport.proj_eq_argmin` | `вҲҖ h вҲҲ H, c.ip (X вҲ’ proj X) (X вҲ’ proj X) вүӨ c.ip (X вҲ’ h) (X вҲ’ h)` | The weighted projection minimizes the WLS objective `вҹЁX вҲ’ h, X вҲ’ hвҹ©_Пү` over `h вҲҲ H`. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.residualize_orth_iff_argmin` | residual-orthogonality at `p вҲҲ H` вҶ” WLS-optimality at `p` | The WLS first-order condition: orthogonality of `X вҲ’ p` to all of `H` is equivalent to `p` being the WLS minimizer. **Proved.** |

### 13W.e `Weighted/FWL.lean`

The **headline of the substrate**: the FrischвҖ“WaughвҖ“Lovell identity. This is
the **finite-cell** FWL; the parallel measure-theoretic / LВІ FWL lives at
`Causalean/Panel/Analysis/Residualization.lean`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `WeightedSupport.Q_XX` | `WeightedSupport R вҶ’ (Fin K вҶ’ R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Submodule в„қ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Matrix (Fin K) (Fin K) в„қ` | Residualized Gram matrix `вҹЁXМғ, XМғвҹ©_Пү`. `noncomputable`. |
| `WeightedSupport.rhsVec` | `вҖҰ вҶ’ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Fin K вҶ’ в„қ` | Residualized RHS / score vector `вҹЁXМғ, Yвҹ©_Пү`. `noncomputable`. |
| `WeightedSupport.thetaHat` | `вҖҰ вҶ’ (R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Fin K вҶ’ в„қ` | FWL coefficient `Q_XXвҒ»В№ *бөҘ rhsVec`. `noncomputable`. |
| `WeightedSupport.RankCondition` | `IsUnit (Q_XX c X H).det` | Nonsingularity of `Q_XX` (finite algebraic form of `Q_XX вү» 0`). |
| `WeightedSupport.Q_XX_mulVec_thetaHat` | `RankCondition вҶ’ Q_XX *бөҘ thetaHat = rhsVec` | `thetaHat` solves the residualized normal equations. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.fwl_identity` | long-regression ОІ = residualized-short-regression ОёМӮ | The joint minimizer `ОІ` of the long WLS objective over `(ОІ, Оұ вҲҲ H)` equals `thetaHat` of the H-residualized regressors. **Proved.** |

### 13W.f `Weighted/IndicatorSpan.lean`

Finite-cell partition algebra: singleton-cell indicators on a classifier
`G : R вҶ’ рқ’ў`, the linear span they generate, and partition-cell statistics
(cell mass, cell mean). Two-axis variant for cohort+period nuisance classes.
This file ports the **finite-cell** part of the archived
`Panel/CellBridge.lean`; the LВІ / measure-theoretic part
lives in `Causalean/Panel/Analysis/Residualization.lean`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `Weighted.cellIndicator` | `(G : R вҶ’ рқ’ў) вҶ’ рқ’ў вҶ’ R вҶ’ в„қ` | Real-valued singleton-cell indicator `r вҶҰ if G r = g then 1 else 0`. |
| `Weighted.indicatorSpan` | `(G : R вҶ’ рқ’ў) вҶ’ Submodule в„қ (R вҶ’ в„қ)` | Linear span of the singleton indicators `{cellIndicator G g}_{g : рқ’ў}`. |
| `Weighted.mem_indicatorSpan_iff` | `h вҲҲ indicatorSpan G вҶ” вҲғ c : рқ’ў вҶ’ в„қ, h = вҲ‘ g, c g вҖў cellIndicator G g` | Characterization of membership. **Proved.** |
| `Weighted.cellIndicator_mem_indicatorSpan` | `cellIndicator G g вҲҲ indicatorSpan G` | Generators belong to the span. **Proved.** |
| `Weighted.twoAxisIndicatorSpan` | `(G : R вҶ’ рқ’ў) вҶ’ (T : R вҶ’ рқ’Ҝ) вҶ’ Submodule в„қ (R вҶ’ в„қ)` | Two-axis indicator span: sup of `indicatorSpan G` and `indicatorSpan T`. Used for cohort+period nuisance classes (Goodman-Bacon, Sun-Abraham). |
| `Weighted.indicatorSpan_le_twoAxisIndicatorSpan` / `_right` | left and right injection | Each one-axis span sits inside the two-axis span. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.cellMass` | `(c : WeightedSupport R) вҶ’ (G : R вҶ’ рқ’ў) вҶ’ рқ’ў вҶ’ в„қ` | Cell mass `вҲ‘_{r вҲҲ observed, G r = g} Пү_r`. |
| `WeightedSupport.cellMass_nonneg` | `0 вүӨ c.cellMass G g` | Nonnegativity. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.cellMean` | `(c : WeightedSupport R) вҶ’ (F : R вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ (G : R вҶ’ рқ’ў) вҶ’ рқ’ў вҶ’ в„қ` | Totalized cell mean of `F` on cell `g`. `noncomputable`. |
| `WeightedSupport.jointCellMass` | `(c : WeightedSupport R) вҶ’ (G : R вҶ’ рқ’ў) вҶ’ (T : R вҶ’ рқ’Ҝ) вҶ’ рқ’ў вҶ’ рқ’Ҝ вҶ’ в„қ` | Joint cell mass `вҲ‘_{r : G r = g, T r = k} Пү_r`. |

### 13W.g `Weighted/NormalizedWeights.lean`

Paper-agnostic finite weighted-sum algebra: normalized weights `a_i / вҲ‘ a_j`
and weighted centered covariance / variance identities. Consumed by
estimand-characterization papers when re-expressing a regression coefficient
`ОёМӮ` as `вҲ‘_r Пү_r П„_r`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `NormalizedWeights.normalizedWeight` | `(О№ вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ О№ вҶ’ в„қ` | Generic normalized weight `a_i / вҲ‘ k, a k`. `noncomputable`. |
| `NormalizedWeights.normalizedWeight_nonneg` | `(вҲҖ i, 0 вүӨ a i) вҶ’ 0 < вҲ‘ a вҶ’ 0 вүӨ normalizedWeight a i` | Nonnegativity from nonneg raw weights and positive total mass. **Proved.** |
| `NormalizedWeights.sum_normalizedWeight_eq_one` | `0 < вҲ‘ a вҶ’ вҲ‘ i, normalizedWeight a i = 1` | Normalized weights sum to one. **Proved.** |
| `NormalizedWeights.weighted_center_cov` | `(вҲ‘ p = 1) вҶ’ вҲ‘ p (x вҲ’ xМ„)(y вҲ’ Иі) = ВҪ вҲ‘вҲ‘ p p' (x вҲ’ x')(y вҲ’ y')` | Weighted centered covariance equals one half the ordered pairwise cross-product average. **Proved.** |
| `NormalizedWeights.weighted_center_var` | `(вҲ‘ p = 1) вҶ’ вҲ‘ p (x вҲ’ xМ„)ВІ = ВҪ вҲ‘вҲ‘ p p' (x вҲ’ x')ВІ` | Weighted centered variance equals one half the ordered pairwise squared-gap average. **Proved.** |

### 13W.h `Weighted/AdditiveSpan.lean`

Generic two-axis additive subspace: for a generic `R` with two projections
`fвӮҒ : R вҶ’ A` and `fвӮӮ : R вҶ’ B`, the additive span is `{ h | вҲғ a b, h r = a (fвӮҒ
r) + b (fвӮӮ r) }`. Specialized to `R = I Г— T`, `fвӮҒ = Prod.fst`, `fвӮӮ =
Prod.snd`, this is the two-way fixed-effect subspace `H_twfe` used in
`Panel/FixedEffect.lean` and across the estimand-characterization layer
(Goodman-Bacon, Sun-Abraham, DCDH, BJS, вҖҰ).

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `AdditiveSpan` | `(fвӮҒ : R вҶ’ A) вҶ’ (fвӮӮ : R вҶ’ B) вҶ’ Submodule в„қ (R вҶ’ в„қ)` | Generic two-axis additive span. |
| `AdditiveSpan.mem_iff` | `h вҲҲ AdditiveSpan fвӮҒ fвӮӮ вҶ” вҲғ a b, вҲҖ r, h r = a (fвӮҒ r) + b (fвӮӮ r)` | Characterization of membership. **Proved.** |
| `AdditiveSpan.const_mem` | constants lie in the additive span | `вҲҖ cвӮҖ : в„қ, (fun _ => cвӮҖ) вҲҲ AdditiveSpan fвӮҒ fвӮӮ`. **Proved.** |
| `AdditiveSpan.finiteDimensional` | `instance [Finite R] : Module.Finite в„қ (AdditiveSpan fвӮҒ fвӮӮ)` | Finite-dimensionality. **Proved.** |
| `twoAxisAdditiveSpan` | `(I T : Type*) вҶ’ Submodule в„қ ((I Г— T) вҶ’ в„қ) := AdditiveSpan Prod.fst Prod.snd` | Specialization to `R = I Г— T`. |
| `IsUnitTimeAdditive` | `(Unit вҶ’ Time вҶ’ в„қ) вҶ’ Prop` | Back-compat membership predicate matching the original `EstimandCharacterization.AdditiveSpan` API. |

### 13W.i `Weighted/OfProbabilityMeasure.lean`

Bridge (audit helper **M1**) connecting the finite weighted-support tower to a
probability measure on a finite measurable space. For a probability measure `Ој`
on a `Fintype` `R` with measurable singletons, the point masses
`Пү_r := (Ој {r}).toReal` form a `WeightedSupport R`, and its weighted inner
product equals the `LВІ(Ој)` integral pairing. Lets the measure-theoretic
cell-bridge layer (`Residualization`/`CellBridge`) and the finite FWL tower be
used interchangeably on a finite probability space.

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `WeightedSupport.ofProbabilityMeasure` | `(Ој : Measure R) [IsProbabilityMeasure Ој] вҶ’ WeightedSupport R` | Weighted support induced by `Ој`: weight `r вҶҰ (Ој {r}).toReal`, observed set = positive-mass support. `noncomputable`. **Proved** (all structure fields discharged). |
| `WeightedSupport.ofProbabilityMeasure_weight` | `(ofProbabilityMeasure Ој).weight r = (Ој {r}).toReal` | Weight unfolds to the point mass. `@[simp]`. **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.ip_eq_integral` | `(ofProbabilityMeasure Ој).ip A B = вҲ« r, A r * B r вҲӮОј` | **M1 bridge**: the induced weighted inner product is the `LВІ(Ој)` integral pairing. **Proved.** |

### 13W.j `Weighted/ScalarFWL.lean`

Scalar (`K = 1`) FrischвҖ“WaughвҖ“Lovell from the weighted **normal equations**
(audit helper **M2**) вҖ” the finite weighted-support counterpart of the
measure-theoretic `Causalean.PO.residualizedCoefficient_eq_of_normalEqs`. Bridges
the normal-equation inputs estimand papers produce to the residualized-coefficient
ratio, without going through the joint-minimization `fwl_identity`.

| Declaration | Signature | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `WeightedSupport.ip_tildeX_self` | `c.ip (c.tildeX H X) X = c.ip (c.tildeX H X) (c.tildeX H X)` | The residualized regressor pairs identically with `X` and its residual (projection part is orthogonal). **Proved.** |
| `WeightedSupport.scalar_fwl_of_normalEqs` | `Оұ вҲҲ H вҶ’ 0 < вҹЁXМғ,XМғвҹ©_Пү вҶ’ вҹЁYвҲ’ОІXвҲ’Оұ, Xвҹ©_Пү = 0 вҶ’ (вҲҖ h вҲҲ H, вҹЁYвҲ’ОІXвҲ’Оұ, hвҹ©_Пү = 0) вҶ’ ОІ = вҹЁXМғ,Yвҹ©_Пү / вҹЁXМғ,XМғвҹ©_Пү` | **M2**: scalar FWL from the two weighted normal equations; derives the coefficient ratio (does not assume it). **Proved.** |

## 9i0a-FWLInstanceL2. `Panel/FWLInstanceL2.lean` вҖ” LВІ(Ој) instance of the abstract FWL

Instantiates the abstract, panel-agnostic FWL development of `Mathlib/FWL.lean`
(В§10f) on the genuine inner-product space `Lp в„қ 2 Ој`, with a finite-dimensional
nuisance subspace `H`. This is the **measure-theoretic instance** of the canonical
projection layer (see
`doc/basic_concepts/po/estimand_characterization/INTERFACE_canonical_projection.md`):
the cell-indicator nuisance classes of the conditional-mean estimand papers
(Goodman-Bacon, Sun-Abraham, MTW, SЕӮoczyЕ„ski) are finite-dimensional subspaces of
`Lp в„қ 2 Ој`, so the abstract FWL coefficient, residualized normal equations, and
least-squares optimality apply directly. **This file is what makes `Mathlib/FWL.lean`
a live dependency rather than an orphan.** (Re-proving the raw-function
`Causalean.PO.residualizedCoefficient_eq_of_normalEqs` *through* this instance вҖ” the
full de-duplication of the measure-theoretic FWL tower вҖ” is a documented follow-up
requiring the raw-function вҶ” `Lp`-quotient coercion bridge.)

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `FWLInstanceL2.hasOrthogonalProjection_of_finiteDimensional` | `instance (H : Submodule в„қ (Lp в„қ 2 Ој)) [FiniteDimensional в„қ H] : H.HasOrthogonalProjection` | Finite-dim subspaces of `Lp в„қ 2 Ој` are complete, hence admit an orthogonal projection (free, via `HasOrthogonalProjection.ofCompleteSpace`). | **Proved** |
| `FWLInstanceL2.inner_eq_integral` | `inner в„қ f g = вҲ« a, f a * g a вҲӮОј` | LВІ inner product = population covariance: bridges the abstract FWL inner products to the integrals the papers manipulate. | **Proved** |
| `FWLInstanceL2.gramResid_mulVec_fwlCoef` | `IsUnit (gramResid H X).det вҶ’ gramResid H X *бөҘ fwlCoef H X Y = residInnerVec H X Y` | Residualized normal equations on `LВІ(Ој)` (specialization of the abstract lemma). | **Proved** |
| `FWLInstanceL2.fwlCoef_original_minimizes` | `IsUnit вҖҰ вҶ’ h вҲҲ H вҶ’ originalObjective вҖҰ (fwlCoef вҖҰ) (P_H вҖҰ) вүӨ originalObjective X Y ОІ h` | FWL least-squares optimality on `LВІ(Ој)`. | **Proved** |
| `FWLInstanceL2.fwlCoef_eq_of_original_minimizer` | minimizer hypothesis `вҶ’ ОІ = fwlCoef H X Y` | ОІ-block uniqueness on `LВІ(Ој)`. | **Proved** |

## 13sa. `Estimation/MinimaxATE/` вҖ” Structure-agnostic ATE optimality (JinвҖ“Syrgkanis 2024)

> **Entry point:** `Estimation/MinimaxATE.lean` (the roll-up beside the folder) imports the
> whole development and carries a docstring index of the headline theorems. Lower bounds:
> `minimax_lower_bound` (base, `ChiSquaredCore.lean`), `вҖҰ_gen`/`вҖҰ_var`/`вҖҰ_continuous`,
> `parametric_lower_bound`. Achievability + capstone: `aipw_minimaxMiss_le`,
> `aipw_attains_minimax_rate` (both `Optimality.lean`).

Causal layer for the **converse** direction of doubly-robust ATE estimation: the
structure-agnostic minimax lower bound showing the DR/AIPW product-bias rate
`вҲҡОөgВ·вҲҡОөm` cannot be beaten (JinвҖ“Syrgkanis 2024, *Structure-agnostic Optimality of
Doubly Robust Learning for Treatment Effect Estimation*, arXiv:2402.14264). Built
on the causal-agnostic `Stat/Minimax/` Le Cam layer (В§12w). The paper's
construction makes nuisances piecewise-constant on `M = 2^m` cells of `[0,1]^K`,
so we collapse each cell to a point and use a **finite covariate** `X : Fin M`
(uniform), `D Y : Bool` вҖ” all measures finite PMFs.

**Scope of the finite-`X` model (read before citing as "the paper's theorem").**
The paper's covariate is *continuous* (`X` uniform on `[0,1]^K`); only the
nuisances are cell-constant, so within a cell the actual position of `X` is still
observed. Our `X : Fin M` observes *only the cell index* вҖ” a strictly more
collapsed object. This loses nothing of the **research content**: the
perturbation construction, the `вҲҡОөgВ·вҲҡОөm` ATE gap, and the Ingster ПҮВІ second-moment
bound never touch the within-cell continuum (the within-cell position is
*ancillary* вҖ” its conditional law is cell-uniform for every DGP in the class). So
the finite-`X` and continuous-`X`-with-cell-constant-nuisances models are
statistically equivalent for this functional, and a finite-`X` lower bound implies
the continuous-`X` lower bound by a **soft ancillarity reduction** (tensor both
hypotheses with the common within-cell law; the ancillary factor cancels in the
ПҮВІ). That reduction is now **formalized** in `ContinuousX.lean` (В§13sa.6):
`two_point_lower_bound_continuous` proves the same `1/4` two-point bound
for an arbitrary within-cell ancillary space `(W, ПҒ)`.

The model covariate is kept as a general finite type `C` (so `Model/Witness/Bump`
read `C`, instantiated to `C = Fin K Г— Bool` by the explicit construction).

**What the headline matches in the paper, and what it does not.** The paper's
Theorem 1 lower-bounds the **minimax `(1вҲ’Оі)`-quantile risk** of the *squared* error,
`рқ”җвӮҷ,Оі(в„ұ) = inf_est sup_{(m,g)вҲҲв„ұ} рқ’¬_{1вҲ’Оі}(|est вҲ’ Оё|ВІ)` (eq. for `рқ”җвӮҷ,Оі`), for
`Оі вҲҲ (1/2,1)`. A quantile bound `рқ”җвӮҷ,Оі вүҘ ПҒ` is *by definition* the statement that
every estimator misses the truth by `вҲҡПҒ` with probability `вүҘ 1вҲ’Оі` on some in-class
DGP. So our `minimax_lower_bound` (`1/4 вүӨ minimaxMiss вҖҰ s`) **is** the
paper's headline theorem at `Оі = 3/4`, `ПҒ = sВІ вүҚ ОөgВ·Оөm` вҖ” the *stronger*
(probability/quantile) form, not the weaker expected-risk form. The paper itself
notes (and we formalize in В§13sa.7) that the quantile bound *implies* the
expected-`рқ”ј`-risk bound `sup E[(estвҲ’Оё)ВІ] вүҘ (1вҲ’Оі)ПҒ`. On the remaining differences from
the paper's full generality: (i) the **constant general center** `(mвӮҖ,gвӮҖ,gвӮҒ) вҲҲ (0,1)Ві`
(the paper's Assumption 2 in the constant-nuisance case, incl. the known-baseline
remark `Дқ(0)=gвӮҖ`) **is now formalized** in В§13sa.8 (`minimax_lower_bound_gen`),
generalizing the `(mМӮ,Дқ)вүЎ1/2` headline; the exact `О»`-independent ATE gap survives because
the center is constant *within* each Rademacher pair. (i') A **cell-varying center** вҖ”
nuisances that are arbitrary *functions* of the pair index (genuinely non-constant over the
covariate space), bounded away from `{0,1}` вҖ” **is now formalized** in В§13sa.9
(`minimax_lower_bound_var`), using the new non-uniform `ingster_bound_general`
(В§13sa.9) for the per-pair ПҮВІ coefficient `О“вұј`. The earlier note that this "needs a
Taylor-remainder Fano argument" was **wrong**: the paper keeps the two-point/Le Cam
structure, the first-order bump term cancels (`E[ЕөО”]=0`), and the ATE separation is a
`О»`-independent *lower bound* вҖ” packaged abstractly as the **one-sided mixture two-point
lemma** `mixture_two_point_lower_bound` (В§13sa.2b). The following are still **not**
formalized: (i'') the *within-pair-varying* center (the two cells of a pair carry different
nuisance values вҖ” the only residual of the fully-functional Case-1 construction; needs the
one-sided lemma + the 4-distinct-values-per-pair overlap algebra); (ii) the weight function
is `w вүЎ 1` (no `вҖ–wвҖ–вҲһВІ`/`вҖ–wвҖ–вӮӮВІ` factors); (iii) the additive `1/n` parametric-variance
term **is now formalized** (unweighted, `вҖ–wвҖ–вӮӮВІ=1`) in В§13sa.10
(`parametric_lower_bound`); (iv) only Case 1 (`Оөg вүі Оөm`) of the bias construction is
built (Case 2 `Оөm > Оөg` would recover `вҲҡОөgОөm` in that regime).

### 13sa.1 `Estimation/MinimaxATE/Model.lean` вҖ” finite observed-data model

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Obs M` | `abbrev := Fin M Г— Bool Г— Bool` | One observation `(X, D, Y)` with finite covariate. | вҖ” |
| `ValidDGP m g` | `structure`, `Prop` | Propensity `m : Fin M вҶ’ в„қ` and both outcome arms `g : Bool вҶ’ Fin M вҶ’ в„қ` take values in `[0,1]`. | вҖ” |
| `obsReal m g z` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | Real mass `(1/M)В·P(D=d\|x)В·P(Y=y\|d,x)` of observation `z`. | вҖ” |
| `obsReal_sum` | `вҲ‘ z, obsReal m g z = 1` (needs `[NeZero M]`) | Total mass is 1 (sum over `Y`, then `D`, then `X`). **Proved.** | **Proved** |
| `obsReal_nonneg` | `ValidDGP вҶ’ 0 вүӨ obsReal m g z` | Nonnegativity from validity. | **Proved** |
| `obsPMF hv`, `obsLaw hv` | `noncomputable def`, `PMF (Obs M)` / `Measure (Obs M)` | Single-observation law as a PMF / probability measure (via `PMF.ofFintype`). `obsLaw_isProb` instance. | **Proved** |
| `ate g` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ := (1/M) ОЈ_x (g true x вҲ’ g false x)` | The ATE functional; depends only on `g`. | вҖ” |
| `l2sq a b` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ := (1/M) ОЈ_x (a x вҲ’ b x)ВІ` | Squared `LВІ(P_X)` distance. | вҖ” |
| `InClass mhat ghat Оөg Оөm m g` | `structure`, `Prop` | Structure-agnostic nuisance class `в„ұ`: valid + each outcome arm within `Оөg` and propensity within `Оөm` of fixed estimates `(mhat, ghat)`. | вҖ” |
| `InClassDGP вҖҰ` | `def`, subtype | A DGP packaged with its `InClass` proof. | вҖ” |
| `productLaw hv n` | `noncomputable def`, `Measure (Fin n вҶ’ Obs M) := Measure.pi вҖҰ` | `n`-sample i.i.d. product law; `productLaw_isProb` instance. | **Proved** |
| `nMiss hv n est s` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ` | `(productLaw hv n).real {x \| s вүӨ \|est x вҲ’ ate g\|}`: probability `est` misses the true ATE by `s`. | вҖ” |
| `nMSE hv n est` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ := вҲ« x, (est x вҲ’ ate g)ВІ вҲӮ(productLaw hv n)` | Mean-squared error of `est`: the expected-risk functional (the paper's weaker `рқ”ј`-risk form). | вҖ” |
| `nMiss_sq_le_nMSE` | `(hv) (n) (hs : 0 вүӨ s) вҶ’ sВІВ·nMiss hv n est s вүӨ nMSE hv n est` (needs `[MeasurableSingletonClass C]`) | **Chebyshev/Markov bridge**: probability-of-miss controls MSE. Quantitative form of "quantile bound вҹ№ expected-risk bound". Via `mul_meas_ge_le_integral_of_nonneg`; integrability free on the finite sample space. | **Proved, axiom-clean** |
| `minimaxMiss mhat ghat Оөg Оөm n est s` | `noncomputable def`, `в„қ := вЁҶ p : InClassDGP вҖҰ, nMiss вҖҰ` | Worst-case-over-class miss probability; a lower bound on it is a minimax lower bound. | вҖ” |
| `bddAbove_nMiss_range`, `nMiss_le_minimaxMiss` | bddAbove / `nMiss вүӨ minimaxMiss` | Each in-class miss `вүӨ 1`, so the sup is well-defined and dominates each member. | **Proved** |

### 13sa.2 `Estimation/MinimaxATE/Reduction/Witness.lean` вҖ” two-point reduction

Abstract Le Cam reduction (over a general finite covariate `C`). The explicit
witness is now built (В§13sa.4); this layer is correct regardless of how it is built.

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `TwoPointWitness C n mhat ghat Оөg Оөm` | `structure` (needs `[Fintype C] [Nonempty C] [MeasurableSpace C]`) | Le Cam witness: separation `s`, TV budget `c`, two `n`-sample laws `Q : Bool вҶ’ Measure вҖҰ` (`prob`), true ATEs `Оё : Bool вҶ’ в„қ` with `sep : 2s вүӨ \|Оё true вҲ’ Оё false\|`, `tvBound : tvDist (Q false) (Q true) вүӨ c`, and the realizability field `dominated` (each `Q j`-miss `вүӨ minimaxMiss`, discharged by a mixture-of-in-class-DGPs construction). | вҖ” |
| `twoPointWitness_lower_bound` | `(W) (hest : Measurable est) вҶ’ (1 вҲ’ W.c)/2 вүӨ minimaxMiss вҖҰ est W.s` | **Headline.** Le Cam two-point bound (`Stat.two_point_lower_bound_of_tvDist_le`) + realizability domination. **Proved, axiom-clean.** | **Proved** |
| `twoPointWitness_quarter` | `(W) (hc : W.c вүӨ 1/2) (hest) вҶ’ 1/4 вүӨ minimaxMiss вҖҰ est W.s` | A witness with TV budget `вүӨ 1/2` forces every estimator to miss the truth by `s` with prob `вүҘ 1/4` somewhere in the class. **Proved, axiom-clean.** | **Proved** |

### 13sa.3 `Estimation/MinimaxATE/Reduction/Bump.lean` вҖ” `l2sq` / Rademacher-bump algebra

Small reusable algebra for the squared `LВІ(P_X)` distance, used to verify
class-membership of the perturbed nuisances (a constant-magnitude bump lands
exactly on the budget boundary).

| Declaration | Signature | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `l2sq_self` | `l2sq a a = 0` | Distance to self is zero. | **Proved** |
| `l2sq_comm` | `l2sq a b = l2sq b a` | Symmetry. | **Proved** |
| `l2sq_nonneg` | `0 вүӨ l2sq a b` | Nonnegativity (no `[NeZero M]` needed). | **Proved** |
| `l2sq_bump` | `(вҲҖ x, (Пғ x)ВІ = 1) вҮ’ l2sq (fun x вҶҰ b x + ОҙВ·Пғ x) b = ОҙВІ` (needs `[Nonempty C]`) | **Constant-magnitude (Rademacher) bump**: a `ВұОҙ` perturbation has `l2sq = ОҙВІ`, so `Оҙ = вҲҡОө` lands the perturbation on the boundary of `в„ұ(Оө,В·)`. | **Proved, axiom-clean** |

### 13sa.4 Explicit construction (JinвҖ“Syrgkanis В§4.4, Case 1) вҖ” `ConstCenterHalf/` (`Construction/Membership/Gap/ExplicitWitness.lean`)

The explicit lower-bound witness, on the **paired-cell covariate** `C = Fin K Г— Bool`
(pair index Г— position) with centered estimates `mМӮ = Дқ вүЎ 1/2` and unweighted ATE.
A Rademacher sign vector `О» : Fin K вҶ’ Bool` drives the bump
`О” О» (j,b) = signOf b В· signOf (О» j) вҲҲ {Вұ1}` (`О”ВІ = 1`, balanced per pair). Every
declaration **sorry-free + axiom-clean**.

| Declaration | File | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `О”`, `О”_sq`, `О”_mem` | Construction | `О” О» x = signOf x.2В·signOf (О» x.1)`; `О”ВІ = 1`; `О” вҲҲ {Вұ1}` | The Rademacher bump and its sign properties. |
| `mPerturbed`, `gPerturbed` | Construction | `mО» = 1/2 вҲ’ ОІВ·О”`; `gО»(1) = (1/2+ОұВ·О”)/(1вҲ’2ОІВ·О”)`, `gО»(0)=1/2` | The asymmetric (non-linear-in-`О»`) perturbed DGP (eq. 17, `mМӮ=Дқ=1/2`). |
| `validDGP_perturbed` | Construction | `0вүӨОұ, 0вүӨОІ, Оұ+2ОІвүӨ1/2 вҮ’ ValidDGP (mPerturbed ОІ О») (gPerturbed Оұ ОІ О»)` | The perturbed nuisances stay in `[0,1]`. |
| `inClass_perturbed` | Membership | `ОІВІвүӨОөm, (Оұ+ОІ)ВІ/(1вҲ’2ОІ)ВІвүӨОөg вҮ’ InClass mМӮ Дқ Оөg Оөm (mО») (gО»)` | Class membership: `l2sq(mО»,mМӮ)=ОІВІ` exactly, `l2sq(gО»(1),Дқ(1))вүӨ(Оұ+ОІ)ВІ/(1вҲ’2ОІ)ВІ`. |
| `ate_gPerturbed` | Gap | `ate (gPerturbed Оұ ОІ О») = 2ОІ(Оұ+ОІ)/(1вҲ’4ОІВІ)` | **Exact ATE вҖ” independent of `О»`** (the per-pair sum is sign-invariant). The вҲҡ(ОөgВ·Оөm) gap. |
| `Qfalse`, `Qtrue`, `signWeight` | ExplicitWitness | `Qfalse = PМӮ^вҠ—n`; `Qtrue = (1/2^K)ОЈ_О» QО»^вҠ—n` (uniform `mixture`) | The two `n`-sample data laws (null vs. uniform mixture of perturbations). |
| `explicitWitness` | ExplicitWitness | `вҖҰ (htv : tvDist Qfalse Qtrue вүӨ 1/2) вҶ’ TwoPointWitness (Fin KГ—Bool) n mМӮ Дқ Оөg Оөm` | Assembled witness; `dominated` discharged by `mixtureReal_le` (all `QО»` in-class, common ATE). |
| `explicit_minimax_lower_bound` | ExplicitWitness | budgets + `htv : tvDist Qfalse Qtrue вүӨ 1/2` вҮ’ `1/4 вүӨ minimaxMiss mМӮ Дқ Оөg Оөm n est (ОІ(Оұ+ОІ)/(1вҲ’4ОІВІ))` | Conditional form (carries `htv`); `minimax_lower_bound` (В§13sa.5) discharges it. **Proved, axiom-clean.** |

### 13sa.5 ПҮВІ indistinguishability core вҖ” `ConstCenterHalf/` (`ChiSqOverlap/Ingster/ChiSquaredCore.lean`)

The Ingster ПҮВІ second-moment bound that discharges `htv`, making the lower bound
**unconditional** (only the natural regime hypotheses remain). All sorry-free +
axiom-clean. Builds on the finite ПҮВІ formula `finite_one_add_chiSqDiv` (В§12w).

| Declaration | File | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `obsLaw_real_singleton` | ChiSqOverlap | `(obsLaw hv).real {z} = obsReal m g z` | The single-observation PMF point mass (generic `C`). |
| `chiSqOverlap`, `chiSqOverlap_eq` | ChiSqOverlap | `chiSqOverlap Оұ ОІ О» О»' := вҲ‘_z qО»(z)qО»'(z)/pМӮ(z) = 1 + (2Оі/K)В·ОЈ_j signOf(О» j)signOf(О»' j)`, `Оі = ОұВІ+2ОұОІ+3ОІВІ` | **Exact closed form** of the single-obs ПҮВІ-overlap (finite algebra; per-pair sign-balanced cancellation). |
| `ingster_bound` | Ingster | `0вүӨОі, 2ОівүӨ1, 2nВІОіВІ вүӨ KВ·log 2 вҮ’ ОЈ_{О»,О»'} (2^K)вҒ»ВІВ·(1+(2Оі/K)ОЈ_j s_j s'_j)вҒҝ вүӨ 2` | **The Ingster bound** (standalone real analysis): `(1+x)вүӨeЛЈ` + Rademacher independence (factorize to `cosh(nc)^K`) + `cosh y вүӨ e^{yВІ/2}`. |
| `one_add_chiSqDiv_Qtrue_Qfalse` | ChiSquaredCore | `1 + ПҮВІ(QtrueвҖ–Qfalse) = ОЈ_{О»,О»'} (2^K)вҒ»ВІВ·chiSqOverlap(О»,О»')вҒҝ` | **Mixture 2nd-moment identity**: finite ПҮВІ formula + product point mass (`pi_real_singleton`) + `Fintype.sum_pow`. |
| `chiSqDiv_Qtrue_Qfalse_le_one` | ChiSquaredCore | regime вҮ’ `ПҮВІ(QtrueвҖ–Qfalse) вүӨ 1` | Combine the identity with `chiSqOverlap_eq` + `ingster_bound`. |
| `tvDist_Qfalse_Qtrue_le_half` | ChiSquaredCore | regime вҮ’ `tvDist Qfalse Qtrue вүӨ 1/2` | `tvDist вүӨ ВҪвҲҡПҮВІ вүӨ 1/2` (discharges `htv`). |
| `minimax_lower_bound` | ChiSquaredCore | budgets + `2ОівүӨ1` + `2nВІОіВІ вүӨ KВ·log 2` + `Measurable est` вҮ’ `1/4 вүӨ minimaxMiss mМӮ Дқ Оөg Оөm n est (ОІ(Оұ+ОІ)/(1вҲ’4ОІВІ))` | **Headline (unconditional).** No estimator is within `s вүҚ вҲҡ(ОөgВ·Оөm)` of the true ATE w.p. `> 3/4` over the class, in the regime `nВІВ·(Оөg+Оөm)ВІ вүІ K`. **Proved, axiom-clean.** |

Helpers: `absolutelyContinuous_of_singleton_pos` (full support вҮ’ AC), `productLaw_real_singleton`, `Qfalse_singleton_ne_zero`, `signWeight_toReal` (`= (2^K)вҒ»В№`).

### 13sa.6 Continuous covariate вҖ” `ContinuousX.lean`

The ancillarity reduction to the paper's continuous-`X` statement. The within-cell
position is modelled by an **arbitrary** probability space `(W, ПҒ)`; the continuous
`n`-sample laws are the finite-cell laws tensored with `n` ancillary `ПҒ`-draws.
Tensoring both hypotheses with the common factor leaves the ПҮВІ unchanged
(`chiSqDiv_prod_ancillary`, В§12w), so the bound transfers verbatim. Sorry-free +
axiom-clean.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `ancillaryLaw ПҒ n`, `QfalseCont`, `QtrueCont` | `Measure.pi (fun _ => ПҒ)`; `(Qfalse).prod (ancillaryLaw ПҒ n)`; `(Qtrue вҖҰ).prod (ancillaryLaw ПҒ n)` | The `n` within-cell ancillary draws and the continuous null / alternative laws on `(Fin n вҶ’ Obs (Fin KГ—Bool)) Г— (Fin n вҶ’ W)`. |
| `chiSqDiv_QtrueCont_QfalseCont_le_one` | regime вҮ’ `ПҮВІ(QtrueContвҖ–QfalseCont) вүӨ 1` | The ancillary factor cancels (`chiSqDiv_prod_ancillary`), reducing to the finite-cell `chiSqDiv_Qtrue_Qfalse_le_one`. |
| `tvDist_QfalseCont_QtrueCont_le_half` | regime вҮ’ `tvDist QfalseCont QtrueCont вүӨ 1/2` | Continuous-`X` indistinguishability. |
| `two_point_lower_bound_continuous` | budgets + regime + `Measurable est` вҮ’ `1/4 вүӨ max (QtrueCont.real {miss 2s}) (QfalseCont.real {miss 0})` | **Headline (continuous covariate).** Two-point (Le Cam) obstruction on the richer continuous experiment; the ancillary within-cell position cannot help. Bounds the two-hypothesis max-miss, not `minimaxMiss`. **Proved, axiom-clean.** |

### 13sa.7 Expected-risk (MSE) form вҖ” `MSE.lean`

The paper's quantile lower bound (В§13sa.5) *implies* the weaker expected-squared-error
bound used by Balakrishnan et al. (`рқ”җвӮҷ,Оі вүҘ ПҒ вҹ№ minimax `рқ”ј`-risk `вүҘ (1вҲ’Оі)ПҒ`). This
file makes that implication explicit and **unconditional** via the Chebyshev bridge
`nMiss_sq_le_nMSE` (В§13sa.1). The witness DGP is pulled out of the two-point bound
`1/4 вүӨ max(вҖҰ)`: either the null `(mМӮ,Дқ)` (left branch) or a single Rademacher-perturbed
DGP extracted from the uniform mixture `Qtrue` by `exists_real_ge_mixture` (a finite
average is `вүӨ` its maximal component). Sorry-free + axiom-clean.

| Declaration | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `minimax_lower_bound_mse` | budgets + regime + `Measurable est` вҮ’ `вҲғ p : InClassDGP mМӮ Дқ Оөg Оөm, (ОІ(Оұ+ОІ)/(1вҲ’4ОІВІ))ВІ/4 вүӨ nMSE p.2.valid n est` | **Expected-risk headline.** Every estimator has MSE `вүҘ sВІ/4 вүҚ ОөgВ·Оөm` on *some* in-class DGP вҖ” the product rate is an unbeatable `рқ”ј`-squared-error floor. The `(1вҲ’Оі)`-factored (`Оі=3/4`) consequence of the quantile bound. **Proved, axiom-clean.** |

(No continuous-covariate MSE form: on the non-finite continuous sample space the
squared error of an arbitrary measurable estimator need not be integrable, so an
unconditional Chebyshev step is unavailable вҖ” the continuous result stays in its
native quantile/two-point form, which is already the paper's risk notion.)

### 13sa.8 General constant center вҖ” `ConstCenterGeneral/` (`Construction/Gap/Membership/ChiSqOverlap/LowerBound/MSE.lean`, `namespace GenConstr`)

Generalizes the `(mМӮ,Дқ)вүЎ1/2` development (В§13sa.4вҖ“7) to an **arbitrary constant
nuisance center** `(mвӮҖ,gвӮҖ,gвӮҒ) вҲҲ (0,1)Ві` bounded away from `{0,1}` вҖ” the paper's
Assumption 2 in the constant case, including the known-baseline remark. The center
is held constant *within* each Rademacher pair, so the ATE gap stays **exactly
`О»`-independent** (no Taylor/Fano needed) and the abstract `ingster_bound` (В§13sa.5)
is reused verbatim with `Оі := О“/2`. The `1/2` headline is the instance
`mвӮҖ=gвӮҒ=1/2`. All declarations **sorry-free + axiom-clean**; live in `namespace GenConstr`.

| Declaration | File | Statement | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `GenConstr` | Construction | `structure` (fields `Оұ ОІ mвӮҖ gвӮҖ gвӮҒ : в„қ` + the bounded-away / smallness inequalities `hОІgвӮҒ : ОІ<gвӮҒ`, `hОұgвӮҒ : ОұвүӨgвӮҒ`, `hgU : gвӮҒ+Оұ+ОІ/gвӮҒвүӨ1`, `hmU : mвӮҖ(1+ОІ/gвӮҒ)вүӨ1`) | Bundles the bump scalars, the constant center, and exactly the inequalities keeping every perturbed probability in `[0,1]`. |
| `mhatG`, `ghatG`, `mPertG`, `gPertG` | Construction | `mМӮвүЎmвӮҖ`; `Дқ(1)вүЎgвӮҒ,Дқ(0)вүЎgвӮҖ`; `mО»=mвӮҖ(1вҲ’(ОІ/gвӮҒ)В·О”)`; `gО»(1)=(gвӮҒ+ОұВ·О”)/(1вҲ’(ОІ/gвӮҒ)В·О”)`, `gО»(0)=gвӮҖ` | The general-center perturbed DGP (collapses to В§13sa.4 at `mвӮҖ=gвӮҒ=1/2`, `ОІ/gвӮҒ=2ОІ`). |
| `denomG_pos`, `validDGP_hatG`, `validDGP_pertG` | Construction | `0<1вҲ’(ОІ/gвӮҒ)В·О”`; null & perturbed are `ValidDGP` | Positivity of the denominator and `[0,1]`-validity. |
| `gPertG_true_eq` | Gap | `gО»(1,x) = (gвӮҒВІ+ОұВ·gвӮҒВ·О”)/(gвӮҒвҲ’ОІВ·О”)` | **Cleared treated arm** (clears the inner `ОІ/gвӮҒ` fraction); used throughout. |
| `ate_ghatG`, `ate_gPertG` | Gap | `ate Дқ = gвӮҒвҲ’gвӮҖ`; `ate gО» = (gвӮҒвҲ’gвӮҖ) + gвӮҒОІ(Оұ+ОІ)/(gвӮҒВІвҲ’ОІВІ)` (needs `[NeZero K]`) | **Exact ATE вҖ” independent of `О»`** (per-pair sum sign-invariant). |
| `ate_gapG` | Gap | `ate gО» вҲ’ ate Дқ = gвӮҒОІ(Оұ+ОІ)/(gвӮҒВІвҲ’ОІВІ)` | The `вҲҡ(ОөgВ·Оөm)` gap (collapses to `2ОІ(Оұ+ОІ)/(1вҲ’4ОІВІ)` at `gвӮҒ=1/2`). |
| `l2sq_mPertG`, `l2sq_gPertG_true_le`, `inClassG` | Membership | `l2sq(mО»,mМӮ)=(mвӮҖОІ/gвӮҒ)ВІ` exactly; `l2sq(gО»(1),Дқ(1))вүӨgвӮҒВІ(Оұ+ОІ)ВІ/(gвӮҒвҲ’ОІ)ВІ`; budgets `(mвӮҖОІ/gвӮҒ)ВІвүӨОөm`, `gвӮҒВІ(Оұ+ОІ)ВІ/(gвӮҒвҲ’ОІ)ВІвүӨОөg вҮ’ InClass mМӮ Дқ Оөg Оөm mО» gО»` | Class membership. |
